title: Computational Foundations for Strategic Coopetition: Formalizing Sequential Interaction and Reciprocity
comment: 81 pages, 19 figures. Fourth technical report in research program; should be read with companion arXiv:2510.18802, arXiv:2510.24909, and arXiv:2601.16237. Adapts and extends complex actor material from Pant (2021) doctoral dissertation, University of Toronto
summary: Strategic coopetition in multi-stakeholder systems requires understanding how cooperation persists through time without binding contracts. This technical report extends computational foundations for strategic coopetition to sequential interaction dynamics, bridging conceptual modeling (i* framework) with game-theoretic reciprocity analysis. We develop: (1) bounded reciprocity response functions mapping partner deviations to finite conditional responses, (2) memory-windowed history tracking capturing cognitive limitations over k recent periods, (3) structural reciprocity sensitivity derived from interdependence matrices where behavioral responses are amplified by structural dependencies, and (4) trust-gated reciprocity where trust modulates reciprocity responses. The framework applies to both human stakeholder interactions and multi-agent computational systems. Comprehensive validation across 15,625 parameter configurations demonstrates robust reciprocity effects, with all six behavioral targets exceeding thresholds: cooperation emergence (97.5%), defection punishment (100%), forgiveness dynamics (87.9%), asymmetric differentiation (100%), trust-reciprocity interaction (100%), and bounded responses (100%). Empirical validation using the Apple iOS App Store ecosystem (2008-2024) achieves 43/51 applicable points (84.3%), reproducing documented cooperation patterns across five ecosystem phases. Statistical significance confirmed at p < 0.001 with Cohen's d = 1.57. This report concludes the Foundations Series (TR-1 through TR-4) adopting uniaxial treatment where agents choose cooperation levels along a single continuum. Companion work on interdependence (arXiv:2510.18802), trust (arXiv:2510.24909), and collective action (arXiv:2601.16237) has been prepublished. Extensions Series (TR-5 through TR-8) introduces biaxial treatment where cooperation and competition are independent dimensions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个战略合作竞争(Strategic Coopetition)计算框架，将概念建模(i*框架)与博弈论 reciprocity 分析相结合，扩展到序贯互动动态。该框架包含四个核心机制：有界 reciprocity 响应函数、记忆窗口历史追踪、结构 reciprocity 敏感性和信任门控 reciprocity。在15,625种参数配置和iOS应用商店生态系统的实证验证中表现出色。
AI.motivation: 多利益相关者系统中需要理解合作如何在没有约束性契约的情况下随时间持续存在。现有研究缺乏将概念建模与博弈论分析相结合的计算基础来处理序贯互动动态。
AI.method: 开发了四个核心机制：(1)有界 reciprocity 响应函数，将伙伴偏离映射到有限条件响应；(2)记忆窗口历史追踪，捕获近k期的认知限制；(3)结构 reciprocity 敏感性，从相互依赖矩阵导出；(4)信任门控 reciprocity，其中信任调节 reciprocity 响应。整合i*框架与博弈论 reciprocity 分析，并进行大规模参数实验(15,625配置)和iOS应用商店生态系统的实证验证(2008-2024)。
AI.result: 六项行为目标均超过阈值：合作出现(97.5%)、背叛惩罚(100%)、宽恕动态(87.9%)、非对称区分(100%)、信任-reciprocity交互(100%)、有界响应(100%)。实证验证获得51点中的43点(84.3%)，统计显著性确认(p < 0.001, Cohen's d = 1.57)。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功地将战略合作竞争的理论基础扩展到序贯互动动态，验证了 reciprocity 机制在多利益相关者系统中的有效性。报告 concludes 了 Foundations Series (TR-1至TR-4)，采用单轴处理方式。Extensions Series (TR-5至TR-8)将引入双轴处理，将合作与竞争作为独立维度。

relevance_reason: This paper is about game theory and strategic interaction in multi-stakeholder systems (iOS app store ecosystem), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is economics/business rather than graphics/motion. The methods involve game theory, reciprocity analysis, and conceptual modeling (i* framework) - none of which relate to video generation, 3D motion generation, or visual-to-motion translation. It addresses none of the pain points (domain gap, temporal consistency, quality control, visual feature extraction) and uses none of the specified methods (VLM, video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance, 3D motion models).

title: A Role-Based LLM Framework for Structured Information Extraction from Healthy Food Policies
summary: Current Large Language Model (LLM) approaches for information extraction (IE) in the healthy food policy domain are often hindered by various factors, including misinformation, specifically hallucinations, misclassifications, and omissions that result from the structural diversity and inconsistency of policy documents. To address these limitations, this study proposes a role-based LLM framework that automates the IE from unstructured policy data by assigning specialized roles: an LLM policy analyst for metadata and mechanism classification, an LLM legal strategy specialist for identifying complex legal approaches, and an LLM food system expert for categorizing food system stages. This framework mimics expert analysis workflows by incorporating structured domain knowledge, including explicit definitions of legal mechanisms and classification criteria, into role-specific prompts. We evaluate the framework using 608 healthy food policies from the Healthy Food Policy Project (HFPP) database, comparing its performance against zero-shot, few-shot, and chain-of-thought (CoT) baselines using Llama-3.3-70B. Our proposed framework demonstrates superior performance in complex reasoning tasks, offering a reliable and transparent methodology for automating IE from health policies.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于角色的LLM框架，用于从健康食品政策文件中自动提取信息。该框架通过三个专业化LLM角色（政策分析师、法律策略专家、食品系统专家）模拟专家分析流程，并在提示中融入结构化领域知识。实验表明该框架在复杂推理任务上优于零样本、少样本和思维链基线方法。
AI.motivation: 当前大型语言模型在健康食品政策领域的信息提取受到多种因素阻碍，包括幻觉、错误分类和遗漏，这些问题源于政策文件的结构多样性和不一致性。
AI.method: 采用角色扮演框架，将LLM分为三个专业角色：政策分析师（负责元数据和机制分类）、法律策略专家（识别复杂法律方法）、食品系统专家（分类食品系统阶段）。通过角色特定提示融入结构化领域知识，包括法律机制的定义和分类标准。
AI.result: 在复杂推理任务中表现优于零样本、少样本和思维链基线方法，使用Llama-3.3-70B对608个健康食品政策进行评估。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在复杂推理任务中表现优于基线方法，提供了一种可靠且透明的健康政策信息自动化提取方法。

relevance_reason: This paper is about using LLM role-based frameworks for extracting structured information from food policy documents - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is food policy analysis, not computer graphics, video generation, or motion generation. The methods (LLM roles for policy analysis) have no relevance to the research profile's needs for VLM-based quality supervision, video generation models, or 3D motion generation.

title: SHARC: Reference point driven Spherical Harmonic Representation for Complex Shapes
summary: We propose SHARC, a novel framework that synthesizes arbitrary, genus-agnostic shapes by means of a collection of Spherical Harmonic (SH) representations of distance fields. These distance fields are anchored at optimally placed reference points in the interior volume of the surface in a way that maximizes learning of the finer details of the surface. To achieve this, we employ a cost function that jointly maximizes sparsity and centrality in terms of positioning, as well as visibility of the surface from their location. For each selected reference point, we sample the visible distance field to the surface geometry via ray-casting and compute the SH coefficients using the Fast Spherical Harmonic Transform (FSHT). To enhance geometric fidelity, we apply a configurable low-pass filter to the coefficients and refine the output using a local consistency constraint based on proximity. Evaluation of SHARC against state-of-the-art methods demonstrates that the proposed method outperforms existing approaches in both reconstruction accuracy and time efficiency without sacrificing model parsimony. The source code is available at https://github.com/POSE-Lab/SHARC.

AI.tldr: SHARC是一个新颖的框架，通过距离场的球面调和（SH）表示来综合任意 genus-agnostic 的形状。该方法在表面内部最优位置放置参考点，通过射线采样计算可见距离场的SH系数，并使用低频滤波器和局部一致性约束来提高几何保真度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在形状合成中存在重建精度和时间效率的权衡问题，需要一种能够处理任意拓扑结构（genus-agnostic）且能捕捉表面精细细节的形状表示方法。
AI.method: 1) 使用成本函数联合最大化参考点的稀疏性和中心性，以及从该位置看表面的可见性；2) 对每个参考点通过射线采样可见距离场；3) 使用快速球面调和变换（FSHT）计算SH系数；4) 应用可配置的低通滤波器增强几何保真度；5) 使用基于接近度的局部一致性约束细化输出。
AI.result: SHARC在重建精度和时间效率方面均优于现有最先进方法，同时不牺牲模型简洁性。
AI.conclusion: SHARC成功实现了任意拓扑形状的高质量合成，在精度和效率上取得了良好平衡，具有良好的应用前景。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 3D shape reconstruction/synthesis using spherical harmonic representations for complex geometries. This is a completely different application domain from 3D human motion generation. The research profile focuses on generating human motion from 2D videos, with concerns about temporal consistency, domain gaps between 2D video and 3D motion, and visual-to-motion translation. SHARC addresses static shape reconstruction - not motion generation - and uses methods (spherical harmonics, distance fields, ray sampling) that are unrelated to the specified methods (VLM, video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance, 3D motion generation models).

title: DOne: Decoupling Structure and Rendering for High-Fidelity Design-to-Code Generation
summary: While Vision Language Models (VLMs) have shown promise in Design-to-Code generation, they suffer from a "holistic bottleneck-failing to reconcile high-level structural hierarchy with fine-grained visual details, often resulting in layout distortions or generic placeholders. To bridge this gap, we propose DOne, an end-to-end framework that decouples structure understanding from element rendering. DOne introduces (1) a learned layout segmentation module to decompose complex designs, avoiding the limitations of heuristic cropping; (2) a specialized hybrid element retriever to handle the extreme aspect ratios and densities of UI components; and (3) a schema-guided generation paradigm that bridges layout and code. To rigorously assess performance, we introduce HiFi2Code, a benchmark featuring significantly higher layout complexity than existing datasets. Extensive evaluations on the HiFi2Code demonstrate that DOne outperforms exiting methods in both high-level visual similarity (e.g., over 10% in GPT Score) and fine-grained element alignment. Human evaluations confirm a 3 times productivity gain with higher visual fidelity.

AI.tldr: 针对VLM在设计到代码生成中的整体瓶颈问题，提出DOne框架，通过解耦结构理解与元素渲染，在复杂布局基准HiFi2Code上实现显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型(VLM)在设计到代码生成中存在"整体瓶颈"问题，无法协调高层结构层次与细粒度视觉细节，导致布局扭曲或通用占位符。
AI.method: 提出DOne框架，包含三个核心组件：(1)学习式布局分割模块，用于分解复杂设计；(2)专用混合元素检索器，处理UI组件的极端纵横比和密度；(3)模式引导生成范式，连接布局和代码。
AI.result: 在HiFi2Code基准上，DOne在高层视觉相似度(如GPT Score提升超过10%)和细粒度元素对齐方面均优于现有方法。人工评估确认生产力提升3倍，视觉保真度更高。
AI.conclusion: DOne通过解耦结构理解和元素渲染，有效解决了VLM在设计到代码生成中的整体瓶颈问题，在HiFi2Code基准上实现了显著的性能提升，GPT Score提升超过10%，人工评估显示生产力提升3倍。

relevance_reason: The paper is about Design-to-Code generation (UI/UX design to HTML/CSS code), which is in the domain of front-end development and web technologies. This is completely different from 3D Human Motion Generation in Computer Graphics. Although both mention Visual Language Models (VLM), the application domains are entirely different: one uses VLM to understand UI layouts for code generation, while the research profile needs VLM for quality supervision in motion generation. The paper does not address any of the pain points related to 2D video to 3D motion translation, temporal consistency, or motion quality control.

title: Runtime Burden Allocation for Structured LLM Routing in Agentic Expert Systems: A Full-Factorial Cross-Backend Methodology
summary:
Structured LLM routing is often treated as a prompt-engineering problem. We argue that it is, more fundamentally, a systems-level burden-allocation problem. As large language models (LLMs) become core control components in agentic AI systems, reliable structured routing must balance correctness, latency, and implementation cost under real deployment constraints. We show that this balance is shaped not only by prompts or schemas, but also by how structural work is allocated across the generation stack: whether output structure is emitted directly by the model, compressed during transport, or reconstructed locally after generation.
  We evaluate this formulation through a comprehensive full-factorial benchmark covering 48 deployment configurations and 15,552 requests across OpenAI, Gemini, and Llama backends. Our central finding is consequential: there is no universal best routing mode. Instead, backend-specific interaction effects dominate performance. Modes that remain highly reliable on Gemini and OpenAI can suffer substantial correctness degradation on Llama, while efficiency gains from compressed realization are strongly backend-dependent.
  Rather than presenting another isolated model comparison, this work contributes a deployable framework for reasoning about structured routing under heterogeneous backend conditions. We provide a cross-backend evaluation methodology and practical deployment guidance for navigating the correctness-cost-latency frontier in production-grade agentic expert systems.

AI.tldr: 本文将结构化LLM路由从prompt工程问题重新定位为系统级负载分配问题，通过涵盖48种部署配置和15552个请求的全面基准测试，发现不存在通用的最优路由模式，路由性能高度依赖后端特性，并提供了跨后端评估方法和生产部署指南。
AI.motivation: 当前将结构化路由视为prompt工程问题的视角存在局限性，作者认为这本质上是一个系统级的负载分配问题，需要平衡正确性、延迟和实现成本，特别是在异构后端条件下。
AI.method: 采用全因子基准测试方法，涵盖48种部署配置，跨越OpenAI、Gemini和Llama三种后端，共15552个请求，评估不同结构工作分配方式（直接生成、压缩传输、本地重建）的表现。
AI.result: 核心发现：不存在通用的最优路由模式。后端特定的交互效应主导性能表现。在Gemini和OpenAI上高度可靠的模式可能在Llama上出现严重的正确性下降，压缩实现的效率提升高度依赖后端。
AI.conclusion: 本研究贡献了一个可部署的框架，用于在异构后端条件下推理结构化路由问题，提供了跨后端评估方法和实用的生产部署指导，帮助在正确性-成本-延迟之间取得平衡。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM routing and system-level load allocation for AI backends (OpenAI, Gemini, Llama). It has NO relevance to 3D Human Motion Generation in Computer Graphics. The application domains are completely different - this is about LLM infrastructure deployment, not motion generation, video generation, or any computer graphics task. The methods discussed (LLM routing, backend optimization) are unrelated to the research profile's methods (VLMs, video generation models, 3D motion generation, feature extraction pipelines).

title: The Digital Twin Counterfactual Framework: A Validation Architecture for Simulated Potential Outcomes
summary: The fundamental problem of causal inference - that the counterfactual outcome for any individual is never observed - has shaped the entire methodology of the field. Every existing approach substitutes assumptions for missing data: ignorability, parallel trends, exclusion restrictions. None produces the counterfactual itself. This paper proposes the Digital Twin Counterfactual Framework (DTCF): rather than estimating the counterfactual statistically, we simulate it using a digital twin and subject the simulation to a hierarchical validation regime. We formalize the digital twin simulator as a stochastic mapping within the potential outcomes framework and introduce a hierarchy of twin fidelity assumptions - from marginal fidelity through joint fidelity to structural fidelity - each unlocking a progressively richer class of estimands. The central contribution is threefold. First, a five-level validation architecture converts the unfalsifiable claim that the simulator produces correct counterfactuals into falsifiable tests against observable data. Second, a formal decomposition separates causal quantities into those that are marginally validated (ATE, CATE, QTE - testable through observable-arm comparison) and those that are copula-dependent (the ITE distribution, probability of benefit/harm, variance of treatment effects - permanently reliant on the unobservable within-individual dependence structure). Third, bounding, sensitivity, and uncertainty quantification tools make the copula dependence explicit. The DTCF does not resolve the fundamental problem of causal inference. What it provides is a framework in which marginal causal claims become increasingly testable, joint causal claims become explicitly assumption-indexed, and the gap between the two is formally characterized.

AI.tldr: 本文提出数字孪生反事实框架(DTCF)，旨在通过数字孪生模拟而非统计估计来生成反事实结果，并建立层级验证体系来测试因果估计的有效性。
AI.motivation: 因果推断的根本问题在于反事实结果永远无法直接观测。现有方法均通过假设来弥补缺失数据，但没有任何方法能真正产生反事实本身。作者认为可利用数字孪生技术模拟反事实，并对其进行可验证的层级检验。
AI.method: 1)将数字孪生模拟器形式化为潜在结果框架内的随机映射；2)引入从边际保真度、联合保真度到结构保真度的层级孪生保真度假设；3)建立五级验证架构，将"模拟器产生正确反事实"这一不可检验声明转化为针对可观测数据的可检验假设；4)将因果量分解为边际可验证部分(ATE、CATE、QTE)和依赖copula的部分(ITE分布、受益/受害概率、治疗效果方差)。
AI.result: 边际因果主张变得日益可检验；联合因果主张变得明确假设索引化；两类因果主张之间的差距被形式化表征。同时提供了bounding、敏感性和不确定性量化工具来明确化copula依赖关系。
AI.conclusion: DTCF并不能解决因果推断的根本问题，但它提供了一个框架，使边际因果主张变得可检验、联合因果主张变得明确假设化，并形式化两者之间的差距。

relevance_reason: 完全无关领域。该论文是关于因果推断和数字孪生的统计学/机器学习方法论研究，而研究档案是计算机图形学中的3D人体动作生成。两者在应用领域上完全不同：论文关注因果估计验证，研究档案关注视频到3D动作的转换。论文使用的数字孪生反事实框架方法与研究档案中的视频生成模型（Wanxiang、Seedance）、VLM质量监督、3D动作生成模型等方法完全不同且无关。

title: Camouflage-aware Image-Text Retrieval via Expert Collaboration
summary: Camouflaged scene understanding (CSU) has attracted significant attention due to its broad practical implications. However, in this field, robust image-text cross-modal alignment remains under-explored, hindering deeper understanding of camouflaged scenarios and their related applications. To this end, we focus on the typical image-text retrieval task, and formulate a new task dubbed ``camouflage-aware image-text retrieval'' (CA-ITR). We first construct a dedicated camouflage image-text retrieval dataset (CamoIT), comprising $\sim$10.5K samples with multi-granularity textual annotations. Benchmark results conducted on CamoIT reveal the underlying challenges of CA-ITR for existing cutting-edge retrieval techniques, which are mainly caused by objects' camouflage properties as well as those complex image contents. As a solution, we propose a camouflage-expert collaborative network (CECNet), which features a dual-branch visual encoder: one branch captures holistic image representations, while the other incorporates a dedicated model to inject representations of camouflaged objects. A novel confidence-conditioned graph attention (C\textsuperscript{2}GA) mechanism is incorporated to exploit the complementarity across branches. Comparative experiments show that CECNet achieves $\sim$29% overall CA-ITR accuracy boost, surpassing seven representative retrieval models. The dataset and code will be available at https://github.com/jiangyao-scu/CA-ITR.

AI.tldr: 提出了伪装感知图像-文本检索(CA-ITR)新任务，构建了CamoIT数据集(~10.5K样本)，并提出CECNet模型实现约29%的准确率提升。
AI.motivation: 伪装场景理解中图像-文本跨模态对齐研究不足，阻碍了对伪装场景的深度理解及相关应用发展。
AI.method: 提出CECNet模型，采用双分支视觉编码器：一个分支捕获整体图像表示，另一个分支引入专用模型注入伪装物体表示；并提出置信度条件图注意力(C²GA)机制来利用分支间的互补性。
AI.result: 在CamoIT数据集上，CECNet比7个代表性检索模型获得约29%的整体CA-ITR准确率提升。
AI.conclusion: CA-ITR是一个具有挑战性的新任务，现有检索技术难以有效处理伪装物体和复杂图像内容，CECNet通过双分支结构和C²GA机制有效解决了这一问题。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about Image-Text Retrieval for camouflage scenes in computer vision, while the research profile is about 3D Human Motion Generation in Computer Graphics. The paper has no connection to 3D motion generation, human motion, video-to-motion translation, or any of the specified pain points. Methods used (dual-branch visual encoder, graph attention for image-text matching) are entirely different from the required methods (VLM for quality supervision, video generation models, 3D motion generation).

title: IDEA2: Expert-in-the-loop competency question elicitation for collaborative ontology engineering
summary: Competency question (CQ) elicitation represents a critical but resource-intensive bottleneck in ontology engineering. This foundational phase is often hampered by the communication gap between domain experts, who possess the necessary knowledge, and ontology engineers, who formalise it. This paper introduces IDEA2, a novel, semi-automated workflow that integrates Large Language Models (LLMs) within a collaborative, expert-in-the-loop process to address this challenge. The methodology is characterised by a core iterative loop: an initial LLM-based extraction of CQs from requirement documents, a co-creational review and feedback phase by domain experts on an accessible collaborative platform, and an iterative, feedback-driven reformulation of rejected CQs by an LLM until consensus is achieved. To ensure transparency and reproducibility, the entire lifecycle of each CQ is tracked using a provenance model that captures the full lineage of edits, anonymised feedback, and generation parameters. The workflow was validated in 2 real-world scenarios (scientific data, cultural heritage), demonstrating that IDEA2 can accelerate the requirements engineering process, improve the acceptance and relevance of the resulting CQs, and exhibit high usability and effectiveness among domain experts. We release all code and experiments at https://github.com/KE-UniLiv/IDEA2

AI.tldr: 本文提出IDEA2，一个结合大语言模型的半自动化工作流，用于解决本体工程中需求工程师与领域专家之间的沟通障碍，通过迭代式提取、协作审查和反馈驱动的重构来生成 competency questions(CQs)。
AI.motivation: 本体工程中的 competency question (CQ) 引出阶段是关键但资源密集的瓶颈，领域专家与本体工程师之间存在沟通鸿沟，导致需求获取效率低下。
AI.method: IDEA2 采用核心迭代循环：1) LLM 从需求文档中初始提取 CQs；2) 领域专家在协作平台上进行共同创作式审查和反馈；3) LLM 根据拒绝的 CQs 进行迭代式重构直到达成共识。使用 provenance model 追踪每个 CQ 的完整生命周期。
AI.result: 在两个真实场景（科学数据、文化遗产）中验证，表明 IDEA2 可加速需求工程过程，提高 CQ 的接受度和相关性，并具有高可用性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: IDEA2 通过将 LLM 与专家-in-the-loop 流程有效结合，为 ontology engineering 中的 CQ 引出提供了一种可行的高效解决方案，具有透明性和可重复性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about ontology engineering and competency question elicitation using LLMs - completely unrelated to 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is Knowledge Engineering/Ontology, not Computer Graphics or motion generation. title: Look Twice: Training-Free Evidence Highlighting in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Answering questions about images often requires combining visual understanding with external knowledge. Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) provide a natural framework for this setting, but they often struggle to identify the most relevant visual and textual evidence when answering knowledge-intensive queries. In such scenarios, models must integrate visual cues with retrieved textual evidence that is often noisy or only partially relevant, while also localizing fine-grained visual information in the image. In this work, we introduce Look Twice (LoT), a training-free inference-time framework that improves how pretrained MLLMs utilize multimodal evidence. Specifically, we exploit the model attention patterns to estimate which visual regions and retrieved textual elements are relevant to a query, and then generate the answer conditioned on this highlighted evidence. The selected cues are highlighted through lightweight prompt-level markers that encourage the model to re-attend to the relevant evidence during generation. Experiments across multiple knowledge-based VQA benchmarks show consistent improvements over zero-shot MLLMs. Additional evaluations on vision-centric and hallucination-oriented benchmarks further demonstrate that visual evidence highlighting alone improves model performance in settings without textual context, all without additional training or architectural modifications. Source code will be publicly released.

AI.tldr: LoT是一种无需训练的多模态推理框架，通过分析MLLM的注意力模式来识别与查询相关的视觉区域和文本证据，并使用轻量级标记高亮关键信息，引导模型在生成时重新关注这些证据，从而提升知识密集型视觉问答的性能。
AI.motivation: 多模态大型语言模型(MLLMs)在回答知识密集型查询时，往往难以识别最相关的视觉和文本证据。这类场景需要模型整合视觉线索与检索到的噪声或不完整文本证据，同时还要精确定位图像中的细粒度视觉信息。
AI.method: 提出Look Twice(LoT)框架，一种无需训练的推理时框架。该方法利用模型注意力模式来估计哪些视觉区域和检索到的文本元素与查询相关，然后基于这些高亮证据生成答案。通过轻量级提示级标记来高亮选中线索，鼓励模型在生成过程中重新关注相关证据。
AI.result: 在多个基于知识的VQA基准测试中，相较于零样本MLLMs均获得一致提升。额外评估表明，视觉证据高亮在无文本上下文的情况下也能提升模型性能，且无需额外训练或架构修改。
AI.conclusion: LoT框架无需训练即可提升预训练MLLMs利用多模态证据的能力，通过注意力模式识别相关视觉和文本元素，并通过提示级标记引导模型重新关注关键证据，为知识密集型视觉问答提供了一种简单有效的推理时增强方案。

title: Semantic Modeling for World-Centered Architectures
summary: We introduce world-centered multi-agent systems (WMAS) as an alternative to traditional agent-centered architectures, arguing that structured domains such as enterprises and institutional systems require a shared, explicit world representation to ensure semantic consistency, explainability, and long-term stability. We classify worlds along dimensions including ontological explicitness, normativity, etc. In WMAS, learning and coordination operate over a shared world model rather than isolated agent-local representations, enabling global consistency and verifiable system behavior. We propose semantic models as a mathematical formalism for representing such worlds. Finally, we present the Ontobox platform as a realization of WMAS.

AI.tldr: 提出世界中心多智能体系统(WMAS)作为传统智能体中心架构的替代方案，使用共享的显式世界表示来确保语义一致性、可解释性和长期稳定性，并介绍Ontobox平台作为WMAS的实现。
AI.motivation: 传统智能体中心架构在处理企业或机构系统等结构化领域时，缺乏语义一致性、可解释性和长期稳定性，需要一种新的架构范式来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 1)提出WMAS架构，将学习和协调操作建立在共享世界模型而非孤立智能体局部表示之上；2)从本体显性化、规范性等维度对世界进行分类；3)采用语义模型作为表示世界的数学形式化工具。
AI.result: 建立了WMAS的理论框架，通过语义模型实现全局一致性验证和可验证的系统行为。
AI.conclusion: WMAS为结构化领域的多智能体系统提供了一种更优的架构选择，Ontobox平台证明了该方案的可行性。

The application domains are entirely different: this paper deals with agent-based computing and world representations, while the research profile focuses on generating 3D human motion from 2D videos. There is no overlap in methods, applications, or research objectives.

title: Sparse Spectral LoRA: Routed Experts for Medical VLMs
summary: Large vision-language models (VLMs) excel on general benchmarks but often lack robustness in medical imaging, where heterogeneous supervision induces cross-dataset interference and sensitivity to data regime (i.e., how the supervisory signals are mixed). In realistic clinical workflows, data and tasks arrive sequentially, so naive continual training further leads to catastrophic forgetting. To address these challenges, we propose MedQwen, a parameter-efficient medical VLM that couples a spectrally routed Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) with a theoretically grounded scaling rule that aligns low-rank updates with a full-rank, fully fine-tuned MoE, without changing the base architecture. Concretely, we initialize each expert from non-overlapping singular value decomposition (SVD) segments of the pretrained weight and introduce a residual compensation and scaling scheme to enable stable expert specialization and consistent routing under distribution shift. Across 23 medical datasets covering visual question answering, report generation, radiology classification, and hallucination mitigation, MedQwen achieves strong, reliable performance: it approaches full fine-tuning on zero-shot classification with 339$\times$ fewer trainable parameters, and reduces sequential forgetting to $\sim$5\% where strong baselines degrade by $>$20-50\%.

AI.tldr: MedQwen是一种参数高效医学VLM，通过谱路由MoE与理论驱动缩放规则解决异构监督、跨数据集干扰和灾难性遗忘三大挑战。在23个医学数据集上以339倍更少参数实现接近全微调性能，遗忘率降至5%。
AI.motivation: 当前大视觉语言模型(VLM)在通用基准上表现优异，但在医学影像场景中缺乏稳健性。主要挑战包括：异构监督导致的跨数据集干扰、对数据 regime（监督信号混合方式）的敏感性、以及实际临床工作流中数据任务顺序到达引发的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.method: MedQwen采用谱路由混合专家(MoE)架构，并引入理论 grounding的缩放规则对齐低秩更新与全秩完全微调MoE。具体而言：从预训练权重的非重叠奇异值分解(SVD)片段初始化各专家；引入残差补偿和缩放方案以实现分布偏移下稳定的专家特化和一致的路由。
AI.result: 在覆盖视觉问答、报告生成、放射学分类和幻觉缓解的23个医学数据集上，MedQwen实现了强健可靠的性能：零样本分类接近全参数微调效果，且仅需339倍更少的可训练参数；顺序遗忘降低至约5%，而强基线方法退化达20-50%。
AI.conclusion: MedQwen是一种参数高效且稳健的医学VLM，在参数效率与性能之间实现了良好平衡。通过将谱路由MoE与理论驱动的缩放规则相结合，该方法能够在保持基础架构不变的情况下，实现接近全参数微调的零样本分类性能，同时显著减少灾难性遗忘。为医学影像领域的实际临床工作流部署提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Crashing Waves vs. Rising Tides: Preliminary Findings on AI Automation from Thousands of Worker Evaluations of Labor Market Tasks
summary: We propose that AI automation is a continuum between: (i) crashing waves where AI capabilities surge abruptly over small sets of tasks, and (ii) rising tides where the increase in AI capabilities is more continuous and broad-based. We test for these effects in preliminary evidence from an ongoing evaluation of AI capabilities across over 3,000 broad-based tasks derived from the U.S. Department of Labor O*NET categorization that are text-based and thus LLM-addressable. Based on more than 17,000 evaluations by workers from these jobs, we find little evidence of crashing waves (in contrast to recent work by METR), but substantial evidence that rising tides are the primary form of AI automation. AI performance is high and improving rapidly across a wide range of tasks. We estimate that, in 2024-Q2, AI models successfully complete tasks that take humans approximately 3-4 hours with about a 50% success rate, increasing to about 65% by 2025-Q3. If recent trends in AI capability growth persist, this pace of AI improvement implies that LLMs will be able to complete most text-related tasks with success rates of, on average, 80%-95% by 2029 at a minimally sufficient quality level. Achieving near-perfect success rates at this quality level or comparable success rates at superior quality would require several additional years. These AI capability improvements would impact the economy and labor market as organizations adopt AI, which could have a substantially longer timeline.

AI.tldr: 作者提出AI自动化存在"crashing waves"( abrupt surges)和"rising tides"(持续广泛提升)两种模式，通过对3000+任务和17000+评估的实证研究发现rising tides是主要形式，预测2029年AI将在文本任务上达到80-95%成功率。
AI.motivation: 本文提出了AI自动化是一个连续体的概念，区分两种模式：(1) "crashing waves" - AI能力在少量任务上的突然爆发；(2) "rising tides" - AI能力更持续和广泛地提升。作者试图通过实证研究检验这两种模式是否存在。
AI.method: 基于美国劳工部O*NET分类体系中的3000多个文本任务，对LLM可解决问题进行评估。收集了超过17000个来自这些岗位工人的评估数据，进行实证分析。
AI.result: 研究发现几乎没有"crashing waves"的证据，但有充分证据表明"rising tides"是AI自动化的主要形式。2024年Q2，AI模型能在约3-4小时任务中达到50%成功率，到2025年Q3升至65%。若趋势持续，到2029年AI可达到80%-95%的成功率。
AI.conclusion: AI能力的持续改进将影响经济和劳动力市场，但组织采用AI的时间线可能更长。该研究为理解AI对劳动市场的影响提供了重要的实证基础。

title: ViTs for Action Classification in Videos: An Approach to Risky Tackle Detection in American Football Practice Videos
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures. Accepted to ICPR 2026 (28th International Conference on Pattern Recognition)
summary: Early identification of hazardous actions in contact sports enables timely intervention and improves player safety. We present a method for detecting risky tackles in American football practice videos and introduce a substantially expanded dataset for this task. Our work contains 733 single-athlete-dummy tackle clips, each temporally localized around first point contact and labeled with a strike zone component of the standardized Assessment for Tackling Technique (SATT-3), extending prior work that reported 178 annotated videos. Using a Vision transformer-based model with imbalance-aware training, we obtain risky recall of 0.67 and Risky F1 of 0.59 under crossvalidation. Relative to the previous baseline in a smaller subset (risky recall of 0.58; Risky F1 0.56 ), our approach improves risky recall by more than 8% points on a much larger dataset. These results indicate that the vision transformer-based video analysis, coupled with careful handling of class imbalance, can reliably detect rare but safety-critical tackling patterns, offering a practical pathway toward coach-centered injury prevention tools.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Vision Transformer的模型，用于从美式足球训练视频中检测危险的擒抱动作，并通过 imbalance-aware training 处理类别不平衡问题，在733个标注视频片段上实现了 risky recall 0.67 和 Risky F1 0.59 的性能。
AI.motivation: 在接触性运动中及早识别危险动作可以实现及时干预并提高运动员的安全性。
AI.method: 使用基于Vision Transformer的模型进行视频分析，并采用imbalance-aware training方法来处理类别不平衡问题。数据集包含733个单运动员假人擒抱视频片段，每个片段在首次接触时刻周围进行时间定位，并标注了标准化擒抱技术评估(SATT-3)的击打区域成分。
AI.result: 在交叉验证下实现risky recall为0.67，Risky F1为0.59，相比之前在较小数据集上的基线(risky recall 0.58，Risky F1 0.56)，risky recall提高了超过8个百分点。
AI.conclusion: Vision Transformer视频分析与精心处理类别不平衡相结合，可以可靠地检测出罕见但涉及安全关键的擒抱模式，为面向教练的伤病预防工具提供了一条实用路径。

The research profile focuses on generating new 3D motion content from 2D videos, while this paper focuses on classifying/detecting safety risks in existing video footage. Although both use video analysis techniques (Vision Transformers), the goals are fundamentally different: classification vs. generation. There's no 3D motion generation, no visual-to-motion translation, no temporal consistency in motion synthesis addressed here. This is sports video action recognition, not computer graphics motion generation.

title: CogBias: Measuring and Mitigating Cognitive Bias in Large Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in high-stakes decision-making contexts. While prior work has shown that LLMs exhibit cognitive biases behaviorally, whether these biases correspond to identifiable internal representations and can be mitigated through targeted intervention remains an open question. We define LLM cognitive bias as systematic, reproducible deviations from correct answers in tasks with computable ground-truth baselines, and introduce LLM CogBias, a benchmark organized around four families of cognitive biases: Judgment, Information Processing, Social, and Response. We evaluate three LLMs and find that cognitive biases emerge systematically across all four families, with magnitudes and debiasing responses that are strongly family-dependent: prompt-level debiasing substantially reduces Response biases but backfires for Judgment biases. Using linear probes under a contrastive design, we show that these biases are encoded as linearly separable directions in model activation space. Finally, we apply activation steering to modulate biased behavior, achieving 26--32\% reduction in bias score (fraction of biased responses) while preserving downstream capability on 25 benchmarks (Llama: negligible degradation; Qwen: up to $-$19.0pp for Judgment biases). Despite near-orthogonal bias representations across models (mean cosine similarity 0.01), steering reduces bias at similar rates across architectures ($r(246)$=.621, $p$<.001), suggesting shared functional organization.

AI.tldr: 论文提出LLM CogBias基准测试，评估LLM在四类认知偏见上的表现，发现提示级去偏对响应偏见有效但对判断偏见适得其反，通过激活 steering可实现26-32%偏见 reduction，同时保持下游能力。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型被部署在高风险决策场景中，虽已知其存在行为层面的认知偏见，但这些偏见是否对应可识别的内部表征，以及是否能通过针对性干预缓解，仍是开放问题。
AI.method: 定义LLM认知偏见为可计算基准任务中系统性、可复现的答案偏离；构建LLM CogBias基准涵盖判断、信息处理、社会和响应四类偏见；使用对比设计下的线性探针分析模型激活空间；应用激活steering调制偏见行为。
AI.result: 三类LLM均呈现系统性的四类偏见，提示级去偏显著降低响应偏见但对判断偏见适得其反；偏见在激活空间中可线性分离；激活steering在保持25个下游基准能力的同时，实现26-32%偏见分数reduction（Llama几乎无降级，Qwen判断偏见最多-19.0pp）；尽管模型间偏见表征近乎正交（平均余弦相似度0.01），但steering以相似rate降低偏见（r(246)=.621, p<.001），表明存在共享功能组织。
AI.conclusion: LLM的认知偏见是可识别、可量化且部分可干预的；不同类型偏见需不同干预策略；跨架构模型存在共享的偏见组织机制，为统一去偏方法提供可能。

title: Human Pose Estimation in Trampoline Gymnastics: Improving Performance Using a New Synthetic Dataset
summary: Trampoline gymnastics involves extreme human poses and uncommon viewpoints, on which state-of-the art pose estimation models tend to under-perform. We demonstrate that this problem can be addressed by fine-tuning a pose estimation model on a dataset of synthetic trampoline poses (STP). STP is generated from motion capture recordings of trampoline routines. We develop a pipeline to fit noisy motion capture data to a parametric human model, then generate multiview realistic images. We use this data to fine-tune a ViTPose model, and test it on real multi-view trampoline images. The resulting model exhibits accuracy improvements in 2D which translates to improved 3D triangulation. In 2D, we obtain state-of-the-art results on such challenging data, bridging the performance gap between common and extreme poses. In 3D, we reduce the MPJPE by 12.5 mm with our best model, which represents an improvement of 19.6% compared to the pretrained ViTPose model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用合成 trampoline poses (STP) 数据集微调 ViTPose 模型来解决体操动作姿态估计难题。
AI.motivation: 蹦床体操涉及极端人体姿势和罕见视角，现有的姿态估计模型在此类数据上表现不佳，需要针对性解决。
AI.method: 1) 从运动捕捉记录生成STP数据集；2) 开发管道将噪声运动捕捉数据拟合到参数化人体模型；3) 生成多视图真实感图像；4) 使用该数据微调ViTPose模型。
AI.result: 2D姿态估计达到最先进水平，弥合了普通和极端姿势之间的性能差距；3D姿态估计将MPJPE降低12.5mm，比预训练ViTPose提高19.6%。
AI.conclusion: 通过合成数据和模型微调有效解决了极端姿势估计难题，该方法可推广到其他运动姿态估计场景。

title: RIFT: A RubrIc Failure Mode Taxonomy and Automated Diagnostics
summary: Rubric-based evaluation is widely used in LLM benchmarks and training pipelines for open-ended, less verifiable tasks. While prior work has demonstrated the effectiveness of rubrics using downstream signals such as reinforcement learning outcomes, there remains no principled way to diagnose rubric quality issues from such aggregated or downstream signals alone. To address this gap, we introduce RIFT: RubrIc Failure mode Taxonomy, a taxonomy for systematically characterizing failure modes in rubric composition and design. RIFT consists of eight failure modes organized into three high-level categories: Reliability Failures, Content Validity Failures, and Consequential Validity Failures. RIFT is developed using grounded theory by iteratively annotating rubrics drawn from five diverse benchmarks spanning general instruction following, code generation, creative writing, and expert-level deep research, until no new failure modes are identified. We evaluate the consistency of the taxonomy by measuring agreement among independent human annotators, observing fair agreement overall (87% pairwise agreement and 0.64 average Cohen's kappa). Finally, to support scalable diagnosis, we propose automated rubric quality metrics and show that they align with human failure-mode annotations, achieving up to 0.86 F1.

AI.tldr: 提出了RIFT评分规则失效模式分类法，采用扎根理论开发，包含8种失效模式分为3类，可实现自动化的评分规则质量诊断，F1达0.86。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM基准测试和训练流程中广泛使用基于评分规则的评估方法，但缺乏从聚合或下游信号诊断评分规则质量问题的原则性方法。
AI.method: 采用扎根理论(grounded theory)方法，对来自五个不同基准测试（涵盖通用指令遵循、代码生成、创意写作和专家级深度研究）的评分规则进行迭代标注，直至未发现新的失效模式。同时提出了自动化评分规则质量指标。
AI.result: RIFT包含8种失效模式，分布在3个高层类别中（可靠性失效、内容效度失效、结果效度失效）。人工标注一致性达到87%成对一致性和0.64的平均Cohen's kappa。自动化指标与人工失效模式标注对齐，达到0.86 F1。
AI.conclusion: RIFT提供了第一个系统性的评分规则质量诊断框架，通过三类八种的失效模式全面覆盖了评分规则在可靠性、内容效度和结果效度方面的问题。自动化指标可实现0.86 F1的检测性能，为大规模评分规则质量评估提供了可行方案。

It is NOT related to Computer Graphics or 3D Human Motion Generation at all. The application domain is completely different - it's about NLP/LLM evaluation methodology, not video-to-motion translation, temporal consistency, or any computer graphics task. The paper doesn't address any of the pain points mentioned (domain gap, temporal consistency, quality control, feature extraction) and uses completely different methods (grounded theory for taxonomy development vs motion generation models).

title: Regularizing Attention Scores with Bootstrapping
summary:
Vision transformers (ViT) rely on attention mechanism to weigh input features, and therefore attention scores have naturally been considered as explanations for its decision-making process. However, attention scores are almost always non-zero, resulting in noisy and diffused attention maps and limiting interpretability. Can we quantify uncertainty measures of attention scores and obtain regularized attention scores? To this end, we consider attention scores of ViT in a statistical framework where independent noise would lead to insignificant yet non-zero scores. Leveraging statistical learning techniques, we introduce the bootstrapping for attention scores which generates a baseline distribution of attention scores by resampling input features. Such a bootstrap distribution is then used to estimate significances and posterior probabilities of attention scores. In natural and medical images, the proposed \emph{Attention Regularization} approach demonstrates a straightforward removal of spurious attention arising from noise, drastically improving shrinkage and sparsity. Quantitative evaluations are conducted using both simulation and real-world datasets. Our study highlights bootstrapping as a practical regularization tool when using attention scores as explanations for ViT.
  Code available: https://github.com/ncchung/AttentionRegularization

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于Bootstrapping的注意力正则化方法，用于量化ViT中注意力分数的不确定性，通过生成基线分布来估计注意力分数的显著性和后验概率，从而去除噪声引起的虚假注意力，提高注意力图的稀疏性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: Vision transformers (ViT)依赖注意力机制来加权输入特征，但注意力分数几乎总是非零的，导致注意力图噪声多且扩散，限制了可解释性。需要量化注意力分数的不确定性并获得正则化的注意力分数。
AI.method: 将注意力分数置于统计框架中，通过重采样输入特征生成注意力分数的基线分布，然后利用该bootstrap分布估计注意力分数的显著性和后验概率。
AI.result: 在自然图像和医学图像上，该方法能有效去除噪声产生的虚假注意力，显著提高注意力分数的收缩性和稀疏性。在模拟数据集和真实世界数据集上均进行了定量评估。
AI.conclusion: Bootstrapping是使用注意力分数作为ViT解释性工具时的实用正则化方法。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on regularizing attention scores in Vision Transformers (ViT) for image-level tasks (natural and medical image classification/interpretation). While it uses attention mechanisms, the application domain is completely different from 3D human motion generation. The paper addresses ViT interpretability and noise reduction in image attention maps, not video-to-3D-motion translation, temporal consistency in motion generation, or visual feature extraction for human motion. There is no connection to video generation models (Wanxiang, Seedance), 3D motion generation, or VLMs for quality supervision in the motion generation context.

title: Leveraging the Value of Information in POMDP Planning
summary: Partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) offer a principled formalism for planning under state and transition uncertainty. Despite advances made towards solving large POMDPs, obtaining performant policies under limited planning time remains a major challenge due to the curse of dimensionality and the curse of history. For many POMDP problems, the value of information (VOI) - the expected performance gain from reasoning about observations - varies over the belief space. We introduce a dynamic programming framework that exploits this structure by conditionally processing observations based on the value of information at each belief. Building on this framework, we propose Value of Information Monte Carlo planning (VOIMCP), a Monte Carlo Tree Search algorithm that allocates computational effort more efficiently by selectively disregarding observation information when the VOI is low, avoiding unnecessary branching of observations. We provide theoretical guarantees on the near-optimality of our VOI reasoning framework and derive non-asymptotic convergence bounds for VOIMCP. Simulation evaluations demonstrate that VOIMCP outperforms baselines on several POMDP benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VOIMCP算法，通过利用信息价值在信念空间中的变化结构，在VOI较低时选择性忽略观测信息，提高POMDP规划的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 尽管在求解大规模POMDP方面取得了进展，但在有限的规划时间内获得高性能策略仍然是一个重大挑战，原因是维度灾难和历史灾难。许多POMDP问题中，信息价值(VOI)在信念空间中是变化的。
AI.method: 提出基于价值信息的动态规划框架conditionally processing observations，结合蒙特卡洛树搜索算法VOIMCP，通过在VOI较低时选择性忽略观测信息来避免不必要的观测分支，从而更有效地分配计算资源。
AI.result: VOIMCP在多个POMDP基准测试中优于基线方法，理论分析提供了VOI推理框架的近最优性保证和VOIMCP的非渐近收敛界。
AI.conclusion: 提出的VOI推理框架具有近最优性理论保证，VOIMCP算法在多个POMDP基准测试中优于基线方法，为解决POMDP中的计算效率问题提供了有效途径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about POMDP (Partially Observable Markov Decision Process) planning and decision-making under uncertainty. It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, 3D Human Motion Generation, video-to-motion translation, or any of the visual content generation methods mentioned in the research profile. This is a pure AI/decision theory paper about using Value of Information (VOI) to optimize computational resources in planning - completely different application domain. The paper mentions "observations" but these are POMDP state observations, not visual observations from videos. No overlap whatsoever with the pain points or methods required for 3D human motion generation.

title: Perceptual misalignment of texture representations in convolutional neural networks
summary: Mathematical modeling of visual textures traces back to Julesz's intuition that texture perception in humans is based on local correlations between image features. An influential approach for texture analysis and generation generalizes this notion to linear correlations between the nonlinear features computed by convolutional neural networks (CNNs), compiled into Gram matrices. Given that CNNs are often used as models for the visual system, it is natural to ask whether such "texture representations" spontaneously align with the textures' perceptual content, and in particular whether those CNNs that are regarded as better models for the visual system also possess more human-like texture representations. Here we compare the perceptual content captured by feature correlations computed for a diverse pool of CNNs, and we compare it to the models' perceptual alignment with the mammalian visual system as measured by Brain-Score. Surprisingly, we find that there is no connection between conventional measures of CNN quality as a model of the visual system and its alignment with human texture perception. We conclude that texture perception involves mechanisms that are distinct from those that are commonly modeled using approaches based on CNNs trained on object recognition, possibly depending on the integration of contextual information.

AI.tldr: 研究调查了CNN作为视觉系统模型的质量是否与其纹理表示的人类对齐程度相关，结果发现二者之间没有关联，表明纹理感知可能涉及不同于CNN目标识别方法的独特机制。
AI.motivation: 研究基于CNN的纹理表示是否与人类感知到的纹理内容自发对齐，特别是那些被视为更好地模拟视觉系统的CNN是否具有更像人类的纹理表示。
AI.method: 比较了来自不同CNN池的特征相关性（Gram矩阵）捕获的感知内容，并将其与通过Brain-Score测量的CNN与哺乳动物视觉系统的感知对齐程度进行比较。
AI.result: 惊讶地发现，CNN作为视觉系统模型的传统质量指标与其与人类纹理感知的对齐之间没有任何联系。
AI.conclusion: 纹理感知涉及的机制与基于目标识别的CNN方法所建模的机制不同，可能依赖于上下文信息的整合。

relevance_reason: This paper is about CNN texture representations and their alignment with human visual perception (neuroscience/cognitive science). It has no relevance to 3D Human Motion Generation - the application domain is completely different (visual neuroscience vs computer graphics). It does not address any of the pain points (domain gap, temporal consistency, quality control, visual guidance features for motion) and uses entirely different methods in a completely different field.

title: ClawSafety: "Safe" LLMs, Unsafe Agents
summary: Personal AI agents like OpenClaw run with elevated privileges on users' local machines, where a single successful prompt injection can leak credentials, redirect financial transactions, or destroy files. This threat goes well beyond conventional text-level jailbreaks, yet existing safety evaluations fall short: most test models in isolated chat settings, rely on synthetic environments, and do not account for how the agent framework itself shapes safety outcomes. We introduce CLAWSAFETY, a benchmark of 120 adversarial test scenarios organized along three dimensions (harm domain, attack vector, and harmful action type) and grounded in realistic, high-privilege professional workspaces spanning software engineering, finance, healthcare, law, and DevOps. Each test case embeds adversarial content in one of three channels the agent encounters during normal work: workspace skill files, emails from trusted senders, and web pages. We evaluate five frontier LLMs as agent backbones, running 2,520 sandboxed trials across all configurations. Attack success rates (ASR) range from 40\% to 75\% across models and vary sharply by injection vector, with skill instructions (highest trust) consistently more dangerous than email or web content. Action-trace analysis reveals that the strongest model maintains hard boundaries against credential forwarding and destructive actions, while weaker models permit both. Cross-scaffold experiments on three agent frameworks further demonstrate that safety is not determined by the backbone model alone but depends on the full deployment stack, calling for safety evaluation that treats model and framework as joint variables.

AI.tldr: 提出了CLAWSAFETY基准，评估个人AI agent在高权限专业工作环境中的提示注入风险，测试了5个前沿LLM和3个agent框架，发现攻击成功率高达40-75%，安全取决于整个部署栈而非仅模型本身
AI.motivation: 个人AI agent在用户本地机器上以提升权限运行，单次提示注入就能泄露凭证、重定向金融交易或破坏文件，现有安全评估不足，大多数在隔离聊天环境中测试、依赖合成环境、未考虑agent框架本身如何影响安全结果
AI.method: 创建了CLAWSAFETY基准，包含120个对抗性测试场景，跨越三个维度（危害领域、攻击向量、有害动作类型），在五个前沿LLM上运行2,520个沙盒试验，跨三个agent框架进行实验
AI.result: 攻击成功率（ASR）在模型间从40%到75%不等，注入向量差异显著，技能指令（最高信任）比邮件或网页内容更危险；最强模型对凭证转发和破坏性动作保持硬边界，而较弱模型两者都允许；安全不仅取决于骨干模型，还取决于整个部署堆栈
AI.conclusion: 攻击成功率在40%到75%之间，技能指令（最高信任）比邮件或网页内容更危险，最强模型对凭证转发和破坏性动作保持硬边界，但较弱模型允许两者，安全取决于整个部署堆栈而非仅骨干模型

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI safety and prompt injection attacks on LLM agents, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different - this addresses LLM security vulnerabilities, not motion generation, video generation, or any computer graphics task. There is no match in field, application domain, methods, or pain points.

title: When AI Gets it Wong: Reliability and Risk in AI-Assisted Medication Decision Systems
comment: 9 pages, 1 figure. Position paper with simulated experimental analysis of AI reliability in medication decision systems
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) systems are increasingly integrated into healthcare and pharmacy workflows, supporting tasks such as medication recommendations, dosage determination, and drug interaction detection. While these systems often demonstrate strong performance under standard evaluation metrics, their reliability in real-world decision-making remains insufficiently understood. In high-risk domains such as medication management, even a single incorrect recommendation can result in severe patient harm. This paper examines the reliability of AI-assisted medication systems by focusing on system failures and their potential clinical consequences. Rather than evaluating performance solely through aggregate metrics, this work shifts attention towards how errors occur and what happens when AI systems produce incorrect outputs. Through a series of controlled, simulated scenarios involving drug interactions and dosage decisions, we analyse different types of system failures, including missed interactions, incorrect risk flagging, and inappropriate dosage recommendations. The findings highlight that AI errors in medication-related contexts can lead to adverse drug reactions, ineffective treatment, or delayed care, particularly when systems are used without sufficient human oversight. Furthermore, the paper discusses the risks of over-reliance on AI recommendations and the challenges posed by limited transparency in decision-making processes. This work contributes a reliability-focused perspective on AI evaluation in healthcare, emphasising the importance of understanding failure behavior and real-world impact. It highlights the need to complement traditional performance metrics with risk-aware evaluation approaches, particularly in safety-critical domains such as pharmacy practice.

AI.tldr: 本研究从可靠性角度评估医疗AI系统，通过模拟场景分析AI辅助药物系统中的错误类型及其潜在临床后果。研究发现AI错误可能导致严重患者伤害，强调需要在安全关键领域采用风险感知评估方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI系统在标准评估指标下表现良好，但其在真实世界决策中的可靠性仍不为人知。在药物管理等高风险领域，即使是单个错误的推荐也可能导致严重的患者伤害。
AI.method: 通过受控的模拟场景分析系统_failure行为，包括药物相互作用和剂量决策场景，系统性地分析不同类型的系统_failure：遗漏的相互作用、错误的风险标记和不适当的剂量推荐。
AI.result: AI在药物相关场景中的错误可能导致药物不良反应、治疗无效或延误护理，尤其是在系统缺乏足够的人类监督时使用。此外，过度依赖AI推荐和决策过程透明度有限也是重要风险。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调了在药学实践等安全关键领域，需要采用风险感知的评估方法，将传统的性能指标与_failure behavior理解相结合。研究呼吁从单纯关注准确率转向关注系统可靠性，特别是人机协作中的监督机制。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical AI systems for medication decision-making (healthcare domain), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different - it addresses AI reliability in clinical settings, not visual-to-motion translation, temporal consistency, or quality control in motion generation. There is no method overlap either - this paper analyzes medical decision system failures rather than video generation or 3D motion generation models.

title: AffordTissue: Dense Affordance Prediction for Tool-Action Specific Tissue Interaction
summary: Surgical action automation has progressed rapidly toward achieving surgeon-like dexterous control, driven primarily by advances in learning from demonstration and vision-language-action models. While these have demonstrated success in table-top experiments, translating them to clinical deployment remains challenging: current methods offer limited predictability on where instruments will interact on tissue surfaces and lack explicit conditioning inputs to enforce tool-action-specific safe interaction regions. Addressing this gap, we introduce AffordTissue, a multimodal framework for predicting tool-action specific tissue affordance regions as dense heatmaps during cholecystectomy. Our approach combines a temporal vision encoder capturing tool motion and tissue dynamics across multiple viewpoints, language conditioning enabling generalization across diverse instrument-action pairs, and a DiT-style decoder for dense affordance prediction. We establish the first tissue affordance benchmark by curating and annotating 15,638 video clips across 103 cholecystectomy procedures, covering six unique tool-action pairs involving four instruments (hook, grasper, scissors, clipper) and their associated tasks: dissection, grasping, clipping, and cutting. Experiments demonstrate substantial improvement over vision-language model baselines (20.6 px ASSD vs. 60.2 px for Molmo-VLM), showing that our task-specific architecture outperforms large-scale foundation models for dense surgical affordance prediction. By predicting tool-action specific tissue affordance regions, AffordTissue provides explicit spatial reasoning for safe surgical automation, potentially unlocking explicit policy guidance toward appropriate tissue regions and early safe stop when instruments deviate outside predicted safe zones.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AffordTissue，一个多模态框架，用于在胆囊切除术中预测特定器械-动作的组织_affordance区域（以密集热图形式），通过结合时间视觉编码器、语言条件和DiT解码器，在自建数据集上实现优于大型基础模型的性能，为安全手术自动化提供显式空间推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在将手术动作自动化转化为临床部署时面临挑战：当前方法对器械在组织表面交互位置的预测能力有限，且缺乏显式的条件化输入来强制执行特定器械-动作的安全交互区域。
AI.method: 结合时间视觉编码器（捕获多视角下的器械运动和组织动态）、语言条件化（实现跨不同器械-动作对的泛化）、以及DiT风格解码器（用于密集_affordance预测）。建立首个组织_affordance基准数据集，包含15,638个视频片段，涵盖103台胆囊切除手术中的6种独特器械-动作对。
AI.result: 在组织_affordance预测任务上显著优于视觉语言模型基线，相比Molmo-VLM的60.2像素ASSD，AffordTissue达到20.6像素ASSD，性能提升约3倍。
AI.conclusion: AffordTissue提供明确的手术空间推理能力，可用于安全手术自动化的策略指导，实现对适当组织区域的显式策略引导，以及在器械偏离预测安全区域时的早期安全停止。

relevance_reason: This paper is about surgical tool-tissue affordance prediction in gallbladder surgery (medical domain), not 3D human motion generation in computer graphics. While it uses DiT (diffusion) similar to some motion generation methods, the application domain is completely different - it's surgical robotics/medical AI, not human motion synthesis. The paper addresses tool-tissue interaction in medical procedures, which has no relevance to the research profile's focus on generating 3D human motion from 2D videos.

title: A Multi-Agent Human-LLM Collaborative Framework for Closed-Loop Scientific Literature Summarization
summary: Scientific discovery is slowed by fragmented literature that requires excessive human effort to gather, analyze, and understand. AI tools, including autonomous summarization and question answering, have been developed to aid in understanding scientific literature. However, these tools lack the structured, multi-step approach necessary for extracting deep insights from scientific literature. Large Language Models (LLMs) offer new possibilities for literature analysis, but remain unreliable due to hallucinations and incomplete extraction. We introduce Elhuyar, a multi-agent, human-in-the-loop system that integrates LLMs, structured AI, and human scientists to extract, analyze, and iteratively refine insights from scientific literature. The framework distributes tasks among specialized agents for filtering papers, extracting data, fitting models, and summarizing findings, with human oversight ensuring reliability. The system generates structured reports with extracted data, visualizations, model equations, and text summaries, enabling deeper inquiry through iterative refinement. Deployed in materials science, it analyzed literature on tungsten under helium-ion irradiation, showing experimentally correlated exponential helium bubble growth with irradiation dose and temperature, offering insight for plasma-facing materials (PFMs) in fusion reactors. This demonstrates how AI-assisted literature review can uncover scientific patterns and accelerate discovery.

AI.tldr: Elhuyar是一个多智能体人机协作系统，利用LLM和结构化AI从科学文献中提取和分析见解，通过专门智能体分工和人类监督确保可靠性，在材料科学钨辐照研究中成功发现氦气泡生长规律。
AI.motivation: 科学发现因文献分散而受阻，需要过多人力来收集、分析和理解。现有的AI工具缺乏从科学文献中提取深层见解所需的结构化多步骤方法，而大型语言模型存在幻觉和不完整提取的可靠性问题。
AI.method: 该框架将任务分配给专门的智能体（过滤论文、提取数据、拟合模型、总结发现），通过人类监督确保可靠性。系统生成结构化报告，包含提取的数据、可视化、模型方程和文本摘要，支持迭代优化。
AI.result: 在材料科学领域的部署中，该系统分析了钨在氦离子辐照下的文献，发现了氦气泡生长与辐照剂量和温度之间存在实验相关的指数关系，为聚变反应堆中等离子体面材料提供了见解。
AI.conclusion: Elhuyar是一个将大型语言模型、结构化AI与人类科学家相结合的多智能体人机协作系统，能够从科学文献中提取、分析并迭代优化见解。在材料科学领域的部署表明，该系统能够发现科学模式并加速发现过程，为聚变反应堆中等离子体面材料的研究提供了有价值的见解。

relevance_reason: The paper is about multi-agent LLM systems for scientific literature summarization in materials science (tungsten irradiation research). This is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely different: the research profile focuses on visual-to-motion translation, video-based motion generation, and quality control for generated motion content, while this paper deals with LLM-based text analysis and scientific discovery from literature. There is no overlap in methods (LLMs for text vs VLMs for video/motion) or application domains (3D motion generation vs scientific literature analysis).

title: GRAZE: Grounded Refinement and Motion-Aware Zero-Shot Event Localization
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures, accepted to the CVPR 2026 Workshop on Computer Vision in Sports (CVSports) code: https://github.com/AhsanZaidi12/GRAZE
summary: American football practice generates video at scale, yet the interaction of interest occupies only a brief window of each long, untrimmed clip. Reliable biomechanical analysis, therefore, depends on spatiotemporal localization that identifies both the interacting entities and the onset of contact. We study First Point of Contact (FPOC), defined as the first frame in which a player physically touches a tackle dummy, in unconstrained practice footage with camera motion, clutter, multiple similarly equipped athletes, and rapid pose changes around impact. We present GRAZE, a training-free pipeline for FPOC localization that requires no labeled tackle-contact examples. GRAZE uses Grounding DINO to discover candidate player-dummy interactions, refines them with motion-aware temporal reasoning, and uses SAM2 as an explicit pixel-level verifier of contact rather than relying on detection confidence alone. This separation between candidate discovery and contact confirmation makes the approach robust to cluttered scenes and unstable grounding near impact. On 738 tackle-practice videos, GRAZE produces valid outputs for 97.4% of clips and localizes FPOC within $\pm$ 10 frames on 77.5% of all clips and within $\pm$ 20 frames on 82.7% of all clips. These results show that frame-accurate contact onset localization in real-world practice footage is feasible without task-specific training.

AI.tldr: 本文研究美式足球训练视频中首次接触点(FPOC)的定位问题。提出了GRAZE管道，无需标注数据即可实现训练自由的接触定位。该方法结合Grounding DINO发现候选交互、时序推理细化、SAM2像素级验证，在738个训练视频上取得97.4%有效输出率，±10帧准确率达77.5%，±20帧准确率达82.7%。
AI.motivation: 美式足球训练视频规模大，但实际交互发生在长视频的短暂窗口内。可靠的生物力学分析依赖时空定位，需要同时识别交互实体和接触发起时刻。然而实际视频存在相机运动、场景杂乱、多名穿戴相似的运动员以及撞击周围姿态快速变化等问题。
AI.method: 提出GRAZE训练-free管道，包含三个阶段：(1)使用Grounding DINO发现候选球员-假人交互；(2)结合运动感知时序推理细化候选；(3)使用SAM2作为像素级接触验证器而非仅依赖检测置信度。候选发现与接触确认的分离使方法对杂乱场景和撞击附近不稳定 grounding 具有鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在738个 tackle 练习视频上实验，GRAZE 产生 97.4% 有效输出，在所有视频中 77.5% FPOC 定位在 ±10 帧内，82.7% 在 ±20 帧内。
AI.conclusion: 无需任务特定训练即可实现真实训练 footage 中帧级精确的接触发起定位，证明训练-free方法在复杂体育场景视频分析中的可行性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about American football training video analysis for localizing contact points (FPOC), NOT about 3D human motion generation. While it shares some general topics like motion understanding and temporal reasoning, the application domain is completely different - it's sports video analytics for biomechanical analysis, not computer graphics motion generation. The methods (Grounding DINO, SAM2) are for object detection and segmentation in videos, not for generating 3D human motion from videos. The pain points being addressed (domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion, visual-to-motion translation) are unrelated to this paper's goal of locating contact events in football videos.

title: Infeasibility Aware Large Language Models for Combinatorial Optimization
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly explored for NP-hard combinatorial optimization problems, but most existing methods emphasize feasible-instance solution generation and do not explicitly address infeasibility detection. We propose an infeasibility-aware framework that combines certifiable dataset construction, supervised fine-tuning, and LLM-assisted downstream search. For the minor-embedding problem, we introduce a new mathematical programming formulation together with provable zero-phase infeasibility screening, which enables scalable construction of training instances labeled either as feasible with structured certificates or as certifiably infeasible. Using training data generated through this exact optimization pipeline, we show that an 8B-parameter LLM can be fine-tuned to jointly perform solution generation and infeasibility detection. We further utilize LLM outputs as warm starts for downstream local search, providing a practical way to accelerate optimization even when the LLM outputs are imperfect. Experiments show that our fine-tuned model improves overall accuracy by up to 30\% over GPT-5.2; meanwhile LLM-guided warm starts provide up to $2\times$ speedup compared with starting from scratch in downstream local search.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于NP-hard组合优化问题的不可行性感知框架，通过可证明的不可行性筛选构建带标签训练数据，微调LLM使其能够同时进行可行解生成和不可行性检测，并利用LLM输出作为下游搜索的warm starts来加速优化。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM应用于NP-hard组合优化问题的方法大多只关注可行解的生成，缺乏对不可行性检测的显式处理能力，而不可行性检测在实际优化问题中具有重要意义。
AI.method: 本文提出了三个核心方法：(1) 引入minor-embedding问题的数学规划 formulation，建立zero-phase不可行性筛选机制，实现可扩展的带标签训练数据构建；(2) 使用精确优化管道生成的训练数据，对8B参数LLM进行监督微调，使其能够联合执行solution generation和infeasibility detection；(3) 将LLM输出作为下游局部搜索的warm starts，加速优化过程。
AI.result: 实验表明：(1) 微调后的模型在整体准确率上比GPT-5.2提高了最多30%；(2) 使用LLM作为warm starts的局部搜索相比从零开始能够实现最多2倍的加速。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的不可行性感知框架能够有效结合LLM和传统优化方法，通过微调8B参数模型实现了 solution generation 和 infeasibility detection 的联合训练，同时利用LLM输出作为warm starts加速下游局部搜索，为NP-hard组合优化问题提供了一种实用且有效的解决思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about combinatorial optimization and LLM-based solving of NP-hard problems (operations research). It has NO relevance to Computer Graphics or 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains are completely different - this is optimization theory, not visual-to-motion translation or computer graphics.

title: LESV: Language Embedded Sparse Voxel Fusion for Open-Vocabulary 3D Scene Understanding
summary: Recent advancements in open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding heavily rely on 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) to register vision-language features into 3D space. However, we identify two critical limitations in these approaches: the spatial ambiguity arising from unstructured, overlapping Gaussians which necessitates probabilistic feature registration, and the multi-level semantic ambiguity caused by pooling features over object-level masks, which dilutes fine-grained details. To address these challenges, we present a novel framework that leverages Sparse Voxel Rasterization (SVRaster) as a structured, disjoint geometry representation. By regularizing SVRaster with monocular depth and normal priors, we establish a stable geometric foundation. This enables a deterministic, confidence-aware feature registration process and suppresses the semantic bleeding artifact common in 3DGS. Furthermore, we resolve multi-level ambiguity by exploiting the emerging dense alignment properties of foundation model AM-RADIO, avoiding the computational overhead of hierarchical training methods. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on Open Vocabulary 3D Object Retrieval and Point Cloud Understanding benchmarks, particularly excelling on fine-grained queries where registration methods typically fail.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的开放词汇3D场景理解框架，利用稀疏体素光栅化(SVRaster)作为结构化几何表示，通过单目深度和法线先验正则化，结合AM-RADIO模型的密集对齐特性，解决了3D高斯溅射方法中的空间模糊性和多层次语义模糊性问题。
AI.motivation: 当前开放词汇3D场景理解方法存在两个关键限制：1) 由非结构化、重叠的高斯函数引起的空间模糊性，需要概率特征注册；2) 由对象级掩码池化特征引起的多层次语义模糊性，稀释了细粒度细节。
AI.method: 提出了一种利用稀疏体素光栅化(SVRaster)作为结构化、分离的几何表示的新框架。通过单目深度和法线先验对SVRaster进行正则化，建立稳定的几何基础，实现确定性、置信度感知的特征注册过程。并利用AM-RADIO基础模型的密集对齐特性来解决多层次语义模糊问题。
AI.result: 在开放词汇3D对象检索和点云理解基准测试中取得最先进性能，特别是在细粒度查询任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在开放词汇3D对象检索和点云理解基准测试上实现了最先进的性能，特别是在通常注册方法失败的细粒度查询方面表现出色。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D SCENE UNDERSTANDING (open-vocabulary object retrieval, point cloud understanding), NOT 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains are completely different - this deals with recognizing and understanding objects in 3D scenes, while the research profile is about generating human motion animations from 2D videos. The methods (sparse voxel rasterization, 3D Gaussian splatting) are also unrelated to the specified methods (video generation models, VLMs for quality supervision, motion generation models). This paper does not address any of the pain points: domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion, temporal consistency, quality control, or visual feature extraction for motion generation.

title: Reducing Hallucinations in LLM-based Scientific Literature Analysis Using Peer Context Outlier Detection
summary: Reducing hallucinations in Large Language Models (LLMs) is essential for improving the accuracy of data extraction from large text corpora. Current methods, like prompt engineering and chain-of-thought prompting, focus on individual documents but fail to consider relationships across a corpus. This paper introduces Peer Context Outlier Detection (P-COD), a novel approach that uses the relationships between documents to improve extraction accuracy. Our application domain is in scientific literature summarization, where papers with similar experiment settings should draw similar conclusions. By comparing extracted data to validated peer information within the corpus, we adjust confidence scores and flag low-confidence results for expert review. High-confidence results, supported by peer validation, are considered reliable. Our experiments demonstrate up to 98% precision in outlier detection across 6 domains of science, demonstrating that our design reduces hallucinations, enhances trust in automated systems, and allows researchers to focus on ambiguous cases, streamlining the data extraction workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Peer Context Outlier Detection (P-COD)方法，通过利用文档间的关联关系来减少大型语言模型在数据提取中的幻觉问题，特别应用于科学文献摘要领域。
AI.motivation: 当前方法如提示工程和思维链提示仅关注单个文档，未考虑语料库中文档间的关系。在科学文献中，具有相似实验设置的论文应得出相似结论，因此跨文档的关联验证可提高提取准确性。
AI.method: 将提取的数据与语料库中已验证的同伴信息进行比较，调整置信度分数并标记低置信度结果供专家审查。高置信度结果若得到同伴验证则被视为可靠。
AI.result: 在6个科学领域的实验中，异常检测精度达到最高98%，证明了该设计能有效减少幻觉、增强自动化系统的可信度，并让研究人员专注于模糊案例。
AI.conclusion: P-COD方法通过跨文档的同伴验证机制显著降低了LLM的幻觉问题，提高了数据提取的准确性，简化了科研人员的数据提取工作流程。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM hallucination reduction in scientific literature analysis using Peer Context Outlier Detection (P-COD). This is entirely in the NLP/LLM domain, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is fundamentally different - it deals with scientific text extraction, not video-to-motion translation, temporal consistency, or any of the specified methods like VLM supervision, video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), or 3D motion generation. The only loose connection is that it mentions "confidence scoring" for quality control, but this is for text extraction accuracy, not video/motion quality control.

title: EgoFlow: Gradient-Guided Flow Matching for Egocentric 6DoF Object Motion Generation
summary: Understanding and predicting object motion from egocentric video is fundamental to embodied perception and interaction. However, generating physically consistent 6DoF trajectories remains challenging due to occlusions, fast motion, and the lack of explicit physical reasoning in existing generative models. We present EgoFlow, a flow-matching framework that synthesizes realistic and physically plausible trajectories conditioned on multimodal egocentric observations. EgoFlow employs a hybrid Mamba-Transformer-Perceiver architecture to jointly model temporal dynamics, scene geometry, and semantic intent, while a gradient-guided inference process enforces differentiable physical constraints such as collision avoidance and motion smoothness. This combination yields coherent and controllable motion generation without post-hoc filtering or additional supervision. Experiments on real-world datasets HD-EPIC, EgoExo4D, and HOT3D show that EgoFlow outperforms diffusion-based and transformer baselines in accuracy, generalization, and physical realism, reducing collision rates by up to 79%, and strong generalization to unseen scenes. Our results highlight the promise of flow-based generative modeling for scalable and physically grounded egocentric motion understanding.

AI.tldr: EgoFlow是一个基于流匹配（flow-matching）的框架，用于从自我中心视频生成物理一致6DoF物体轨迹。该方法结合Mamba-Transformer-Perceiver混合架构和梯度引导推理，在真实世界数据集上实现了优于扩散模型和Transformer基线的性能，碰撞率降低高达79%。
AI.motivation: 理解和预测自我中心视频中的物体运动是具身感知和交互的基础，但现有生成模型面临三大挑战：1）遮挡导致信息缺失；2）快速运动难以跟踪；3）缺乏显式物理推理导致生成轨迹物理不一致。因此需要一种能生成物理可信轨迹的方法。
AI.method: 提出EgoFlow流匹配框架，包含：1）混合Mamba-Transformer-Perceiver架构联合建模时序动态、场景几何和语义意图；2）梯度引导推理过程强制执行可微物理约束（碰撞避免、运动平滑）；3）无需后处理过滤或额外监督即可产生连贯可控的运动生成。
AI.result: 在HD-EPIC、EgoExo4D、HOT3D三个真实世界数据集上，EgoFlow在准确性、泛化性和物理真实性方面优于扩散模型和Transformer基线，碰撞率降低最高达79%，对未见场景具有强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 流式生成建模为可扩展且物理基础的自我中心运动理解提供了有前景的路径，EgoFlow成功将流匹配范式应用于多模态自我中心观测下的物体轨迹生成。

relevance_reason: While this paper addresses visual-to-motion translation and uses flow matching (related to diffusion), it generates 6DoF OBJECT motion trajectories from egocentric videos - NOT human motion. The application domain is fundamentally different: embodied AI/robotics perception (object motion for robotic interaction) vs Computer Graphics 3D human motion generation. Additionally, the paper doesn't use the specific methods mentioned (VLM, video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance). This is essentially a robotics/perception paper about predicting object trajectories for manipulation tasks, not a computer graphics human motion generation paper.

title: Nonlinear Methods for Analyzing Pose in Behavioral Research
summary: Advances in markerless pose estimation have made it possible to capture detailed human movement in naturalistic settings using standard video, enabling new forms of behavioral analysis at scale. However, the high dimensionality, noise, and temporal complexity of pose data raise significant challenges for extracting meaningful patterns of coordination and behavioral change. This paper presents a general-purpose analysis pipeline for human pose data, designed to support both linear and nonlinear characterizations of movement across diverse experimental contexts. The pipeline combines principled preprocessing, dimensionality reduction, and recurrence-based time series analysis to quantify the temporal structure of movement dynamics. To illustrate the pipeline's flexibility, we present three case studies spanning facial and full-body movement, 2D and 3D data, and individual versus multi-agent behavior. Together, these examples demonstrate how the same analytic workflow can be adapted to extract theoretically meaningful insights from complex pose time series.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于人类姿态数据的通用分析管道，结合预处理、降维和递归时间序列分析，支持线性和非线性运动表征，通过三个案例展示了其在不同场景下的适应性。
AI.motivation: 无标记姿态估计技术的进步使得从标准视频中捕获人类运动成为可能，但姿态数据的高维度、噪声和时间复杂性给提取有意义的协调模式和行为变化带来了挑战。
AI.method: 结合原则性预处理、降维和基于递归的时间序列分析来量化运动动力学的时间结构。
AI.result: 三个案例研究涵盖了面部和全身运动、2D和3D数据以及个体与多智能体行为，展示了该管道的灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 该分析流程可通过同一工作流适应不同实验环境，从复杂的姿态时间序列中提取理论上有意义的见解。

relevance_reason: This paper is about analyzing human pose data for behavioral research, not about generating 3D human motion. The application domain is fundamentally different: analysis vs generation. The paper doesn't address any of the specified pain points (domain gap, temporal consistency in visual-to-motion translation, quality control, visual feature extraction). It uses traditional methods like dimensionality reduction and time series analysis, not the specified methods (VLM, video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance, or 3D motion generation models). This is a data analysis paper for behavioral science, not a computer graphics/motion generation paper.

title: UniRecGen: Unifying Multi-View 3D Reconstruction and Generation
summary: Sparse-view 3D modeling represents a fundamental tension between reconstruction fidelity and generative plausibility. While feed-forward reconstruction excels in efficiency and input alignment, it often lacks the global priors needed for structural completeness. Conversely, diffusion-based generation provides rich geometric details but struggles with multi-view consistency. We present UniRecGen, a unified framework that integrates these two paradigms into a single cooperative system. To overcome inherent conflicts in coordinate spaces, 3D representations, and training objectives, we align both models within a shared canonical space. We employ disentangled cooperative learning, which maintains stable training while enabling seamless collaboration during inference. Specifically, the reconstruction module is adapted to provide canonical geometric anchors, while the diffusion generator leverages latent-augmented conditioning to refine and complete the geometric structure. Experimental results demonstrate that UniRecGen achieves superior fidelity and robustness, outperforming existing methods in creating complete and consistent 3D models from sparse observations.

AI.tldr: 提出UniRecGen统一框架，将前馈重建与扩散生成相结合，用于稀疏视图3D建模。
AI.motivation: 稀疏视图3D建模中存在重建保真度与生成合理性之间的基本张力：前馈重建虽高效且对齐良好，但缺乏全局先验；扩散生成提供丰富几何细节但难以保持多视图一致性。
AI.method: 将两种模型在共享规范空间中对齐，采用解耦协作学习：重建模块提供规范几何锚点，扩散生成器利用潜在增强条件化来完善和完成几何结构。
AI.result: UniRecGen实现卓越的保真度和鲁棒性，在从不完整观察创建完整一致3D模型方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: UniRecGen成功整合重建与生成范式，通过规范空间对齐和协作学习克服了坐标空间、3D表示和训练目标之间的冲突，为稀疏视图3D建模提供了新的解决方案。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 3D object reconstruction and generation from sparse views (general 3D modeling), while the research profile is specifically about 3D HUMAN MOTION GENERATION from 2D videos. These are completely different application domains. The paper addresses general 3D geometry reconstruction, not human motion generation which requires understanding human pose, anatomy, and temporal dynamics. The pain points in the profile (domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion, temporal consistency in visual-to-motion translation) are not addressed by this paper which focuses on multi-view 3D reconstruction.

title: RAE-AR: Taming Autoregressive Models with Representation Autoencoders
summary: The latent space of generative modeling is long dominated by the VAE encoder. The latents from the pretrained representation encoders (e.g., DINO, SigLIP, MAE) are previously considered inappropriate for generative modeling. Recently, RAE method lights the hope and reveals that the representation autoencoder can also achieve competitive performance as the VAE encoder. However, the integration of representation autoencoder into continuous autoregressive (AR) models, remains largely unexplored. In this work, we investigate the challenges of employing high-dimensional representation autoencoders within the AR paradigm, denoted as \textit{RAE-AR}. We focus on the unique properties of AR models and identify two primary hurdles: complex token-wise distribution modeling and the high-dimensionality amplified training-inference gap (exposure bias). To address these, we introduce token simplification via distribution normalization to ease modeling difficulty and improve convergence. Furthermore, we enhance prediction robustness by incorporating Gaussian noise injection during training to mitigate exposure bias. Our empirical results demonstrate that these modifications substantially bridge the performance gap, enabling representation autoencoder to achieve results comparable to traditional VAEs on AR models. This work paves the way for a more unified architecture across visual understanding and generative modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了将表征自编码器(RAE)集成到连续自回归(AR)模型中的挑战与解决方案。通过分布归一化和高斯噪声注入技术，显著缩小了与VAE的性能差距，为视觉理解和生成建模的统一架构奠定了基础。
AI.motivation: 生成模型的潜在空间长期以来由VAE编码器主导，尽管DINO、SigLIP、MAE等预训练表征编码器已展现出强大的视觉理解能力，但其高维特性被认为不适合生成建模。RAE方法证明了表征自编码器也可实现与VAE相当的性能，然而将其集成到连续自回归模型中仍缺乏探索。
AI.method: 提出了两种关键技术：1) 通过分布归一化进行token简化，以降低建模难度并改善收敛；2) 在训练过程中注入高斯噪声以增强预测鲁棒性，缓解曝光偏差问题。
AI.result: 实验表明这些修改显著缩小了性能差距，使表征自编码器在自回归模型上实现了与传统VAE相当的结果。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为视觉理解与生成建模的统一架构开辟了新途径，证明表征自编码器可有效替代传统VAE编码器用于自回归生成任务。

relevance_reason: This paper is about visual generation (images/videos) using autoregressive models with representation autoencoders, NOT about 3D human motion generation. While it discusses autoregressive models and representation learning, the application domain is completely different - it's focused on visual understanding and image/video generation, not 3D human motion. The pain points and methods mentioned (visual quality control, video generation) relate to image/video generation, not the specific challenges of 2D video to 3D motion translation or temporal consistency in motion generation.

title: Universal computational thermal imaging overcoming the ghosting effect
summary: Thermal imaging is crucial for night vision but fundamentally hampered by the ghosting effect, a loss of detailed texture in cluttered photon streams. While conventional ghosting mitigation has relied on data post-processing, the recent breakthrough in heat-assisted detection and ranging (HADAR) opens a promising frontier for hyperspectral computational thermal imaging that produces night vision with day-like visibility. However, universal anti-ghosting imaging remains elusive, as state-of-the-art HADAR applies only to limited scenes with uniform materials, whereas material non-uniformity is ubiquitous in the real world. Here, we propose a universal computational thermal imaging framework, TAG (thermal anti-ghosting), to address material non-uniformity and overcome ghosting for high-fidelity night vision. TAG takes hyperspectral photon streams for nonparametric texture recovery, enabling our experimental demonstration of unprecedented expression recovery in thus-far-elusive ghostly human faces -- the archetypal, long-recognized ghosting phenomenon. Strikingly, TAG not only universally outperforms HADAR across various scenes, but also reveals the influence of material non-uniformity, shedding light on HADAR's effectiveness boundary. We extensively test facial texture and expression recovery across day and night, and demonstrate, for the first time, thermal 3D topological alignment and mood detection. This work establishes a universal foundation for high-fidelity computational night vision, with potential applications in autonomous navigation, reconnaissance, healthcare, and wildlife monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TAG（热反重影）框架，解决热成像中的重影效应问题，实现高保真夜视。TAG利用超光谱光子流进行非参数纹理恢复，首次在人类面部实现表情恢复，突破HADAR只能在均匀材料场景中使用的限制。
AI.motivation: 热成像对夜视至关重要，但受重影效应影响导致纹理细节丢失。虽然HADAR（热辅助检测和测距）实现了类似日见的夜视，但仅适用于均匀材料场景，而现实世界材料非均匀性普遍存在，限制了通用抗重影成像的发展。
AI.method: 提出TAG（热反重影）通用计算热成像框架，利用超光谱光子流进行非参数纹理恢复，在保持热辐射自然属性的同时恢复详细纹理，实现材料非均匀性条件下的高保真夜视。
AI.result: TAG首次实现此前不可能的幽灵般人脸表情恢复，在各种场景中普遍优于HADAR，揭示了材料非_uniformity对HADAR有效性的影响边界，并首次实现热3D拓扑对齐和情绪检测。
AI.conclusion: TAG建立高保真计算夜视的通用基础，突破材料非均匀性限制，在自动驾驶、侦察、医疗保健和野生动物监测等领域具有广泛应用前景。

relevance_reason: This paper is about thermal imaging and computational photography (solving ghosting effect in thermal imaging for night vision), not Computer Graphics - 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is completely different: thermal imaging for facial expression recovery vs 3D human motion generation from videos. The methods (hyperspectral photon flow, non-parametric texture recovery) are unrelated to the profile's methods (VLM, video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance, 3D motion generation models). This paper does not address any of the pain points related to domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion, temporal consistency, or quality control in motion generation.

title: Does Your Optimizer Care How You Normalize? Normalization-Optimizer Coupling in LLM Training
summary: In LLM training, normalization layers and optimizers are typically treated as independent design choices.
