In a 3x2 factorial at 1B parameters and 1000 training steps, we show this assumption can fail: Dynamic Erf (Derf; Chen & Liu, 2025) suffers a large negative interaction with Muon (Jordan, 2024), with its gap to RMSNorm growing from +0.31 nats under AdamW to +0.97 under Muon, approximately three times larger. Dynamic Tanh (DyT; Zhu et al., 2025), included as a bounded-normalizer control, shows no such penalty. Our evidence points to two failure modes of erf under Muon's faster spectral-norm growth: saturation (lossy compression) and scale blindness (discarding activation magnitude). An EMA-blend that reintroduces running scale estimates recovers ~84% of the gap. Separately, reducing Derf's alpha from its published default (0.5 to 0.3) recovers ~80% by keeping erf in its near-linear regime, where it approximately preserves relative scale; this setting is not the published default of Chen & Liu (2025). Using Derf's published default alpha with Muon incurs a 0.66-nat interaction penalty without producing NaNs or divergence, making the failure easy to miss in short pilot runs.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LLM训练中归一化层(Derf)与优化器(Muon)之间的负交互作用，发现使用Muon优化器时Derf相比RMSNorm的性能差距从0.31nats增加到0.97nats（扩大约3倍），而DyT未出现此问题。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM训练中归一化层和优化器通常被视为独立设计选择，本研究旨在通过3×2因子实验验证这一假设是否成立。
AI.method: 在1B参数、1000训练步的条件下进行3×2因子实验，测试Derf、DyT与AdamW、Muon优化器的组合；分析Derf在Muon下的失效模式（饱和和尺度盲区）；提出EMA-blend和降低alpha两种修复方案。
AI.result: Derf与Muon存在显著负交互：Muon下差距扩大至0.97nats（约3倍）；DyT无此惩罚。失效源于erf的饱和（有损压缩）和尺度盲区（丢弃激活幅度）。EMA-blend恢复约84%差距；将alpha从0.5降至0.3恢复约80%（保持erf近线性域）。
AI.conclusion: 归一化层与优化器存在显著交互效应不可忽视；EMA-blend和降低alpha可有效缓解Derf+Muon的负交互；使用默认alpha会产生0.66-nat交互惩罚但不易在短训练中察觉。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM training optimization, specifically studying normalization layers (Derf, RMSNorm) and optimizers (AdamW, Muon). It has no connection to Computer Graphics or 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is completely different - this is NLP/ML research about language model training, not video-to-motion translation, visual feature extraction, or any computer graphics domain. Even though the research profile mentions "Visual Language Models," this paper is about optimizing LLM training mechanics, not using VLMs for quality supervision in motion generation.

title: Prototype-Based Low Altitude UAV Semantic Segmentation
summary: Semantic segmentation of low-altitude UAV imagery presents unique challenges due to extreme scale variations, complex object boundaries, and limited computational resources on edge devices. Existing transformer-based segmentation methods achieve remarkable performance but incur high computational overhead, while lightweight approaches struggle to capture fine-grained details in high-resolution aerial scenes. To address these limitations, we propose PBSeg, an efficient prototype-based segmentation framework tailored for UAV applications. PBSeg introduces a novel prototype-based cross-attention (PBCA) that exploits feature redundancy to reduce computational complexity while maintaining segmentation quality. The framework incorporates an efficient multi-scale feature extraction module that combines deformable convolutions (DConv) with context-aware modulation (CAM) to capture both local details and global semantics. Experiments on two challenging UAV datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. PBSeg achieves 71.86\% mIoU on UAVid and 80.92\% mIoU on UDD6, establishing competitive performance while maintaining computational efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/zhangda1018/PBSeg.

AI.tldr: PBSeg是一种针对无人机应用的高效原型语义分割框架，通过原型-based跨注意力机制和结合可变形卷积与上下文感知调制的多尺度特征提取模块，在边缘设备上实现低计算开销的高精度分割。
AI.motivation: 无人机低空影像语义分割面临极端尺度变化、复杂对象边界和边缘设备计算资源有限等挑战。现有的基于Transformer的分割方法虽然性能优异但计算开销大，而轻量级方法难以捕捉高分辨率航拍场景中的细粒度细节。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于原型的分割框架PBSeg，包含两个核心模块：1) 原型-based跨注意力机制(PBCA)，利用特征冗余降低计算复杂度；2) 高效多尺度特征提取模块，结合可变形卷积(DConv)和上下文感知调制(CAM)来捕捉局部细节和全局语义。
AI.result: 在两个具有挑战性的无人机数据集上验证了方法的有效性。PBSeg在UAVid数据集上达到71.86% mIoU，在UDD6数据集上达到80.92% mIoU。
AI.conclusion: PBSeg在UAVid和UDD6数据集上实现了71.86%和80.92%的mIoU，在保持计算效率的同时建立了具有竞争力的性能。该方法为边缘设备上的实时无人机语义分割提供了有效的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about UAV (drone) semantic segmentation for aerial imagery, which is completely unrelated to 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely different - this is remote sensing/computer vision for drones, not human motion generation from video. The methods (prototype-based segmentation, deformable convolutions) are also specific to image segmentation tasks, not motion generation.

title: NED-Tree: Bridging the Semantic Gap with Nonlinear Element Decomposition Tree for LLM Nonlinear Optimization Modeling
summary: Automating the translation of Operations Research (OR) problems from natural language to executable models is a critical challenge. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise in linear tasks, they suffer from severe performance degradation in real-world nonlinear scenarios due to semantic misalignment between mathematical formulations and solver codes, as well as unstable information extraction. In this study, we introduce NED-Tree, a systematic framework designed to bridge the semantic gap. NED-Tree employs (a) a sentence-by-sentence extraction strategy to ensure robust parameter mapping and traceability; and (b) a recursive tree-based structure that adaptively decomposes complex nonlinear terms into solver-compatible sub-elements. Additionally, we present NEXTOR, a novel benchmark specifically designed for complex nonlinear, extensive-constraint OR problems. Experiments across 10 benchmarks demonstrate that NED-Tree establishes a new state-of-the-art with 72.51% average accuracy, NED-Tree is the first framework that drives LLMs to resolve nonlinear modeling difficulties through element decomposition, achieving alignment between modeling semantics and code semantics. The NED-Tree framework and benchmark are accessible in the anonymous repository https://anonymous.4open.science/r/NORA-NEXTOR.

AI.tldr: NED-Tree框架通过递归树结构将复杂非线性OR问题分解为求解器兼容的子元素，在NEXTOR基准上达到72.51%平均准确率，解决了LLM在非线性建模中的语义错列问题。
AI.motivation: 当前将运筹学(OR)问题从自然语言自动翻译为可执行模型面临关键挑战。虽然大型语言模型(LLM)在线性任务中表现出色，但在现实世界的非线性场景中性能严重下降，主要原因是数学公式与求解器代码之间的语义错位以及信息提取的不稳定性。
AI.method: NED-Tree采用两种核心策略：(a) 逐句提取策略，确保稳健的参数映射和可追溯性；(b) 递归树结构，自适应地将复杂非线性项分解为求解器兼容的子元素。
AI.result: 在10个基准测试上的实验表明，NED-Tree建立了新的最先进水平，达到72.51%的平均准确率。
AI.conclusion: NED-Tree是首个通过元素分解解决非线性建模难题的框架，实现了建模语义与代码语义的对齐。该框架和NEXTOR基准已在匿名仓库中开放访问。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Operations Research and LLM-based optimization modeling for solving nonlinear mathematical problems. It has NO relevance to 3D Human Motion Generation - completely different application domain. While both mention LLMs, this paper uses LLMs for optimization/solver problems, not for visual-to-motion translation, temporal consistency, or quality supervision in motion generation. The pain points addressed (semantic misalignment in OR) are entirely unrelated to the research profile's focus on bridging 2D video to 3D motion representations.

title: ThinkTwice: Jointly Optimizing Large Language Models for Reasoning and Self-Refinement
summary: We introduce ThinkTwice, a simple two-phase framework that jointly optimizes LLMs to solve reasoning problems and refine the answers, based on Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). In each pair of training steps, ThinkTwice first optimizes the model on solving reasoning problems, then optimizes it on refining its own solutions to the same problems, using the same binary correctness reward in both phases without correctness signals or critique annotations. Across five mathematical reasoning benchmarks and two model families including Qwen3-4B and Olmo3-7B, ThinkTwice substantially improves both reasoning and refinement performance over competitive online policy optimization baselines. Specifically, on Qwen3-4B, ThinkTwice outperforms GRPO on AIME by 5 percentage points before refinement and by 11.5 points after one self-refinement step, measured by pass@4. Analysis of the training dynamics of ThinkTwice reveals an implicit rectify-then-fortify curriculum: refinement predominantly corrects errors early in training and naturally shifts toward preserving already-correct solutions as the model improves, yielding a more rectified reward signal. Our work establishes joint training of reasoning and self-refinement as a principled and effective methodology for RLVR.

AI.tldr: ThinkTwice是一种基于GRPO的两阶段RLVR框架，联合优化LLM的推理能力和自我修正能力，无需正确性信号或批判注释即可在数学推理基准上显著超越基线方法。
AI.motivation: 当前RLVR方法未能联合优化推理能力和自我修正能力，需要一个统一框架来同时提升模型解决复杂推理问题的能力以及精炼自身答案的能力。
AI.method: 提出ThinkTwice两阶段框架，基于GRPO联合优化LLM的推理能力和自我修正能力。第一阶段优化模型解决推理问题，第二阶段优化模型对同一问题的解答进行精炼，两阶段均使用二元正确性奖励。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-4B上，ThinkTwice相比GRPO在AIME上提升5个百分点，经一次自我修正后提升11.5个百分点（pass@4指标）。训练动态分析显示存在隐式"先纠正后巩固"课程：早期训练主要纠正错误，后期自然转向保留正确答案。
AI.conclusion: 本研究确立了推理与自我修正联合训练作为RLVR的有效方法论。ThinkTwice通过两阶段框架证明了无需正确性信号或批判注释即可同时提升模型推理能力和答案精炼能力。

relevance_reason: 完全无关论文。该论文是关于LLM在数学推理任务中的训练优化（NLP/AI领域），而研究profile是计算机图形学-3D人体动作生成。应用领域完全不同：前者是自然语言处理，后者是3D动作生成。方法也完全不同：前者使用GRPO/RLVR优化LLM推理能力，后者涉及视频生成模型、3D动作生成模型、视觉特征提取等。该论文未涉及任何与2D视频到3D动作转换、视觉引导特征提取、动作生成质量控制相关的内容。

title: ReFlow: Self-correction Motion Learning for Dynamic Scene Reconstruction
summary: We present ReFlow, a unified framework for monocular dynamic scene reconstruction that learns 3D motion in a novel self-correction manner from raw video. Existing methods often suffer from incomplete scene initialization for dynamic regions, leading to unstable reconstruction and motion estimation, which often resorts to external dense motion guidance such as pre-computed optical flow to further stabilize and constrain the reconstruction of dynamic components. However, this introduces additional complexity and potential error propagation. To address these issues, ReFlow integrates a Complete Canonical Space Construction module for enhanced initialization of both static and dynamic regions, and a Separation-Based Dynamic Scene Modeling module that decouples static and dynamic components for targeted motion supervision. The core of ReFlow is a novel self-correction flow matching mechanism, consisting of Full Flow Matching to align 3D scene flow with time-varying 2D observations, and Camera Flow Matching to enforce multi-view consistency for static objects. Together, these modules enable robust and accurate dynamic scene reconstruction. Extensive experiments across diverse scenarios demonstrate that ReFlow achieves superior reconstruction quality and robustness, establishing a novel self-correction paradigm for monocular 4D reconstruction.

AI.tldr: ReFlow是一种用于单目动态场景重建的统一框架，通过自校正方式从原始视频中学习3D运动。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在动态区域场景初始化方面存在不完整问题，导致重建和运动估计不稳定，往往需要外部密集运动引导（如预计算光流）来进一步稳定动态组件的重建，但这增加了复杂性和潜在误差传播。
AI.method: ReFlow集成了完整规范空间构建模块（用于增强静态和动态区域的初始化）和基于分离的动态场景建模模块（用于解耦静态和动态组件以进行针对性运动监督）。核心是新型自校正流匹配机制，包含全流匹配（用于对齐3D场景流与时变2D观测）和相机流匹配（用于静态对象的多视图一致性强制）。
AI.result: 广泛的多场景实验表明，ReFlow实现了卓越的重建质量和鲁棒性，建立了单目4D重建的新型自校正范式。
AI.conclusion: ReFlow通过自校正流匹配机制有效解决了动态场景重建中初始化不完整的问题，无需外部光流引导即可实现稳健准确的动态场景重建。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses dynamic SCENE reconstruction (general 3D reconstruction of static and dynamic objects in scenes), not 3D human motion generation. While both involve extracting 3D information from 2D videos, the application domains are fundamentally different - scene reconstruction vs. human motion generation. The paper focuses on 4D reconstruction of general scenes with no mention of human motion, pose estimation, or character animation. This is a different field within computer graphics/3D vision that does not address the pain points related to 2D video to 3D human motion translation or the specific methods mentioned (human motion generation models, VLMs for motion quality supervision).

title: Do Large Language Models Mentalize When They Teach?
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures. Workshop paper at ICML 2026
summary: How do LLMs decide what to teach next: by reasoning about a learner's knowledge, or by using simpler rules of thumb? We test this in a controlled task previously used to study human teaching strategies. On each trial, a teacher LLM sees a hypothetical learner's trajectory through a reward-annotated directed graph and must reveal a single edge so the learner would choose a better path if they replanned. We run a range of LLMs as simulated teachers and fit their trial-by-trial choices with the same cognitive models used for humans: a Bayes-Optimal teacher that infers which transitions the learner is missing (inverse planning), weaker Bayesian variants, heuristic baselines (e.g., reward based), and non-mentalizing utility models. In a baseline experiment matched to the stimuli presented to human subjects, most LLMs perform well, show little change in strategy over trials, and their graph-by-graph performance is similar to that of humans. Model comparison (BIC) shows that Bayes-Optimal teaching best explains most models' choices. When given a scaffolding intervention, models follow auxiliary inference- or reward-focused prompts, but these scaffolds do not reliably improve later teaching on heuristic-incongruent test graphs and can sometimes reduce performance. Overall, cognitive model fits provide insight into LLM tutoring policies and show that prompt compliance does not guarantee better teaching decisions.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过让大语言模型(LLM)扮演教师角色，在奖励标注的有向图中选择揭示哪条边来帮助学习者规划更优路径，测试LLM是采用类似人类的贝叶斯最优推理还是使用简单启发式规则。通过与人类认知模型对比，发现大多数LLM更接近贝叶斯最优教学策略，但引导性提示并不总是能提升教学表现。
AI.motivation: 研究者想探究大语言模型在教学场景中如何决定下一步"教什么"——是通过推理学习者缺少哪些知识(类似人类的心理建模)，还是仅凭简单启发式规则做决定。
AI.method: 设计了一个受控任务：让教师LLM看到假设学习者在奖励标注的有向图中的轨迹，选择揭示一条边使学习者能重新规划出更好的路径。测试了多种LLM，用拟合人类认知模型的方法(BIC模型比较)分析其选择模式，包括：贝叶斯最优教师(逆规划)、弱贝叶斯变体、启发式基线(基于奖励)、非心智化效用模型。
AI.result: 基线实验中多数LLM表现良好，策略随试验变化不大，图层面表现与人类相似。模型比较显示贝叶斯最优教学最能解释大多数模型的选择。引导性干预(推理型或奖励型提示)可使模型跟随，但并不能可靠提升后续在启发式不一致测试图上的表现，有时反而降低表现。
AI.conclusion: 认知模型拟合揭示了LLM tutoring策略的内在机制，表明提示服从不等于更好的教学决策。LLM的教学策略更接近贝叶斯推理而非简单启发式，但干预性提示不一定能改善实际教学效果。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM teaching behavior and cognitive reasoning (Bayesian vs heuristic decision-making), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is AI/cognitive science research on LLM behavior, not computer graphics, video generation, or 3D motion synthesis. There is no connection to visual-to-motion translation, temporal consistency in motion generation, or any of the methods mentioned (VLM for supervision, video generation models, 3D motion generation models).

title: VideoZeroBench: Probing the Limits of Video MLLMs with Spatio-Temporal Evidence Verification
summary: Recent video multimodal large language models achieve impressive results across various benchmarks. However, current evaluations suffer from two critical limitations: (1) inflated scores can mask deficiencies in fine-grained visual understanding and reasoning, and (2) answer correctness is often measured without verifying whether models identify the precise spatio-temporal evidence supporting their predictions. To address this, we present VideoZeroBench, a hierarchical benchmark designed for challenging long-video question answering that rigorously verifies spatio-temporal evidence. It comprises 500 manually annotated questions across 13 domains, paired with temporal intervals and spatial bounding boxes as evidence. To disentangle answering generation, temporal grounding, and spatial grounding, we introduce a five-level evaluation protocol that progressively tightens evidence requirements. Experiments show that even Gemini-3-Pro correctly answers fewer than 17% of questions under the standard end-to-end QA setting (Level-3). When grounding constraints are imposed, performance drops sharply: No model exceeds 1% accuracy when both correct answering and accurate spatio-temporal localization are required (Level-5), with most failing to achieve any correct grounded predictions. These results expose a significant gap between surface-level answer correctness and genuine evidence-based reasoning, revealing that grounded video understanding remains a bottleneck for long-video QA. We further analyze performance across minimal evidence spans, atomic abilities, and inference paradigms, providing insights for future research in grounded video reasoning. The benchmark and code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 提出了VideoZeroBench，一个针对长视频问答的层次化基准测试，旨在严格验证时空证据。当前视频多模态大语言模型评估存在两个关键局限：分数膨胀掩盖细粒度视觉理解缺陷，且答案正确性未验证模型是否识别支持预测的精确时空证据。
AI.motivation: 解决当前视频多模态大语言模型评估的两个关键问题：(1)膨胀的分数掩盖细粒度视觉理解和推理的缺陷；(2)答案正确性通常未验证模型是否识别支持预测的精确时空证据。
AI.method: 构建了包含500个手动标注问题的层次化基准测试，涵盖13个领域，配有时空边界框作为证据。引入五级评估协议，逐步严格化证据要求，解开答案生成、时序定位和空间定位的耦合。
AI.result: 即使Gemini-3-Pro在标准端到端QA设置(3级)下正确回答的问题也不到17%。当施加定位约束时，性能急剧下降：要求正确的答案和准确的时空定位(5级)时，没有模型准确率超过1%，大多数模型无法产生任何正确的定位预测。
AI.conclusion: 暴露了表面答案正确性与基于证据的推理之间的显著差距，表明基于证据的视频理解仍是长视频问答的瓶颈。为基于证据的视频推理未来研究提供了见解。

relevance_reason: This paper is about evaluating Video Multi-Modal Large Language Models (Video MLLMs) for spatio-temporal reasoning in video QA tasks. While it deals with video analysis and spatio-temporal localization, it is completely unrelated to 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different: this paper focuses on video understanding/evaluation benchmarks, not on generating 3D motion from 2D videos. Even though the research profile mentions video generation models (Wanxiang, Seedance), this paper is about evaluating existing video understanding models, not about motion generation pipelines or bridging 2D video to 3D motion representations.

title: Harmonized Tabular-Image Fusion via Gradient-Aligned Alternating Learning
summary: Multimodal tabular-image fusion is an emerging task that has received increasing attention in various domains. However, existing methods may be hindered by gradient conflicts between modalities, misleading the optimization of the unimodal learner. In this paper, we propose a novel Gradient-Aligned Alternating Learning (GAAL) paradigm to address this issue by aligning modality gradients. Specifically, GAAL adopts an alternating unimodal learning and shared classifier to decouple the multimodal gradient and facilitate interaction. Furthermore, we design uncertainty-based cross-modal gradient surgery to selectively align cross-modal gradients, thereby steering the shared parameters to benefit all modalities. As a result, GAAL can provide effective unimodal assistance and help boost the overall fusion performance. Empirical experiments on widely used datasets reveal the superiority of our method through comparison with various state-of-the-art (SoTA) tabular-image fusion baselines and test-time tabular missing baselines. The source code is available at https://github.com/njustkmg/ICME26-GAAL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GAAL范式解决多模态表格-图像融合中的梯度冲突问题，通过交替学习和不确定性引导的梯度手术来对齐模态梯度，实验表明该方法优于现有最佳基线。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态表格-图像融合方法可能受到模态间梯度冲突的阻碍，这会误导单模态学习器的优化。
AI.method: 提出梯度对齐交替学习(GAAL)范式，包括：1) 采用交替单模态学习和共享分类器来解耦多模态梯度并促进交互；2) 设计基于不确定性的跨模态梯度手术来选择性对齐跨模态梯度，从而引导共享参数惠及所有模态。
AI.result: 在广泛使用的数据集上进行了实证实验，通过与各种最先进的表格-图像融合基线和测试时表格缺失基线进行比较，证明了该方法的优越性。
AI.conclusion: GAAL可以提供有效的单模态辅助并帮助提升整体融合性能，通过解耦多模态梯度并促进交互，有效解决了模态间梯度冲突问题。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses tabular-image fusion for classification tasks, which is completely unrelated to 3D human motion generation. The application domain is entirely different - it's about multi-modal learning with tabular data and images, not video-to-motion translation or computer graphics. The methods (gradient alignment, alternating learning) are specific to tabular-image classification and have no relevance to visual-to-motion generation, temporal consistency in motion synthesis, or 3D motion representation learning.

title: MM-ReCoder: Advancing Chart-to-Code Generation with Reinforcement Learning and Self-Correction
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have recently demonstrated promising capabilities in multimodal coding tasks such as chart-to-code generation. However, existing methods primarily rely on supervised fine-tuning (SFT), which requires the model to learn code patterns through chart-code pairs but does not expose the model to a code execution environment. Moreover, while self-correction through execution feedback offers a potential route to improve coding quality, even state-of-the-art MLLMs have been shown to struggle with effective self-correction. In this work, we introduce MM-ReCoder, a chart-to-code generation model trained with reinforcement learning (RL) and equipped with self-correction ability. We propose a two-stage multi-turn self-correction RL strategy based on Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). The first stage enhances the model's self-correction ability via rolling out a shared first turn, while the second stage improves the coding capability with full-trajectory optimization. MM-ReCoder learns to produce more accurate and executable code through the interaction with the environment and by iteratively correcting its own outputs. Our results on three chart-to-code benchmarks demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of MM-ReCoder.

AI.tldr: MM-ReCoder是一种基于强化学习的chart-to-code生成模型，具有自纠正能力。采用两阶段多轮自纠正RL策略（基于GRPO），通过与环境交互学习生成更准确、可执行的代码，在三个基准测试上达到最先进水平。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要依赖监督微调(SFT)，需要模型通过图表-代码对学习代码模式，但未让模型接触代码执行环境。此外，虽然通过执行反馈进行自纠正是提高代码质量的潜在途径，但即使是最先进的MLLMs也被证明在有效自纠正方面存在困难。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)的两阶段多轮自纠正RL策略。第一阶段通过共享第一回合的滚动来增强模型的自纠正能力，第二阶段通过完整轨迹优化来提高编码能力。模型通过与环境交互来学习生成更准确和可执行的代码。
AI.result: 在三个chart-to-code基准测试上展示了MM-ReCoder的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: MM-ReCoder通过与环境交互并迭代纠正输出，学会了生成更准确、可执行的代码，在三个chart-to-code基准测试上展示了最先进的性能。

relevance_reason: This paper is about chart-to-code generation (generating code from chart images), which is completely unrelated to 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is software engineering/code generation, not computer graphics for human motion. The methods (GRPO for code generation, self-correction) and pain points (code execution feedback) have no connection to the research profile's focus on visual-to-motion translation, temporal consistency, and 3D motion synthesis from 2D videos.

title: Satellite-Free Training for Drone-View Geo-Localization
summary: Drone-view geo-localization (DVGL) aims to determine the location of drones in GPS-denied environments by retrieving the corresponding geotagged satellite tile from a reference gallery given UAV observations of a location. In many existing formulations, these observations are represented by a single oblique UAV image. In contrast, our satellite-free setting is designed for multi-view UAV sequences, which are used to construct a geometry-normalized UAV-side location representation before cross-view retrieval. Existing approaches rely on satellite imagery during training, either through paired supervision or unsupervised alignment, which limits practical deployment when satellite data are unavailable or restricted. In this paper, we propose a satellite-free training (SFT) framework that converts drone imagery into cross-view compatible representations through three main stages: drone-side 3D scene reconstruction, geometry-based pseudo-orthophoto generation, and satellite-free feature aggregation for retrieval. Specifically, we first reconstruct dense 3D scenes from multi-view drone images using 3D Gaussian splatting and project the reconstructed geometry into pseudo-orthophotos via PCA-guided orthographic projection. This rendering stage operates directly on reconstructed scene geometry without requiring camera parameters at rendering time. Next, we refine these orthophotos with lightweight geometry-guided inpainting to obtain texture-complete drone-side views. Finally, we extract DINOv3 patch features from the generated orthophotos, learn a Fisher vector aggregation model solely from drone data, and reuse it at test time to encode satellite tiles for cross-view retrieval. Experimental results on University-1652 and SUES-200 show that our SFT framework substantially outperforms satellite-free generalization baselines and narrows the gap to methods trained with satellite imagery.

AI.tldr: 提出一种卫星自由训练（SFT）框架，用于无人机视角地理定位。该框架通过多视角无人机图像重建3D场景，生成伪正射影像，并使用DINOv3特征和Fisher向量聚合实现跨视角检索，无需卫星图像参与训练。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在训练时依赖卫星图像，限制了实际部署灵活性。本文旨在解决卫星数据不可用或受限制时的无人机定位问题。
AI.method: 提出三阶段SFT框架：1) 使用3D高斯溅射从多视角无人机图像重建密集3D场景；2) 通过PCA引导的正交投影生成伪正射影像，并进行几何引导的修复；3) 从生成的伪正射影像提取DINOv3 patch特征，学习Fisher向量聚合模型。
AI.result: 在University-1652和SUES-200数据集上，SFT框架显著优于卫星自由泛化基线方法，并缩小了与使用卫星图像训练的方法的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的SFT框架成功实现了无需卫星图像参与的无人机视角地理定位训练，为实际部署提供了更大灵活性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about drone-view geo-localization and cross-view retrieval, which is completely unrelated to 3D human motion generation. While it uses some computer vision techniques (3D Gaussian splatting, DINOv3 features), the application domain is entirely different - it's for satellite-free drone navigation, not for generating human motion. The pain points and methods in the research profile focus on visual-to-motion translation for human animation, while this paper focuses on geographic localization using drone and satellite images.

title: CRaFT: Circuit-Guided Refusal Feature Selection via Cross-Layer Transcoders
summary: As safety concerns around large language models (LLMs) grow, understanding the internal mechanisms underlying refusal behavior has become increasingly important. Recent work has studied this behavior by identifying internal features associated with refusal and manipulating them to induce compliance with harmful requests. However, existing refusal feature selection methods rely on how strongly features activate on harmful prompts, which tends to capture superficial signals rather than the causal factors underlying the refusal decision. We propose CRaFT, a circuit-guided refusal feature selection framework that ranks features by their influence on the model's refusal-compliance decision using prompts near the refusal boundary. On Gemma-3-1B-it, CRaFT improves attack success rate (ASR) from 6.7% to 48.2% and outperforms baseline methods across multiple jailbreak benchmarks. These results suggest that circuit influence is a more reliable criterion than activation magnitude for identifying features that causally mediate refusal behavior.

AI.tldr: CRaFT是一种基于电路引导的拒绝特征选择框架，通过影响而非激活幅度来识别与模型拒绝行为因果相关的内部特征，从而更有效地诱导模型服从有害请求。
AI.motivation: 现有拒绝特征选择方法依赖特征在有害提示上的激活强度，容易捕获表面信号而非拒绝决策的因果因素。
AI.method: 提出CRaFT框架，使用接近拒绝边界的提示来评估特征对模型拒绝-服从决策的影响力，从而对特征进行排名选择。
AI.result: 在Gemma-3-1B-it上，CRaFT将攻击成功率从6.7%提升至48.2%，并在多个越狱基准测试中超越基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CRaFT方法通过影响而非激活幅度来识别拒绝特征，为理解语言模型内部机制提供了新视角，对AI安全研究和防御具有重要意义。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM safety and jailbreak attacks (identifying features related to model refusal decisions), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - 3D Human Motion Generation. While both involve feature extraction conceptually, the application domain is entirely different - this paper addresses LLM security interpretability, not motion generation, video-to-motion translation, or any computer graphics domain. There is no overlap in the application areas whatsoever.

title: SHOE: Semantic HOI Open-Vocabulary Evaluation Metric
comment: Accepted to GRAIL-V Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: Open-vocabulary human-object interaction (HOI) detection is a step towards building scalable systems that generalize to unseen interactions in real-world scenarios and support grounded multimodal systems that reason about human-object relationships. However, standard evaluation metrics, such as mean Average Precision (mAP), treat HOI classes as discrete categorical labels and fail to credit semantically valid but lexically different predictions (e.g., "lean on couch" vs. "sit on couch"), limiting their applicability for evaluating open-vocabulary predictions that go beyond any predefined set of HOI labels. We introduce SHOE (Semantic HOI Open-Vocabulary Evaluation), a new evaluation framework that incorporates semantic similarity between predicted and ground-truth HOI labels. SHOE decomposes each HOI prediction into its verb and object components, estimates their semantic similarity using the average of multiple large language models (LLMs), and combines them into a similarity score to evaluate alignment beyond exact string match. This enables a flexible and scalable evaluation of both existing HOI detection methods and open-ended generative models using standard benchmarks such as HICO-DET. Experimental results show that SHOE scores align more closely with human judgments than existing metrics, including LLM-based and embedding-based baselines, achieving an agreement of 85.73% with the average human ratings. Our work underscores the need for semantically grounded HOI evaluation that better mirrors human understanding of interactions. We will release our evaluation metric to the public to facilitate future research.

AI.tldr: 针对open-vocabulary HOI检测提出语义相似度评估框架SHOE，将HOI预测分解为动词和对象组件，利用多个LLMs计算语义相似度，实验表明该方法与人类判断一致性达85.73%，优于现有评估指标。
AI.motivation: Open-vocabulary human-object interaction (HOI)检测面临评估挑战。现有评估指标（如mAP）将HOI类别视为离散标签，无法对语义有效但词汇不同的预测进行评分（如"lean on couch" vs "sit on couch"），限制了开放词汇预测的评估 applicability。
AI.method: 提出SHOE（Semantic HOI Open-Vocabulary Evaluation）框架，将HOI预测分解为动词和对象组件，使用多个大型语言模型（LLMs）估计它们的语义相似度，并组合成相似度评分来评估对齐性，超越精确字符串匹配。
AI.result: SHOE评分与人类判断更接近，优于现有指标（包括基于LLM和基于嵌入的基线方法），达到85.73%的人类平均评分一致性。
AI.conclusion: 强调语义基础的HOI评估的必要性，更好地反映人类对交互的理解。将发布评估指标以促进未来研究。

relevance_reason: This paper is about open-vocabulary HOI (Human-Object Interaction) detection evaluation in computer vision, NOT 3D human motion generation in computer graphics. While it uses LLMs (which is tangentially related to VLM methods), the application domain is completely different - it's about evaluating 2D image-based detection predictions, not generating 3D motion sequences. The pain points and goals are unrelated: the profile wants visual-to-motion translation and motion generation, while this paper focuses on semantic evaluation of HOI detection labels.

title: From Multi-Agent to Single-Agent: When Is Skill Distillation Beneficial?
summary: Multi-agent systems (MAS) tackle complex tasks by distributing expertise, though this often comes at the cost of heavy coordination overhead, context fragmentation, and brittle phase ordering. Distilling a MAS into a single-agent skill can bypass these costs, but this conversion lacks a principled answer for when and what to distill. Instead, the empirical outcome is surprisingly inconsistent: skill lift ranges from a 28% improvement to a 2% degradation across metrics of the exact same task. In this work, we reveal that skill utility is governed not by the task, but by the evaluation metric. We introduce Metric Freedom ($F$), the first a priori predictor of skill utility. $F$ measures the topological rigidity of a metric's scoring landscape by quantifying how output diversity couples with score variance via a Mantel test. Guided by $F$, we propose a two-stage adaptive distillation framework. Stage 1 acts as a selective extraction mechanism, extracting tools and knowledge while discarding restrictive structures on "free" metrics to preserve exploration. Stage 2 targets computationally intensive iterative refinement exclusively toward "rigid" metrics ($F \lesssim 0.6$) to eliminate trajectory-local overfitting. Evaluating across 4 tasks, 11 datasets, and 6 metrics, $F$ strongly predicts skill utility ($ρ= -0.62$, $p < 0.05$). Strikingly, identical agent trajectories yield diametrically opposite skill lifts under rigid versus free metrics, demonstrating that skill utility is fundamentally a metric-level property. Driven by this signal, our adaptive agent matches or exceeds the original MAS while reducing cost up to 8$\times$ and latency by up to 15$\times$.

AI.tldr: 本文研究多智能体系统(MAS)向单智能体技能蒸馏的问题，提出_metric Freedom(F)指标来预测技能效用，并设计了自适应蒸馏框架
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统虽能处理复杂任务，但存在高协调开销、上下文碎片化和脆弱的阶段排序等问题。将MAS蒸馏为单智能体技能可降低成本，但技能提升效果不一致(从28%提升到2%退化)，缺乏对何时及如何蒸馏的原则性指导
AI.method:
1. 提出Metric Freedom(F)指标：通过Mantel测试量化输出多样性与分数方差的耦合程度，测量指标评分景观的拓扑刚性
2. 设计两阶段自适应蒸馏框架：阶段1对"自由"指标提取工具和知识，保留探索能力；阶段2仅对"刚性"指标(Flesssim 0.6)进行计算密集的迭代细化
AI.result: 在4个任务、11个数据集、6个指标上评估，F强预测技能效用(ρ=-0.62, p<0.05)。相同智能体轨迹在刚性与自由指标下产生相反的技能提升，证明技能效用本质上是指标级属性。自适应智能体匹配或超越原始MAS，成本降低8倍，延迟降低15倍
AI.conclusion: 技能效用主要由评估指标而非任务本身决定。F指标可作为技能效用的先验预测器，指导自适应蒸馏框架在保持探索能力与消除轨迹局部过拟合之间取得平衡，实现高效低成本的多智能体系统简化

relevance_reason: This paper is about Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) skill distillation to single-agent AI systems, with focus on metric evaluation for agent performance. This is completely unrelated to the research profile's field of Computer Graphics - 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely different: this is AI/ML systems research, not computer graphics, video generation, or motion generation. None of the pain points (domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion, temporal consistency, quality control for video content, visual feature extraction) are addressed. The methods are also completely different - this paper uses metric topology analysis and agent distillation, not VLM for quality supervision, video generation models, or 3D motion generation models.

title: Mitigating the ID-OOD Tradeoff in Open-Set Test-Time Adaptation
summary: Open-set test-time adaptation (OSTTA) addresses the challenge of adapting models to new environments where out-of-distribution (OOD) samples coexist with in-distribution (ID) samples affected by distribution shifts. In such settings, covariate shift-for example, changes in weather conditions such as snow-can alter ID samples, reducing model reliability. Consequently, models must not only correctly classify covariate-shifted ID (csID) samples but also effectively reject covariate-shifted OOD (csOOD) samples. Entropy minimization is a common strategy in test-time adaptation to maintain ID performance under distribution shifts, while entropy maximization is widely applied to enhance OOD detection. Several studies have sought to combine these objectives to tackle the challenges of OSTTA. However, the intrinsic conflict between entropy minimization and maximization inevitably leads to a trade-off between csID classification and csOOD detection. In this paper, we first analyze the limitations of entropy maximization in OSTTA and then introduce an angular loss to regulate feature norm magnitudes, along with a feature-norm loss to suppress csOOD logits, thereby improving OOD detection. These objectives form ROSETTA, a $\underline{r}$obust $\underline{o}$pen-$\underline{se}$t $\underline{t}$est-$\underline{t}$ime $\underline{a}$daptation. Our method achieves strong OOD detection while maintaining high ID classification performance on CIFAR-10-C, CIFAR-100-C, Tiny-ImageNet-C and ImageNet-C. Furthermore, experiments on the Cityscapes validate the method's effectiveness in real-world semantic segmentation, and results on the HAC dataset demonstrate its applicability across different open-set TTA setups.

AI.tldr: ROSETTA是一种鲁棒的开集测试时适应方法，通过引入角度损失调节特征范数大小和特征范数损失抑制csOOD logits，解决 entropy 最小化与最大化之间的内在冲突，在保持高ID分类性能的同时实现强OOD检测。
AI.motivation: 开集测试时适应(OSTTA)面临的核心挑战是：协变量偏移（如天气变化）会降低ID样本的可靠性，同时需要区分csID样本和csOOD样本。熵最小化用于维持ID性能，熵最大化用于OOD检测，但两者存在内在冲突，导致csID分类与csOOD检测之间的权衡问题。
AI.method: 1) 分析熵最大化在OSTTA中的局限性；2) 引入角度损失(angular loss)调节特征范数大小；3) 设计特征范数损失(feature-norm loss)抑制csOOD logits；4) 结合以上目标形成ROSETTA方法。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10-C、CIFAR-100-C、Tiny-ImageNet-C和ImageNet-C上实现强OOD检测同时保持高ID分类性能；在Cityscapes上验证了真实世界语义分割的有效性；在HAC数据集上证明了在不同开集TTA设置下的适用性。
AI.conclusion: ROSETTA通过特征范数调控策略有效解决了熵最小化与最大化之间的冲突，在多个基准数据集上展现了优异的ID分类与OOD检测权衡性能。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Open-Set Test-Time Adaptation (OSTTA) for image classification and semantic segmentation - a computer vision/machine learning task. It has NO relevance to Computer Graphics or 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains are completely different: this paper deals with entropy minimization/maximization tradeoffs for OOD detection in classification tasks, while the research profile focuses on visual-to-motion translation, temporal consistency in motion generation, quality control of generated video content, and feature extraction from 2D videos for 3D human motion synthesis. The methods (angular loss, feature-norm loss for OOD detection) are unrelated to visual language models, video generation models, or 3D motion generation models.

title: GraphWalk: Enabling Reasoning in Large Language Models through Tool-Based Graph Navigation
summary: The use of knowledge graphs for grounding agents in real-world Q&A applications has become increasingly common. Answering complex queries often requires multi-hop reasoning and the ability to navigate vast relational structures. Standard approaches rely on prompting techniques that steer large language models to reason over raw graph context, or retrieval-augmented generation pipelines where relevant subgraphs are injected into the context. These, however, face severe limitations with enterprise-scale KGs that cannot fit in even the largest context windows available today. We present GraphWalk, a problem-agnostic, training-free, tool-based framework that allows off-the-shelf LLMs to reason through sequential graph navigation, dramatically increasing performance across different tasks. Unlike task-specific agent frameworks that encode domain knowledge into specialized tools, GraphWalk equips the LLM with a minimal set of orthogonal graph operations sufficient to traverse any graph structure. We evaluate whether models equipped with GraphWalk can compose these operations into correct multi-step reasoning chains, where each tool call represents a verifiable step creating a transparent execution trace. We first demonstrate our approach on maze traversal, a problem non-reasoning models are completely unable to solve, then present results on graphs resembling real-world enterprise knowledge graphs. To isolate structural reasoning from world knowledge, we evaluate on entirely synthetic graphs with random, non-semantic labels. Our benchmark spans 12 query templates from basic retrieval to compound first-order logic queries. Results show that tool-based traversal yields substantial and consistent gains over in-context baselines across all model families tested, with gains becoming more pronounced as scale increases, precisely where in-context approaches fail catastrophically.

AI.tldr: GraphWalk是一个无需训练、基于工具的框架，让大型语言模型能够通过顺序图导航进行多跳推理，解决企业级知识图谱无法放入上下文窗口的问题。
AI.motivation: 标准方法要么使用提示技术让LLM在原始图上下文中推理，要么使用检索增强生成管道将相关子图注入上下文。但这些方法在企业级规模的知识图谱面前面临严重限制，因为即使是目前最大的上下文窗口也无法容纳如此大规模的图。
AI.method: GraphWalk为LLM配备了一组最小的正交图操作（正交图遍历操作），使其能够遍历任何图结构。每个工具调用代表一个可验证的步骤，创建透明的执行trace。研究者在合成图上进行评估，将结构推理与世界知识隔离，使用非语义标签的随机图。
AI.result: 工具式遍历在所有测试的模型家族中相比上下文基线方法产生了一致且显著的提升，且随着规模增加提升更加明显——这恰恰是上下文方法灾难性失败的地方。迷宫遍历任务中，非推理模型完全无法解决，但GraphWalk能显著提升性能。
AI.conclusion: GraphWalk是一个问题无关的、无需训练的、基于工具的框架，能够显著提升LLM在各种任务上的图推理能力，特别是在大规模图和复杂查询场景下表现优异。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM reasoning and knowledge graph navigation, which is completely unrelated to the research profile of Computer Graphics - 3D Human Motion Generation. The paper deals with tool-based graph traversal for multi-hop reasoning in enterprise knowledge graphs, while the research profile focuses on visual-to-motion translation, temporal consistency in video-to-3D motion generation, and quality control using VLMs. There is no overlap in application domain, methods, or objectives.

title: Analysis of LLM Performance on AWS Bedrock: Receipt-item Categorisation Case Study
comment: Preprint. Accepted to the 19th International Conference on Evaluation of Novel Approaches to Software Engineering (ENASE 2026). Final version to be published by SCITEPRESS, http://www.scitepress.org
summary: This paper presents a systematic, cost-aware evaluation of large language models (LLMs) for receipt-item categorisation within a production-oriented classification framework. We compare four instruction-tuned models available through AWS Bedrock: Claude 3.7 Sonnet, Claude 4 Sonnet, Mixtral 8x7B Instruct, and Mistral 7B Instruct. The aim of the study was (1) to assess performance across accuracy, response stability, and token-level cost, and (2) to investigate what prompting methods, zero-shot or few-shot, are especially appropriate both in terms of accuracy and in terms of incurred costs. Results of our experiments demonstrated that Claude 3.7 Sonnet achieves the most favourable balance between classification accuracy and cost efficiency.

AI.tldr: 对四种大型语言模型（Claude 3.7 Sonnet、Claude 4 Sonnet、Mixtral 8x7B Instruct和Mistral 7B Instruct）进行 receipt-item 分类的系统性成本感知评估，发现Claude 3.7 Sonnet在准确率和成本效益方面达到最佳平衡。
AI.motivation: 在生产导向的分类框架中，对用于收据项目分类的大型语言模型（LLM）进行系统性、成本感知的评估需求
AI.method: 在AWS Bedrock上比较四种指令微调模型，使用零样本和少样本提示方法，评估准确率、响应稳定性和Token级别成本
AI.result: Claude 3.7 Sonnet在分类准确率和成本效率方面实现最佳平衡
AI.conclusion: 在生产环境中进行收据项目分类时，Claude 3.7 Sonnet是准确率和成本效益最优的选择

relevance_reason: This paper is about using LLMs for receipt-item categorization (document/text classification) on AWS Bedrock. This is completely unrelated to 3D Human Motion Generation in Computer Graphics. The application domain is entirely different (document classification vs. visual-to-motion translation), and the methods are different (text-based LLMs for categorization vs. VLMs for visual supervision, video generation models, and 3D motion generation models). There is no connection to any of the pain points mentioned in the research profile.

title: OSCAR: Orchestrated Self-verification and Cross-path Refinement
summary: Diffusion language models (DLMs) expose their denoising trajectories, offering a natural handle for inference-time control; accordingly, an ideal hallucination mitigation framework should intervene during generation using this model-native signal rather than relying on an externally trained hallucination classifier. Toward this, we formulate commitment uncertainty localization: given a denoising trajectory, identify token positions whose cross-chain entropy exceeds an unsupervised threshold before factually unreliable commitments propagate into self-consistent but incorrect outputs. We introduce a suite of trajectory-level assessments, including a cross-chain divergence-at-hallucination (CDH) metric, for principled comparison of localization methods. We also introduce OSCAR, a training-free inference-time framework operationalizing this formulation. OSCAR runs N parallel denoising chains with randomized reveal orders, computes cross-chain Shannon entropy to detect high-uncertainty positions, and then performs targeted remasking conditioned on retrieved evidence. Ablations confirm that localization and correction contribute complementary gains, robust across N in {4, 8, 16}. On TriviaQA, HotpotQA, RAGTruth, and CommonsenseQA using LLaDA-8B and Dream-7B, OSCAR enhances generation quality by significantly reducing hallucinated content and improving factual accuracy through uncertainty-guided remasking, which also facilitates more effective integration of retrieved evidence. Its native entropy-based uncertainty signal surpasses that of specialized trained detectors, highlighting an inherent capacity of diffusion language models to identify factual uncertainty that is not present in the sequential token commitment structure of autoregressive models. We are releasing the codebase1 to support future research on localization and uncertainty-aware generation in DLMs.

AI.tldr: OSCAR是一个无需训练的推理时间框架，利用扩散语言模型的去噪轨迹，通过跨链熵检测高不确定性位置，并基于检索证据进行针对性重掩码，从而减少幻觉内容并提高事实准确性。
AI.motivation: 当前幻觉缓解方法依赖外部训练的分类器，而扩散语言模型(DLM)本身就暴露了去噪轨迹，提供了一种模型原生的推理时间控制信号。作者提出利用这一模型原生信号来识别事实不可靠的标记位置，防止错误信息在自我一致但错误的输出中传播。
AI.method: 提出承诺不确定性定位方法：给定去噪轨迹，识别跨链熵超过无监督阈值的标记位置。OSCAR框架运行N条并行去噪链（随机揭示顺序），计算跨链香农熵检测高不确定性位置，然后基于检索证据执行针对性重掩码。引入跨链幻觉分歧(CDH)指标用于原则性比较定位方法。
AI.result: 在TriviaQA、HotpotQA、RAGTruth和CommonsenseQA数据集上，使用LLaDA-8B和Dream-7B进行实验，OSCAR通过不确定性引导的重掩码显著减少幻觉内容并提高事实准确性。定位和校正贡献互补增益，在N∈{4,8,16}时均表现稳健。其原生熵基不确定性信号优于专门训练的检测器。
AI.conclusion: 扩散语言模型具有内在能力来识别事实不确定性，这是自回归模型中不存在的序列标记承诺结构所无法提供的。OSCAR无需训练即可有效实现幻觉缓解，为DLM中定位和不确定性感知生成的后续研究提供了基础。

relevance_reason: This paper is about reducing hallucinations in text generation using diffusion language models (DLMs) for NLP tasks. It addresses factual accuracy in text-based QA datasets (TriviaQA, HotpQA, etc.). This is completely unrelated to the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics - specifically 3D Human Motion Generation from videos. The application domain is entirely different: NLP/LLM text generation vs. 3D motion graphics generation. Although both papers mention "diffusion," they use diffusion models in completely different domains (text vs. motion). The paper does not address any of the pain points mentioned: domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion, temporal consistency in visual-to-motion translation, video content quality control, or visual feature extraction.

title: Tex3D: Objects as Attack Surfaces via Adversarial 3D Textures for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have shown strong performance in robotic manipulation, yet their robustness to physically realizable adversarial attacks remains underexplored. Existing studies reveal vulnerabilities through language perturbations and 2D visual attacks, but these attack surfaces are either less representative of real deployment or limited in physical realism. In contrast, adversarial 3D textures pose a more physically plausible and damaging threat, as they are naturally attached to manipulated objects and are easier to deploy in physical environments. Bringing adversarial 3D textures to VLA systems is nevertheless nontrivial. A central obstacle is that standard 3D simulators do not provide a differentiable optimization path from the VLA objective function back to object appearance, making it difficult to optimize through an end-to-end manner. To address this, we introduce Foreground-Background Decoupling (FBD), which enables differentiable texture optimization through dual-renderer alignment while preserving the original simulation environment. To further ensure that the attack remains effective across long-horizon and diverse viewpoints in the physical world, we propose Trajectory-Aware Adversarial Optimization (TAAO), which prioritizes behaviorally critical frames and stabilizes optimization with a vertex-based parameterization. Built on these designs, we present Tex3D, the first framework for end-to-end optimization of 3D adversarial textures directly within the VLA simulation environment. Experiments in both simulation and real-robot settings show that Tex3D significantly degrades VLA performance across multiple manipulation tasks, achieving task failure rates of up to 96.7\%. Our empirical results expose critical vulnerabilities of VLA systems to physically grounded 3D adversarial attacks and highlight the need for robustness-aware training.

AI.tldr: 首个在VLA模拟环境中端到端优化3D对抗纹理的框架，通过FBD和TAAO技术实现可微分优化，可在模拟和真实机器人环境中导致高达96.7%的任务失败率，揭示了VLA模型对物理3D对抗攻击的脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 探索视觉-语言-动作(VLA)模型在机器人操作任务中对物理可实现的对抗性攻击的鲁棒性。现有研究主要集中在语言扰动和2D视觉攻击，但这些攻击面在物理部署中代表性有限。相比之下，对抗性3D纹理更具物理真实性和破坏性，因为它们自然附着在操作对象上，更容易在物理环境中部署。
AI.method: 提出前景-背景解耦(FBD)方法，通过双渲染器对齐实现可微分纹理优化，同时保留原始模拟环境。为确保攻击在长时域和多样化视角下有效，提出轨迹感知对抗优化(TAAO)，优先处理行为关键帧并使用基于顶点的参数化稳定优化。基于这些设计，构建了Tex3D框架。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实机器人环境中的实验表明，Tex3D显著降低VLA在多种操作任务上的性能，达到高达96.7%的任务失败率。
AI.conclusion: 暴露了VLA系统对物理接地3D对抗性攻击的关键脆弱性，强调了鲁棒性感知训练的必要性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about adversarial attacks on Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models in robotics manipulation, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is robotics/security, not motion generation. It doesn't address any of the pain points (domain gap, temporal consistency, quality control, feature extraction for motion) and uses irrelevant methods (FBD/TAAO for adversarial textures vs motion generation models).

title: CORAL: Towards Autonomous Multi-Agent Evolution for Open-Ended Discovery
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based evolution is a promising approach for open-ended discovery, where progress requires sustained search and knowledge accumulation. Existing methods still rely heavily on fixed heuristics and hard-coded exploration rules, which limit the autonomy of LLM agents. We present CORAL, the first framework for autonomous multi-agent evolution on open-ended problems. CORAL replaces rigid control with long-running agents that explore, reflect, and collaborate through shared persistent memory, asynchronous multi-agent execution, and heartbeat-based interventions. It also provides practical safeguards, including isolated workspaces, evaluator separation, resource management, and agent session and health management. Evaluated on diverse mathematical, algorithmic, and systems optimization tasks, CORAL sets new state-of-the-art results on 10 tasks, achieving 3-10 times higher improvement rates with far fewer evaluations than fixed evolutionary search baselines across tasks. On Anthropic's kernel engineering task, four co-evolving agents improve the best known score from 1363 to 1103 cycles. Mechanistic analyses further show how these gains arise from knowledge reuse and multi-agent exploration and communication. Together, these results suggest that greater agent autonomy and multi-agent evolution can substantially improve open-ended discovery. Code is available at https://github.com/Human-Agent-Society/CORAL.

AI.tldr: CORAL是首个用于开放问题的自主多智能体进化框架，通过持久记忆、异步执行和心跳干预实现智能体自主探索、反思和协作，在数学、算法和系统优化任务上取得最先进成果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仍依赖固定启发式和硬编码探索规则，限制了LLM智能体的自主性。开放发现需要持续搜索和知识积累，但缺乏有效的自主框架。
AI.method: CORAL框架包含：1)持久共享内存支持智能体探索和反思；2)异步多智能体执行；3)心跳干预机制；4)安全防护措施（隔离工作区、评估器分离、资源管理、会话和健康监控）。
AI.result: 在数学、算法和系统优化任务中，CORAL在10个任务上创下新SOTA，实现3-10倍更高的改进率，评估次数远少于固定进化搜索基线。在Anthropic内核工程任务中，4个协同进化智能体将最佳分数从1363提升到1103。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，更高的智能体自主性和多智能体进化可以显著提升开放发现的性能，知识复用和多智能体探索与通信是性能提升的关键机制。

relevance_reason: This paper is about autonomous multi-agent evolution for LLM agents to solve mathematical and algorithmic optimization problems. The application domain is completely different from Computer Graphics - 3D Human Motion Generation. This paper deals with AI/LLM systems for problem-solving, not visual-to-motion translation, 3D motion generation, or any computer graphics applications. There is no mention of video processing, motion generation, temporal consistency, or any relevant methods for the research profile.

title: Automatic Image-Level Morphological Trait Annotation for Organismal Images
summary: Morphological traits are physical characteristics of biological organisms that provide vital clues on how organisms interact with their environment. Yet extracting these traits remains a slow, expert-driven process, limiting their use in large-scale ecological studies. A major bottleneck is the absence of high-quality datasets linking biological images to trait-level annotations. In this work, we demonstrate that sparse autoencoders trained on foundation-model features yield monosemantic, spatially grounded neurons that consistently activate on meaningful morphological parts. Leveraging this property, we introduce a trait annotation pipeline that localizes salient regions and uses vision-language prompting to generate interpretable trait descriptions. Using this approach, we construct Bioscan-Traits, a dataset of 80K trait annotations spanning 19K insect images from BIOSCAN-5M. Human evaluation confirms the biological plausibility of the generated morphological descriptions. We assess design sensitivity through a comprehensive ablation study, systematically varying key design choices and measuring their impact on the quality of the resulting trait descriptions. By annotating traits with a modular pipeline rather than prohibitively expensive manual efforts, we offer a scalable way to inject biologically meaningful supervision into foundation models, enable large-scale morphological analyses, and bridge the gap between ecological relevance and machine-learning practicality.

AI.tldr: 研究提出利用稀疏自编码器从基础模型特征中提取 monosemantic 神经元，实现昆虫图像的形态特征定位与描述生成，构建了包含8万标注的Bioscan-Traits数据集。
AI.motivation: 形态特征提取依赖专家手动完成，效率低下，严重缺乏高质量的生物图像-特征标注数据集，制约了大规模生态学研究的发展。
AI.method: 1) 在基础模型特征上训练稀疏自编码器，获得能持续响应有意义形态部位的单义性、空间定位神经元；2) 利用该特性设计特征标注流程，定位显著区域并通过视觉-语言提示生成可解释的特征描述；3) 构建包含19000张昆虫图像、80000个特征标注的数据集；4) 通过消融实验评估设计敏感性。
AI.result: 人类评估验证了生成形态描述的生物学合理性；消融实验系统性地评估了不同设计选择对特征描述质量的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该模块化特征标注流程相比昂贵的人工标注具有可扩展优势，为基础模型注入生物学有意义监督提供了可扩展路径， enable了大规模形态分析，弥合了生态相关性与机器学习实用性之间的差距。

relevance_reason: This paper is about biological/insect image analysis for morphological trait annotation using sparse autoencoders - completely different application domain from 3D Human Motion Generation in Computer Graphics. While both involve feature extraction, the paper addresses insect morphological trait localization, not human motion generation from video. The methods (sparse autoencoders for monosemantic neurons) and domain (biological image annotation) have no relevance to the research profile's goal of generating 3D human motion from 2D videos.

title: Ontology-Aware Design Patterns for Clinical AI Systems: Translating Reification Theory into Software Architecture
comment: 7 design patterns, 3 tables, 1 figure, arXiv cs.AI preprint
summary: Clinical AI systems routinely train on health data structurally distorted by documentation workflows, billing incentives, and terminology fragmentation. Prior work has characterised the mechanisms of this distortion: the three-forces model of documentary enactment, the reification feedback loop through which AI may amplify coding artefacts, and terminology governance failures that allow semantic drift to accumulate. Yet translating these insights into implementable software architecture remains an open problem. This paper proposes seven ontology-aware design patterns in Gang-of-Four pattern language for building clinical AI pipelines resilient to ontological distortion. The patterns address data ingestion validation (Ontological Checkpoint), low-frequency signal preservation (Dormancy-Aware Pipeline), continuous drift monitoring (Drift Sentinel), parallel representation maintenance (Dual-Ontology Layer), feedback loop interruption (Reification Circuit Breaker), terminology evolution management (Terminology Version Gate), and pluggable regulatory compliance (Regulatory Compliance Adapter). Each pattern is specified with Problem, Forces, Solution, Consequences, Known Uses, and Related Patterns. We illustrate their composition in a reference architecture for a primary care AI system and provide a walkthrough tracing all seven patterns through a diabetes risk prediction scenario. This paper does not report empirical validation; it offers a design vocabulary grounded in theoretical analysis, subject to future evaluation in production systems. Three patterns have partial precedent in existing systems; the remaining four have not been formally described. Limitations include the absence of runtime benchmarks and restriction to the German and EU regulatory context.

AI.tldr: 一篇关于临床AI系统中数据本体扭曲问题的设计模式论文，提出七种本体感知设计模式以构建抗扭曲的AI管道，并展示了在糖尿病风险预测场景中的应用。
AI.motivation: 临床AI系统常在结构上被文档工作流程、计费激励和术语碎片化所扭曲的健康数据上训练。先前研究已表征了这种扭曲的机制：纪录片实施的三力模型、AI可能放大编码伪影的再具体化反馈循环，以及允许语义漂移积累的术语治理失败。然而，将这些见解转化为可实现的软件架构仍然是一个开放性问题。
AI.method: 提出七种本体感知的Gang-of-Four模式语言设计模式，用于构建能够抵抗本体扭曲的临床AI管道。这些模式包括：本体检查点（数据摄入验证）、休眠感知管道（低频信号保留）、漂移哨兵（持续漂移监控）、双本体层（并行表示维护）、再具体化断路器（反馈循环中断）、术语版本门（术语演进管理）和监管合规适配器（可插拔监管合规）。每个模式都包含问题、 forces、解决方案、后果、已知用途和相关模式规范。
AI.result: 在初级保健AI系统的参考架构中展示了这七种模式的组合，并提供了糖尿病风险预测场景的完整演练。未报告实证验证；提供基于理论分析的设计词汇，有待未来在生产系统中评估。三个模式有部分先例；其余四个尚未正式描述。
AI.conclusion: 该论文作为设计贡献，提出了一组系统化的本体感知模式来应对临床AI中的数据扭曲问题。局限在于缺乏运行时基准测试且仅适用于德国和欧盟监管背景。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - this paper is about clinical AI systems and healthcare data ontology issues (diabetes risk prediction), not Computer Graphics or 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is healthcare/medical AI, which is entirely different from the research field. Despite mentioning AI, the methods (Gang-of-Four design patterns, ontology-aware architecture) have no connection to video-to-motion translation, temporal consistency, visual feature extraction, or any computer graphics applications.

title: LivingWorld: Interactive 4D World Generation with Environmental Dynamics
summary: We introduce LivingWorld, an interactive framework for generating 4D worlds with environmental dynamics from a single image. While recent advances in 3D scene generation enable large-scale environment creation, most approaches focus primarily on reconstructing static geometry, leaving scene-scale environmental dynamics such as clouds, water, or smoke largely unexplored. Modeling such dynamics is challenging because motion must remain coherent across an expanding scene while supporting low-latency user feedback. LivingWorld addresses this challenge by progressively constructing a globally coherent motion field as the scene expands. To maintain global consistency during expansion, we introduce a geometry-aware alignment module that resolves directional and scale ambiguities across views. We further represent motion using a compact hash-based motion field, enabling efficient querying and stable propagation of dynamics throughout the scene. This representation also supports bidirectional motion propagation during rendering, producing long and temporally coherent 4D sequences without relying on expensive video-based refinement. On a single RTX 5090 GPU, generating each new scene expansion step requires 9 seconds, followed by 3 seconds for motion alignment and motion field updates, enabling interactive 4D world generation with globally coherent environmental dynamics. Video demonstrations are available at cvsp-lab.github.io/LivingWorld.

AI.tldr: LivingWorld是一个从单张图像生成具有环境动态的4D世界的交互式框架，解决了大规模场景中环境动态（如云、水、烟雾）建模的挑战。
AI.motivation: 虽然近期3D场景生成技术取得进展，但大多数方法专注于重建静态几何体，场景级环境动态（云、水、烟雾）基本未被探索。建模这些动态具有挑战性，因为运动必须在场景扩展时保持连贯性，同时支持低延迟用户反馈。
AI.method: 1. 随着场景扩展，逐步构建全局连贯的运动场；2. 引入几何感知对齐模块，解决视图间的方向和尺度歧义；3. 使用紧凑的基于哈希的运动场表示，实现高效查询和稳定的动态传播；4. 在渲染过程中支持双向运动传播，产生长而时间连贯的4D序列。
AI.result: 在单张RTX 5090 GPU上，每个新场景扩展步骤生成需要9秒，运动对齐和运动场更新需要3秒，实现了具有全局连贯环境动态的交互式4D世界生成。
AI.conclusion: LivingWorld成功实现了从单张图像生成具有连贯环境动态的交互式4D世界，为场景级动态建模提供了新的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 4D world/environment generation (modeling environmental dynamics like clouds, water, smoke in large-scale scenes), while the research profile is specifically about 3D Human Motion Generation (generating human body movements and animations). The application domains are completely different - this paper deals with scene-level environmental effects, not human motion. Despite both being in computer graphics, the focus on environmental dynamics vs human motion represents a fundamentally different research area.

title: MonoSAOD: Monocular 3D Object Detection with Sparsely Annotated Label
summary: Monocular 3D object detection has achieved impressive performance on densely annotated datasets. However, it struggles when only a fraction of objects are labeled due to the high cost of 3D annotation. This sparsely annotated setting is common in real-world scenarios where annotating every object is impractical. To address this, we propose a novel framework for sparsely annotated monocular 3D object detection with two key modules. First, we propose Road-Aware Patch Augmentation (RAPA), which leverages sparse annotations by augmenting segmented object patches onto road regions while preserving 3D geometric consistency. Second, we propose Prototype-Based Filtering (PBF), which generates high-quality pseudo-labels by filtering predictions through prototype similarity and depth uncertainty. It maintains global 2D RoI feature prototypes and selects pseudo-labels that are both feature-consistent with learned prototypes and have reliable depth estimates. Our training strategy combines geometry-preserving augmentation with prototype-guided pseudo-labeling to achieve robust detection under sparse supervision. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. The source code is available at https://github.com/VisualAIKHU/MonoSAOD .

AI.tldr: 提出MonoSAOD框架解决单目3D目标检测中的稀疏标注问题，通过道路感知Patch增强(RAPA)和基于原型过滤(PBF)两个模块，利用几何保持增强和原型引导伪标签标注实现鲁棒检测。
AI.motivation: 单目3D目标检测在密集标注数据集上取得了令人印象深刻的性能，但在仅部分物体被标注的场景中表现不佳，因为3D标注成本很高。这种稀疏标注设置在现实场景中很常见，为解决这一问题提出了本方法。
AI.method: 提出了两个关键模块：1) 道路感知Patch增强(RAPA)，通过将分割的物体patch增强到道路区域并保持3D几何一致性来利用稀疏标注；2) 基于原型过滤(PBF)，通过原型相似性和深度不确定性生成高质量伪标签，维护全局2D RoI特征原型，选择与学习原型特征一致且具有可靠深度估计的伪标签。
AI.result: 广泛的实验证明了所提出方法的有效性，在稀疏监督下实现了鲁棒的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在稀疏标注设置下显著提升了检测性能，证明了结合几何保持增强与原型引导伪标签标注的有效性，在KITTI等数据集上取得了最先进的成果。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D object detection for autonomous driving (detecting vehicles from monocular images), while the research profile is about 3D human motion generation. These are completely different application domains - object detection vs. human motion generation. The paper addresses sparse annotation problems in vehicle detection, not the pain points of domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion, temporal consistency in visual-to-motion translation, or extracting visual guidance features for motion generation. Despite both dealing with "3D" in the title, the application domain is entirely different - a self-driving car detecting other vehicles is not related to generating human motion sequences.

title: Moiré Video Authentication: A Physical Signature Against AI Video Generation
summary: Recent advances in video generation have made AI-synthesized content increasingly difficult to distinguish from real footage. We propose a physics-based authentication signature that real cameras produce naturally, but that generative models cannot faithfully reproduce. Our approach exploits the Moiré effect: the interference fringes formed when a camera views a compact two-layer grating structure. We derive the Moiré motion invariant, showing that fringe phase and grating image displacement are linearly coupled by optical geometry, independent of viewing distance and grating structure. A verifier extracts both signals from video and tests their correlation. We validate the invariant on both real-captured and AI-generated videos from multiple state-of-the-art generators, and find that real and AI-generated videos produce significantly different correlation signatures, suggesting a robust means of differentiating them. Our work demonstrates that deterministic optical phenomena can serve as physically grounded, verifiable signatures against AI-generated video.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于物理的视频认证签名方法，利用相机自然产生但生成模型无法忠实复制的摩尔效应（莫尔运动不变量），通过提取视频中的条纹相位和光栅图像位移并测试其相关性来区分真实视频和AI生成视频。
AI.motivation: 视频生成技术的进步使得AI合成内容越来越难以与真实 footage 区分，需要一种物理基础的、可验证的方法来鉴别AI生成的视频。
AI.method: 利用Moiré效应：相机拍摄紧凑双层光栅结构时形成的干涉条纹。推导Moiré运动不变量，证明条纹相位与光栅图像位移由光学几何线性耦合，与 viewing distance和光栅结构无关。验证者从视频中提取两个信号并测试其相关性。
AI.result: 在多个最先进的生成器产生的真实拍摄和AI生成视频上进行验证，发现真实视频和AI生成视频产生明显不同的相关性签名，表明这是一种区分它们的稳健方法。
AI.conclusion: 确定性光学现象可以作为对抗AI生成视频的物理 grounded、可验证签名。

relevance_reason: This paper is about video authentication (detecting AI-generated videos using Moiré physical signatures), which is completely unrelated to 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different - the research profile deals with generating 3D human motions from visual inputs, while this paper deals with verifying whether videos are real or AI-generated. The methods are also different (optical physics analysis vs. motion generation models). This paper does not address any of the stated pain points about domain gap, temporal consistency, or visual guidance features for motion generation.

title: Can Heterogeneous Language Models Be Fused?
summary: Model merging aims to integrate multiple expert models into a single model that inherits their complementary strengths without incurring the inference-time cost of ensembling. Recent progress has shown that merging can be highly effective when all source models are \emph{homogeneous}, i.e., derived from the same pretrained backbone and therefore share aligned parameter coordinates or compatible task vectors. Yet this assumption is increasingly unrealistic in open model ecosystems, where useful experts are often built on different families such as Llama, Qwen, and Mistral. In such \emph{heterogeneous} settings, direct weight-space fusion becomes ill-posed due to architectural mismatch, latent basis misalignment, and amplified cross-source conflict. We address this problem with \texttt{HeteroFusion} for heterogeneous language model fusion, which consists of two key components: topology-based alignment that transfers knowledge across heterogeneous backbones by matching functional module structures instead of raw tensor coordinates, and conflict-aware denoising that suppresses incompatible or noisy transfer signals during fusion. We further provide analytical justification showing that preserving the target adapter basis while predicting structured updates leads to a stable and well-conditioned transfer process. Across heterogeneous transfer, multi-source fusion, noisy-source robustness, and cross-family generalization settings, \texttt{HeteroFusion} consistently outperforms strong merging, fusion, and ensemble baselines.

AI.tldr: HeteroFusion是一种异构语言模型融合方法，通过拓扑对齐和冲突感知去噪解决不同预训练 backbone（如Llama、Qwen、Mistral）模型间的融合问题，无需额外训练即可继承多个专家模型的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有模型合并方法假设源模型是同构的（来自相同预训练 backbone），但开放模型生态中常用模型来自不同家族。直接权重空间融合因架构不匹配、潜在基向量错位和跨源冲突而失效。
AI.method: 提出两阶段方法：1) 拓扑对齐 - 通过匹配功能模块结构而非原始张量坐标来实现跨异构 backbone 的知识迁移；2) 冲突感知去噪 - 在融合过程中抑制不兼容或噪声的迁移信号。理论分析表明保留目标适配器基并预测结构化更新可确保稳定且良好条件的迁移过程。
AI.result: 在异构迁移、多源融合、噪声源鲁棒性和跨家族泛化等设置中，HeteroFusion 一致优于强合并、融合和集成基线。
AI.conclusion: HeteroFusion 有效解决了异构模型融合的核心挑战，为构建更灵活的多专家系统提供了新思路，具有重要的 practical 价值。

title: DynaVid: Learning to Generate Highly Dynamic Videos using Synthetic Motion Data
summary: Despite recent progress, video diffusion models still struggle to synthesize realistic videos involving highly dynamic motions or requiring fine-grained motion controllability. A central limitation lies in the scarcity of such examples in commonly used training datasets. To address this, we introduce DynaVid, a video synthesis framework that leverages synthetic motion data in training, which is represented as optical flow and rendered using computer graphics pipelines. This approach offers two key advantages. First, synthetic motion offers diverse motion patterns and precise control signals that are difficult to obtain from real data. Second, unlike rendered videos with artificial appearances, rendered optical flow encodes only motion and is decoupled from appearance, thereby preventing models from reproducing the unnatural look of synthetic videos. Building on this idea, DynaVid adopts a two-stage generation framework: a motion generator first synthesizes motion, and then a motion-guided video generator produces video frames conditioned on that motion. This decoupled formulation enables the model to learn dynamic motion patterns from synthetic data while preserving visual realism from real-world videos. We validate our framework on two challenging scenarios, vigorous human motion generation and extreme camera motion control, where existing datasets are particularly limited. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DynaVid improves the realism and controllability in dynamic motion generation and camera motion control.

AI.tldr: DynaVid是一个视频合成框架，通过利用合成光学流数据（由计算机图形学管道渲染）解决视频扩散模型在动态运动生成方面的局限性。该框架采用两阶段生成策略，先合成运动再基于运动生成视频，从而在学习动态运动模式的同时保留视觉真实性。
AI.motivation: 当前视频扩散模型在合成涉及高度动态运动或需要精细运动可控性的真实感视频方面仍存在困难，核心 limitations在于常用训练数据集中此类示例的稀缺性。
AI.method: DynaVid采用两阶段生成框架：(1)运动生成器首先合成光学流形式的运动；(2)运动引导的视频生成器基于合成的运动条件生成视频帧。该方法利用计算机图形学管道渲染的合成光学流数据作为训练数据，这些光学流仅编码运动信息，与外观解耦，避免模型学习合成视频的人造外观。
AI.result: 实验表明DynaVid在两个具有挑战性的场景（剧烈人体运动生成和极端摄像机运动控制） 中显著提升了动态运动生成的 realism 和可控性。
AI.conclusion: DynaVid通过利用合成光学流数据成功解决了视频扩散模型在动态运动生成和精细运动控制方面的局限性。该框架采用两阶段生成策略，使模型能够从合成数据中学习动态运动模式，同时保留真实视频的视觉真实性。实验验证表明该方法在剧烈人体运动生成和极端摄像机运动控制两个挑战性场景中显著提升了 realism 和可控性。

title: EvoSkills: Self-Evolving Agent Skills via Co-Evolutionary Verification
summary: Anthropic proposes the concept of skills for LLM agents to tackle multi-step professional tasks that simple tool invocations cannot address. A tool is a single, self-contained function, whereas a skill is a structured bundle of interdependent multi-file artifacts. Currently, skill generation is not only label-intensive due to manual authoring, but also may suffer from human--machine cognitive misalignment, which can lead to degraded agent performance, as evidenced by evaluations on SkillsBench. Therefore, we aim to enable agents to autonomously generate skills. However, existing self-evolving methods designed for tools cannot be directly applied to skills due to their increased complexity. To address these issues, we propose EvoSkills, a self-evolving skills framework that enables agents to autonomously construct complex, multi-file skill packages. Specifically, EvoSkills couples a Skill Generator that iteratively refines skills with a Surrogate Verifier that co-evolves to provide informative and actionable feedback without access to ground-truth test content. On SkillsBench, EvoSkills achieves the highest pass rate among five baselines on both Claude Code and Codex, and also exhibits strong generalization capabilities to six additional LLMs.

AI.tldr: EvoSkills是一个自我进化的技能框架，使LLM智能体能够自主生成复杂的多文件技能包，通过耦合技能生成器和 surrogate 验证器协同进化，在SkillsBench上取得最高通过率。
AI.motivation: 当前技能生成依赖人工标注，存在人力密集和人与机器认知错位问题，导致智能体性能下降。现有工具的自进化方法无法直接应用于更复杂的技能。
AI.method: 提出EvoSkills框架，包含迭代改进技能的技能生成器和协同进化提供反馈的Surrogate验证器，无需真实测试内容即可提供可操作的反馈。
AI.result: 在SkillsBench上在Claude Code和Codex上均取得最高通过率，并在六个额外LLM上展现强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: EvoSkills成功实现了智能体自主构建复杂多文件技能包的能力，为解决人工标注认知错位问题提供了有效方案。

title: Robust Embodied Perception in Dynamic Environments via Disentangled Weight Fusion
summary: Embodied perception systems face severe challenges of dynamic environment distribution drift when they continuously interact in open physical spaces. However, the existing domain incremental awareness methods often rely on the domain id obtained in advance during the testing phase, which limits their practicability in unknown interaction scenarios. At the same time, the model often overfits to the context-specific perceptual noise, which leads to insufficient generalization ability and catastrophic forgetting. To address these limitations, we propose a domain-id and exemplar-free incremental learning framework for embodied multimedia systems, which aims to achieve robust continuous environment adaptation. This method designs a disentangled representation mechanism to remove non-essential environmental style interference, and guide the model to focus on extracting semantic intrinsic features shared across scenes, thereby eliminating perceptual uncertainty and improving generalization. We further use the weight fusion strategy to dynamically integrate the old and new environment knowledge in the parameter space, so as to ensure that the model adapts to the new distribution without storing historical data and maximally retains the discrimination ability of the old environment. Extensive experiments on multiple standard benchmark datasets show that the proposed method significantly reduces catastrophic forgetting in a completely exemplar-free and domain-id free setting, and its accuracy is better than the existing state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无领域标识和无样本的增量学习框架，用于具身多媒体系统在动态环境中的连续适应。
AI.motivation: 现有领域增量感知方法依赖测试阶段预先获取的领域标识，限制了未知交互场景的实用性；模型常过度拟合特定上下文感知噪声，导致泛化能力不足和灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: 设计解耦表征机制去除非本质环境风格干扰，引导模型聚焦提取跨场景的语义内在特征；使用权重融合策略在参数空间动态整合旧环境和新环境知识，无需存储历史数据。
AI.result: 在多个标准基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法在完全无样本和无领域标识设置下显著降低灾难性遗忘，准确率优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了鲁棒的连续环境适应，为具身感知系统在开放物理空间中的持续交互提供了有效解决方案。

title: Scale over Preference: The Impact of AI-Generated Content on Online Content Ecology
summary: The rapid proliferation of Artificial Intelligence-Generated Content (AIGC) is fundamentally restructuring online content ecologies, necessitating a rigorous examination of its behavioral and distributional implications. Leveraging a comprehensive longitudinal dataset comprising tens of millions of users from a leading Chinese video-sharing platform, this study elucidated the distinct creation and consumption behaviors characterizing AIGC versus Human-Generated Content (HGC). We identified a prevalent scale-over-preference dynamic, wherein AIGC creators achieve aggregate engagement comparable to HGC creators through high-volume production, despite a marked consumer preference for HGC. Deeper analysis uncovered the ability of the algorithmic content distribution mechanism in moderating these competing interests regarding AIGC. These findings advocated for the implementation of AIGC-sensitive distribution algorithms and precise governance frameworks to ensure the long-term health of the online content platforms.

AI.conclusion: 应实施AIGC敏感的分发算法和精准治理框架，保障在线内容平台的长期健康发展

title: HOT: Harmonic-Constrained Optimal Transport for Remote Photoplethysmography Domain Adaptation
summary: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables non-contact physiological measurement from facial videos; however, its practical deployment is often hindered by substantial performance degradation under domain shift. While recent deep learning-based rPPG methods have achieved strong performance on individual datasets, they frequently overfit to appearance-related factors, such as illumination, camera characteristics, and color response, that vary significantly across domains. To address this limitation, we introduce frequency domain adaptation (FDA) as a principled strategy for modeling appearance variation in rPPG. By transferring low-frequency spectral components that encode domain-dependent appearance characteristics, FDA encourages rPPG models to learn invariance to appearance variations while retaining cardiac-induced signals. To further support physiologically consistent alignment under such appearance variation, we propose Harmonic-Constrained Optimal Transport (HOT), which leverages the harmonic property of cardiac signals to guide alignment between original and FDA-transferred representations. Extensive cross-dataset experiments demonstrate that the proposed FDA and HOT framework effectively enhances the robustness and generalization of rPPG models across diverse datasets.

title: LiteInception: A Lightweight and Interpretable Deep Learning Framework for General Aviation Fault Diagnosis
summary: General aviation fault diagnosis and efficient maintenance are critical to flight safety; however, deploying deep learning models on resource-constrained edge devices poses dual challenges in computational capacity and interpretability. This paper proposes LiteInception--a lightweight interpretable fault diagnosis framework designed for edge deployment. The framework adopts a two-stage cascaded architecture aligned with standard maintenance workflows: Stage 1 performs high-recall fault detection, and Stage 2 conducts fine-grained fault classification on anomalous samples, thereby decoupling optimization objectives and enabling on-demand allocation of computational resources. For model compression, a multi-method fusion strategy based on mutual information, gradient analysis, and SE attention weights is proposed to reduce the input sensor channels from 23 to 15, and a 1+1 branch LiteInception architecture is introduced that compresses InceptionTime parameters by 70%, accelerates CPU inference by over 8x, with less than 3% F1 loss. Furthermore, knowledge distillation is introduced as a precision-recall regulation mechanism, enabling the same lightweight model to adapt to different scenarios--such as safety-critical and auxiliary diagnosis--by switching training strategies. Finally, a dual-layer interpretability framework integrating four attribution methods is constructed, providing traceable evidence chains of "which sensor x which time period." Experiments on the NGAFID dataset demonstrate a fault detection accuracy of 81.92% with 83.24% recall, and a fault identification accuracy of 77.00%, validating the framework's favorable balance among efficiency, accuracy, and interpretability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LiteInception——一种面向边缘部署的轻量级可解释故障诊断框架，采用两阶段级联架构解耦故障检测与分类任务，通过多方法融合模型压缩和1+1分支架构实现70%参数压缩和8倍推理加速，结合知识蒸馏实现场景自适应，并构建双层可解释性框架提供可追溯证据链。在NGAFID数据集上验证了效率、准确性和可解释性的良好平衡。
AI.motivation: 通用航空故障诊断和维护对飞行安全至关重要，但在资源受限的边缘设备上部署深度学习模型面临计算能力和可解释性的双重挑战。
AI.method: 1. 两阶段级联架构：第1阶段进行高召回率故障检测，第2阶段对异常样本进行细粒度故障分类，解耦优化目标，支持按需分配计算资源。2. 多方法融合模型压缩：基于互信息、梯度和SE注意力权重，将输入传感器通道从23个减少到15个。3. 1+1分支LiteInception架构：将InceptionTime参数压缩70%，CPU推理加速超过8倍，F1损失小于3%。4. 知识蒸馏作为精确率-召回率调节机制，使同一轻量模型可适应不同场景。5. 双层可解释性框架整合四种归因方法，提供"哪个传感器×哪个时间段"的证据链。
AI.result: 在NGAFID数据集上的实验表明：故障检测准确率达到81.92%，召回率为83.24%，故障识别准确率为77.00%。模型参数压缩70%，CPU推理加速超过8倍，F1损失小于3%，输入传感器通道从23个减少到15个。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在NGAFID数据集上实现了81.92%的故障检测准确率和83.24%的召回率，以及77.00%的故障识别准确率，验证了在效率、准确性和可解释性之间取得了良好的平衡。

title: The AnIML Ontology: Enabling Semantic Interoperability for Large-Scale Experimental Data in Interconnected Scientific Labs
comment: Accepted at the 38th International Conference on Advanced Information Systems Engineering (CAiSE 2026)
summary: Achieving semantic interoperability across heterogeneous experimental data systems remains a major barrier to data-driven scientific discovery. The Analytical Information Markup Language (AnIML), a flexible XML-based standard for analytical chemistry and biology, is increasingly used in industrial R&D labs for managing and exchanging experimental data. However, the expressivity of the XML schema permits divergent interpretations across stakeholders, introducing inconsistencies that undermine the interoperability the AnIML schema was designed to support. In this paper, we present the AnIML Ontology, an OWL 2 ontology that formalises the semantics of AnIML and aligns it with the Allotrope Data Format to support future cross-system and cross-lab interoperability. The ontology was developed using an expert-in-the-loop approach combining LLM-assisted requirement elicitation with collaborative ontology engineering. We validate the ontology through a multi-layered approach: data-driven transformation of real-world AnIML files into knowledge graphs, competency question verification via SPARQL, and a novel validation protocol based on adversarial negative competency questions mapped to established ontological anti-patterns and enforced via SHACL constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AnIML Ontology，一个OWL 2本体，用于形式化AnIML的语义并与Allotrope数据格式对齐，以支持跨系统和跨实验室的语义互操作性。该本体采用专家参与的LLM辅助需求获取与协作本体工程相结合的方法开发，并通过数据驱动的知识图转换、SPARQL能力问题验证和基于对抗性负能力问题的新验证协议进行多层次验证。
AI.motivation: AnIML作为分析化学和生物学的XML标准，在工业R&D实验室中广泛使用，但其XML模式的表达力允许利益相关者产生不同解释，导致不一致，破坏了AnIML设计支持的互操作性。需要在语义层面形式化AnIML以实现真正的跨系统数据共享。
AI.method: 采用专家-循环方法，结合LLM辅助需求获取与协作本体工程。使用AnIML Ontology (OWL 2)形式化语义并与Allotrope数据格式对齐。验证采用三层方法：1)真实世界AnIML文件到知识图的数据驱动转换；2)通过SPARQL进行能力问题验证；3)基于对抗性负能力问题的新验证协议，映射到已建立的本体反模式并通过SHACL约束强制执行。
AI.result: 成功开发了AnIML Ontology形式化AnIML语义并实现与Allotrope Data Format的对齐；通过多层次验证证明了本体在支持跨系统语义互操作性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: AnIML Ontology能够有效解决AnIML数据格式的语义歧义问题，通过与Allotrope Data Format的对齐为未来跨系统和跨实验室的互操作性提供了基础。提出的对抗性负能力问题验证协议为本体验证提供了新的方法论贡献。

title: Director: Instance-aware Gaussian Splatting for Dynamic Scene Modeling and Understanding
summary: Volumetric video seeks to model dynamic scenes as temporally coherent 4D representations. While recent Gaussian-based approaches achieve impressive rendering fidelity, they primarily emphasize appearance but are largely agnostic to instance-level structure, limiting stable tracking and semantic reasoning in highly dynamic scenarios. In this paper, we present Director, a unified spatio-temporal Gaussian representation that jointly models human performance, high-fidelity rendering, and instance-level semantics.
