Our key insight is that embedding instance-consistent semantics naturally complements 4D modeling, enabling more accurate scene decomposition while supporting robust dynamic scene understanding. To this end, we leverage temporally aligned instance masks and sentence embeddings derived from Multimodal Large Language Models to supervise the learnable semantic features of each Gaussian via two MLP decoders, enabling language-aligned 4D representations and enforcing identity consistency over time. To enhance temporal stability, we bridge 2D optical flow with 4D Gaussians and finetune their motions, yielding reliable initialization and reducing drift. For the training, we further introduce a geometry-aware SDF constraints, along with regularization terms that enforces surface continuity, enhancing temporal coherence in dynamic foreground modeling. Experiments demonstrate that Director achieves temporally coherent 4D reconstructions while simultaneously enabling instance segmentation and open-vocabulary querying.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Director，一个统一的时空高斯表示框架，联合建模人体动作、高保真渲染和实例级语义。该方法利用多模态大语言模型生成的实例掩码和句子嵌入来监督高斯语义特征，实现语言对齐的4D表示并保持身份一致性。
AI.motivation: 当前基于高斯的体素视频方法虽然实现了令人印象深刻的渲染保真度，但主要强调外观而忽略实例级结构，在高度动态场景中限制了稳定的跟踪和语义推理能力。
AI.method: 1. 利用多模态大语言模型生成的时序对齐实例掩码和句子嵌入，通过两个MLP解码器监督高斯的可学习语义特征，实现语言对齐的4D表示并保持身份一致性；2. 桥接2D光流与4D高斯并微调其运动，增强时序稳定性；3. 引入几何感知的SDF约束和表面连续性正则化项，增强动态前景建模的时序一致性。
AI.result: Director实现了时序连贯的4D重建，同时支持实例分割和开放词汇查询。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过将实例级语义嵌入与4D高斯表示相结合，成功实现了时序一致性建模与语义理解的统一，为动态场景理解提供了新的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on Gaussian Splatting for 4D scene reconstruction and rendering (computer graphics), not 3D human motion generation. While it addresses temporal consistency and uses VLMs, the application domain is fundamentally different - it's about rendering quality and 4D reconstruction, not about generating human motion from 2D videos. The pain points in the profile relate to video-to-motion translation, while this paper deals with instance-aware scene modeling for rendering purposes.

title: Solving the Two-dimensional single stock size Cuting Stock Problem with SAT and MaxSAT
summary: Cutting rectangular items from stock sheets to satisfy demands while minimizing waste is a central manufacturing task. The Two-Dimensional Single Stock Size Cutting Stock Problem (2D-CSSP) generalizes bin packing by requiring multiple copies of each item type, which causes a strong combinatorial blow-up. We present a SAT-based framework where item types are expanded by demand, each copy has a sheet-assignment variable and non-overlap constraints are activated only for copies assigned to the same sheet. We also introduce an infeasible-orientation elimination rule that fixes rotation variables when only one orientation can fit the sheet. For minimizing the number of sheets, we compare three approaches: non-incremental SAT with binary search, incremental SAT with clause reuse across iterations and weighted partial MaxSAT. On the Cui--Zhao benchmark suite, our best SAT configurations certify two to three times more instances as provably optimal and achieve lower optimality gaps than OR-Tools, CPLEX and Gurobi. The relative ranking among SAT approaches depends on rotation: incremental SAT is strongest without rotation, while non-incremental SAT is more effective when rotation increases formula size.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于SAT的二维切割库存问题(2D-CSSP)求解框架，通过将item类型按需求展开、引入sheet分配变量、仅对同一sheet上的副本激活非重叠约束，以及不可行方向消除规则来求解。实验表明该方法在Cui-Zhao基准测试上比现有求解器更优。
AI.motivation: 二维单库存尺寸切割库存问题(2D-CSS P)是制造业中的核心任务，需要从板材上切割多个矩形件以满足需求并最小化浪费。该问题是装箱问题的推广，由于需要多个副本导致组合爆炸，现有方法难以有效求解。
AI.method: 提出SAT求解框架：1)将item类型按需求展开为独立副本；2)每个副本有sheet分配变量；3)非重叠约束仅对分配到同一sheet的副本激活；4)引入不可行方向消除规则，当只有一个方向能放入sheet时固定旋转变量；5)最小化sheet数量时比较三种方法：非增量SAT+二分搜索、增量SAT+子句复用、加权部分MaxSAT。
AI.result: 在Cui-Zhao基准测试集上最佳SAT配置可证明最优的实例数量是OR-Tools、CPLEX和Gurobi的2-3倍，且最优性间隙更低。SAT方法排名取决于旋转：增量SAT在无旋转时最强，非增量SAT在旋转增加公式规模时更有效。
AI.conclusion: 基于SAT的求解框架能有效处理2D-CSSP问题，不同的SAT策略适用于不同的旋转配置。该方法在证明最优性和降低最优性间隙方面显著优于现有商业求解器，为组合优化问题的可满足性求解提供了新的思路。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses the 2D Cutting Stock Problem in manufacturing using SAT/MaxSAT solvers - a combinatorial optimization problem. Completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is manufacturing/operations research, not computer graphics, video generation, or motion synthesis. No overlap in methods or objectives.

title: AeroTherm-GPT: A Verification-Centered LLM Framework for Thermal Protection System Engineering Workflows
summary: Integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) into hypersonic thermal protection system (TPS) design is bottlenecked by cascading constraint violations when generating executable simulation artifacts. General-purpose LLMs, treating generation as single-pass text completion, fail to satisfy the sequential, multi-gate constraints inherent in safety-critical engineering workflows. To address this, we propose AeroTherm-GPT, the first TPS-specialized LLM Agent, instantiated through a Constraint-Closed-Loop Generation (CCLG) framework. CCLG organizes TPS artifact generation as an iterative workflow comprising generation, validation, CDG-guided repair, execution, and audit. The Constraint Dependency Graph (CDG) encodes empirical co-resolution structure among constraint categories, directing repair toward upstream fault candidates based on lifecycle ordering priors and empirical co-resolution probabilities. This upstream-priority mechanism resolves multiple downstream violations per action, achieving a Root-Cause Fix Efficiency of 4.16 versus 1.76 for flat-checklist repair. Evaluated on HyTPS-Bench and validated against external benchmarks, AeroTherm-GPT achieves 88.7% End-to-End Success Rate (95% CI: 87.5-89.9), a gain of +12.5 pp over the matched non-CDG ablation baseline, without catastrophic forgetting on scientific reasoning and code generation tasks.

AI.tldr: AeroTherm-GPT是首个专门用于高超音速热防护系统(TPS)设计的LLM Agent，通过约束闭环生成(CCLG)框架解决TPS设计中约束层级冲突的难题。该方法利用约束依赖图(CDG)编码约束间的经验共解结构，以上游优先机制引导修复，实现88.7%的端到端成功率。
AI.motivation: 将大型语言模型(LLM)集成到高超音速热防护系统(TPS)设计中面临瓶颈：当生成可执行仿真工件时，会出现级联约束违规问题。通用LLM将生成视为单次文本补全，无法满足安全关键工程工作流程中固有的顺序性、多门约束。
AI.method: 提出约束闭环生成(CCLG)框架，将TPS工件生组织为迭代工作流，包括生成、验证、CDG引导修复、执行和审计。约束依赖图(CDG)编码约束类别间的经验共解结构，根据生命周期排序先验和经验共解概率将修复引导至上游故障候选。上游优先机制可每次动作解决多个下游违规。
AI.result: AeroTherm-GPT在HyTPS-Bench上评估，达到88.7%的端到端成功率(95% CI: 87.5-89.9)，比匹配的的非CDG消融基线提升+12.5个百分点。根因修复效率达到4.16，而扁平检查表修复仅为1.76。在科学推理和代码生成任务上未发生灾难性遗忘。
AI.conclusion: 通过CCLG框架和CDG引导的上游优先修复机制，AeroTherm-GPT有效解决了TPS设计中约束级联违规的核心挑战，为安全关键工程领域的LLM应用提供了新范式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about using LLMs for thermal protection system (TPS) design in aerospace engineering - completely different field from Computer Graphics and 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain (aerospace engineering) has no match with the research profile (3D human motion generation). The methods used (constraint dependency graphs, verification-centered LLM frameworks) are unrelated to the methods needed (VLMs, video generation models, 3D motion generation). The pain points addressed (constraint violation in engineering workflows) are entirely different from the profile's pain points (domain gap, temporal consistency, quality control for video-to-motion translation).

title: From Understanding to Erasing: Towards Complete and Stable Video Object Removal
summary: Video object removal aims to eliminate target objects from videos while plausibly completing missing regions and preserving spatio-temporal consistency. Although diffusion models have recently advanced this task, it remains challenging to remove object-induced side effects (e.g., shadows, reflections, and illumination changes) without compromising overall coherence. This limitation stems from the insufficient physical and semantic understanding of the target object and its interactions with the scene. In this paper, we propose to introduce understanding into erasing from two complementary perspectives. Externally, we introduce a distillation scheme that transfers the relationships between objects and their induced effects from vision foundation models to video diffusion models. Internally, we propose a framewise context cross-attention mechanism that grounds each denoising block in informative, unmasked context surrounding the target region. External and internal guidance jointly enable our model to understand the target object, its induced effects, and the global background context, resulting in clear and coherent object removal. Extensive experiments demonstrate our state-of-the-art performance, and we establish the first real-world benchmark for video object removal to facilitate future research and community progress. Our code, data, and models are available at: https://github.com/WeChatCV/UnderEraser.

AI.tldr: 视频目标移除任务，旨在消除视频中的目标物体并 plausibly 完成缺失区域，同时保持时空一致性。近年来扩散模型虽然推动了该任务的发展，但移除目标物体引起的副作用（如阴影、反射、光照变化）仍然具有挑战性，容易影响整体连贯性。
AI.motivation: 当前方法的局限性在于对目标物体及其与场景交互的物理和语义理解不足，导致无法有效移除目标引起的副作用（阴影、反射、光照变化）同时保持视频整体连贯性。
AI.method: 提出从两个互补角度引入理解能力：1) 外部引导：蒸馏方案，将目标物体与其引起的副作用之间的关系从视觉基础模型迁移到视频扩散模型；2) 内部引导：帧间上下文交叉注意力机制，使每个去噪块基于目标区域周围的信息丰富的未掩码上下文进行构建。
AI.result: 在实验中取得了最先进的性能，并建立了首个视频目标移除的真实世界基准数据集。
AI.conclusion: 外部和内部引导共同使模型能够理解目标物体、其引起的副作用以及全局背景上下文，从而实现清晰且连贯的目标移除效果。

relevance_reason: This paper is about VIDEO OBJECT REMOVAL (video editing/inpainting), not 3D HUMAN MOTION GENERATION. Although both use diffusion models and mention "temporal consistency," the application domains are completely different. The research profile is about generating 3D human motion from 2D videos, while this paper is about removing objects from videos and filling in gaps. This is a video editing task, not a motion generation task - they are in entirely different subfields of computer graphics.

title: Domain-constrained knowledge representation: A modal framework
summary: Knowledge graphs store large numbers of relations efficiently, but they remain weak at representing a quieter difficulty: the meaning of a concept often shifts with the domain in which it is used. A triple such as Apple, instance-of, Company may be acceptable in one setting while being misleading or unusable in another. In most current systems, domain information is attached as metadata, qualifiers, or graph-level organization. These mechanisms help with filtering and provenance, but they usually do not alter the formal status of the assertion itself. This paper argues that domain should be treated as part of knowledge representation rather than as supplementary annotation. It introduces the Domain-Contextualized Concept Graph (DCG), a framework in which domain is written into the relation and interpreted as a modal world constraint. In the DCG form (C, R at D, C'), the marker at D identifies the world in which the relation holds. Formally, the relation is interpreted through a domain-indexed necessity operator, so that truth, inference, and conflict checking are all scoped to the relevant world. This move has three consequences: ambiguous concepts can be disambiguated at the point of representation; invalid assertions can be challenged against their domain; cross-domain relations can be connected through explicit predicates. The paper develops this claim through a Kripke-style semantics, a compact predicate system, a Prolog implementation, and mappings to RDF, OWL, and relational databases. The contribution is a representational reinterpretation of domain itself. The central claim is that many practical failures in knowledge systems begin when domain is treated as external to the assertion. DCG addresses that by giving domain a structural and computable role inside the representation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出域上下文概念图(DCG)框架，将域信息作为模态世界约束嵌入知识表示中，解决知识图谱中概念歧义和跨域推理问题。
AI.motivation: 知识图谱中概念含义常随使用领域变化（如"Apple"在科技vs食物领域有不同含义），当前系统仅将域作为元数据或筛选条件，未改变断言本身的形式地位，导致表示失效。
AI.method: 提出DCG形式化框架，引入(C, R at D, C')表示法，将域标记为模态世界约束；建立Kripke风格语义学、紧凑谓词系统、Prolog实现及到RDF/OWL/关系数据库的映射。
AI.result: 实现三方面效果：1)在表示点消解歧义；2)针对域验证断言有效性；3)通过显式谓词连接跨域关系。
AI.conclusion: 域应作为知识表示的内在组成部分而非外部注释。DCG通过赋予域结构化和可计算的角色，解决了知识系统中因域外部化导致的实际失败问题。

relevance_reason: This paper is about knowledge graph representation and knowledge representation frameworks (DCG), completely unrelated to 3D human motion generation. The application domains are entirely different - one deals with semantic knowledge representation and concept disambiguation in information systems, while the research profile focuses on computer graphics for video-to-motion generation. No overlap in methods or application domains.

title: Not All Tokens See Equally: Perception-Grounded Policy Optimization for Large Vision-Language Models
summary: While Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has advanced reasoning in Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), prevailing frameworks suffer from a foundational methodological flaw: by distributing identical advantages across all generated tokens, these methods inherently dilute the learning signals essential for optimizing the critical, visually-grounded steps of multimodal reasoning. To bridge this gap, we formulate \textit{Token Visual Dependency}, quantifying the causal information gain of visual inputs via the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence between visual-conditioned and text-only predictive distributions. Revealing that this dependency is highly sparse and semantically pivotal, we introduce Perception-Grounded Policy Optimization (PGPO), which is a novel fine-grained credit assignment framework that dynamically reshapes advantages at the token level. Through a threshold-gated, mass-conserving mechanism, PGPO actively amplifies learning signals for visually-dependent tokens while suppressing gradient noise from linguistic priors. Extensive experiments based on the Qwen2.5-VL series across seven challenging multimodal reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that PGPO boosts models by 18.7% on average. Both theoretical and empirical analyses confirm that PGPO effectively reduces gradient variance, prevents training collapse, and acts as a potent regularizer for robust, perception-grounded multimodal reasoning. Code will be published on https://github.com/Yzk1114/PGPO.

AI.tldr: 针对RLVR在视觉语言模型中token优势分配均匀导致视觉信号稀释的问题，提出Token Visual Dependency概念和PGPO框架，通过KL散度量化视觉依赖性并在token级别精细化分配学习信号，实现多模态推理能力的显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR方法存在基础方法论缺陷：所有生成token分配相同优势，导致优化多模态推理中关键视觉接地步骤的学习信号被稀释。
AI.method: 提出Token Visual Dependency量化指标，通过KL散度衡量视觉输入对token预测的因果信息增益；设计PGPO框架，采用阈值门控的质量守恒机制，在token级别动态调整优势值，放大视觉依赖token的学习信号，抑制语言先验带来的梯度噪声。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-VL系列模型上，针对7个挑战性多模态推理基准进行广泛实验，结果显示PGPO平均提升模型性能18.7%。理论和实证分析均表明PGPO有效降低梯度方差、防止训练崩溃，并作为强效正则化器实现稳健的感知接地多模态推理。
AI.conclusion: PGPO通过token级别的精细化信用分配，有效解决了RLVR中视觉信号稀释的核心问题。理论分析和实验结果均验证了该方法能降低梯度方差、防止训练崩溃，并通过感知锚定的正则化机制显著提升模型的视觉推理能力。该工作为多模态大模型的强化学习训练提供了新的方法论框架。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses training/optimization of Large Vision-Language Models for multimodal reasoning tasks (improving token-level advantage assignment in RLVR). The research profile concerns Computer Graphics - specifically 3D human motion generation from 2D video. These are completely different application domains. While both mentioning "VLM", this paper uses VLM for improving multimodal reasoning/understanding, not for quality supervision in video/motion generation. The pain points (domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion, temporal consistency, quality control of generated content) are NOT addressed. This is a machine learning/LLM training paper, not a computer graphics/motion generation paper.

title: Retrieval-aligned Tabular Foundation Models Enable Robust Clinical Risk Prediction in Electronic Health Records Under Real-world Constraints
summary: Clinical prediction from structured electronic health records (EHRs) is challenging due to high dimensionality, heterogeneity, class imbalance, and distribution shift. While tabular in-context learning (TICL) and retrieval-augmented methods perform well on generic benchmarks, their behavior in clinical settings remains unclear. We present a multi-cohort EHR benchmark comparing classical, deep tabular, and TICL models across varying data scale, feature dimensionality, outcome rarity, and cross-cohort generalization. PFN-based TICL models are sample-efficient in low-data regimes but degrade under naive distance-based retrieval as heterogeneity and imbalance increase. We propose AWARE, a task-aligned retrieval framework using supervised embedding learning and lightweight adapters. AWARE improves AUPRC by up to 12.2% under extreme imbalance, with gains increasing with data complexity. Our results identify retrieval quality and retrieval-inference alignment as key bottlenecks for deploying tabular in-context learning in clinical prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个多队列EHR基准测试，用于评估经典机器学习、深度表格模型和表格上下文学习(TICL)模型在临床预测任务上的表现。研究发现PFN-based TICL模型在低数据场景下样本效率高，但在异质性和类别不平衡增加时性能下降。提出了AWARE框架，通过监督嵌入学习和轻量级适配器改进检索质量，在极端不平衡情况下AUPRC提升高达12.2%。
AI.motivation: 临床预测面临高维性、异质性、类别不平衡和分布偏移等挑战。现有的表格上下文学习(TICL)和检索增强方法在通用基准上表现良好，但在临床环境中的行为尚不明确。需要一个系统性的基准测试来评估这些方法在真实临床数据上的表现。
AI.method: 1) 构建多队列EHR基准测试，比较经典、深度表格和TICL模型在不同数据规模、特征维度、结果稀有度和跨队列泛化条件下的表现；2) 提出AWARE框架，采用监督嵌入学习和轻量级适配器实现任务对齐的检索
AI.result: PFN-based TICL模型在低数据场景下样本效率高，但随着异质性和类别不平衡增加，基于距离的朴素检索方法性能下降。AWARE框架在极端不平衡情况下将AUPRC提升高达12.2%，且随着数据复杂度增加，改进效果更加明显。
AI.conclusion: 检索质量和检索-推理对齐是部署表格上下文学习进行临床预测的关键瓶颈。AWARE框架通过改进检索质量有效解决了这一问题，为临床预测中TICL的实际应用提供了有效方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about clinical risk prediction using Electronic Health Records (EHR) data - a healthcare/medical informatics application. The research profile is specifically about Computer Graphics focused on 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains are completely different: medical tabular data analysis vs 3D motion generation from video. There is no overlap in methods or application domain whatsoever.

title: End-to-End Shared Attention Estimation via Group Detection with Feedback Refinement
summary: This paper proposes an end-to-end shared attention estimation method via group detection. Most previous methods estimate shared attention (SA) without detecting the actual group of people focusing on it, or assume that there is a single SA point in a given image. These issues limit the applicability of SA detection in practice and impact performance. To address them, we propose to simultaneously achieve group detection and shared attention estimation using a two step process: (i) the generation of SA heatmaps relying on individual gaze attention heatmaps and group membership scalars estimated in a group inference; (ii) a refinement of the initial group memberships allowing to account for the initial SA heatmaps, and the final prediction of the SA heatmap. Experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms other methods in group detection and shared attention estimation. Additional analyses validate the effectiveness of the proposed components. Code: https://github.com/chihina/sagd-CVPRW2026.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的共享注意力估计方法，通过群体检测来同时解决群体识别和共享注意力估计问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在两个主要局限：1）估计共享注意力时不检测实际群体；2）假设图像中只有一个共享注意力点。这些问题限制了共享注意力检测的实际应用并影响性能。
AI.method: 提出两步骤方法：1）利用群体推理中估计的个体注视注意力热图和群体成员标量生成共享注意力热图；2）基于初始共享注意力热图 refinement 群体成员身份，最终预测共享注意力热图。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在群体检测和共享注意力估计方面均优于其他方法。额外分析验证了所提出组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过同时进行群体检测和共享注意力估计，有效解决了传统方法的局限性，并在性能上取得了显著提升。

relevance_reason: This paper is about shared attention estimation and group detection in computer vision/social perception - completely different application domain from 3D Human Motion Generation. While both involve human analysis, the goal here is detecting where groups of people are looking jointly in images, not generating 3D motion from video. The methods (attention heatmaps, group detection) and application (social scene understanding) have no connection to visual-to-motion translation, temporal motion consistency, or video-based 3D motion generation which is what the research profile requires.

title: Efficient Constraint Generation for Stochastic Shortest Path Problems
summary: Stochastic Shortest Path problems (SSPs) are traditionally solved by computing each state's cost-to-go by applying Bellman backups. A Bellman backup updates a state's cost-to-go by iterating through every applicable action, computing the cost-to-go after applying each one, and selecting a minimal action's cost-to-go. State-of-the-art algorithms use heuristic functions; these give an initial estimate of costs-to-go, and lets the algorithm apply Bellman backups only to promising states, determined by low estimated costs-to-go. However, each Bellman backup still considers all applicable actions, even if the heuristic tells us that some of these actions are too expensive, with the effect that such algorithms waste time on unhelpful actions. To address this gap we present a technique that uses the heuristic to avoid expensive actions, by reframing heuristic search in terms of linear programming and introducing an efficient implementation of constraint generation for SSPs. We present CG-iLAO*, a new algorithm that adapts iLAO* with our novel technique, and considers only 40% of iLAO*'s actions on many problems, and as few as 1% on some. Consequently, CG-iLAO* computes on average 3.5x fewer costs-to-go for actions than the state-of-the-art iLAO* and LRTDP, enabling it to solve problems faster an average of 2.8x and 3.7x faster, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CG-iLAO*算法，通过线性规划约束生成技术，利用启发式信息在搜索早期排除昂贵动作，解决传统SSP算法在Bellman备份中仍需评估所有动作的效率问题，显著提升求解速度。
AI.motivation: 现有状态-of-the-art算法（如iLAO*、LRTDP）虽然使用启发式函数指导搜索，仅对有前景的状态应用Bellman备份，但每个Bellman备份仍需考虑所有适用动作，即使启发式已明确告知某些动作代价过高，导致算法在无用动作上浪费时间。
AI.method: 将启发式搜索重新框架为线性规划问题，并引入针对SSP的约束生成技术的高效实现。CG-iLAO*算法在iLAO*基础上融入这一新技术，根据启发式评估主动排除昂贵动作，而非在每次Bellman备份时考虑所有适用动作。
AI.result: CG-iLAO*在多数问题上仅需考虑iLAO*约40%的动作，某些问题低至1%。相比iLAO*和LRTDP，该算法平均减少3.5倍的动作代价计算量，求解速度分别提升2.8倍和3.7倍。
AI.conclusion: CG-iLAO*通过约束生成技术显著减少了需要评估的动作数量，仅需考虑iLAO*中40%的动作（某些问题低至1%），平均计算动作代价的次数减少3.5倍，从而使算法比iLAO*快2.8倍，比LRTDP快3.7倍。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI planning algorithms (CG-iLAO* for Stochastic Shortest Path problems) and has nothing to do with Computer Graphics or 3D Human Motion Generation. It addresses heuristic search optimization in planning, not visual-to-motion translation, video generation, or any computer graphics domain. The application domain is completely different - this is AI/Planning research focused on robotic path planning optimization, not human motion generation or computer graphics.

title: SteerFlow: Steering Rectified Flows for Faithful Inversion-Based Image Editing
summary: Recent advances in flow-based generative models have enabled training-free, text-guided image editing by inverting an image into its latent noise and regenerating it under a new target conditional guidance. However, existing methods struggle to preserve source fidelity: higher-order solvers incur additional model inferences, truncated inversion constrains editability, and feature injection methods lack architectural transferability. To address these limitations, we propose SteerFlow, a model-agnostic editing framework with strong theoretical guarantees on source fidelity. In the forward process, we introduce an Amortized Fixed-Point Solver that implicitly straightens the forward trajectory by enforcing velocity consistency across consecutive timesteps, yielding a high-fidelity inverted latent. In the backward process, we introduce Trajectory Interpolation, which adaptively blends target-editing and source-reconstruction velocities to keep the editing trajectory anchored to the source. To further improve background preservation, we introduce an Adaptive Masking mechanism that spatially constrains the editing signal with concept-guided segmentation and source-target velocity differences. Extensive experiments on FLUX.1-dev and Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium demonstrate that SteerFlow consistently achieves better editing quality than existing methods. Finally, we show that SteerFlow extends naturally to a complex multi-turn editing paradigm without accumulating drift.

AI.tldr: SteerFlow是一个模型无关的图像编辑框架，通过Amortized Fixed-Point Solver在反演时保持高保真度，Trajectory Interpolation在编辑时保持轨迹锚定，以及Adaptive Masking机制保护背景，在FLUX.1-dev和SD3.5 Medium上持续优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于流的图像编辑方法在保持源保真度方面存在困难：高阶求解器需额外模型推理，截断反演限制可编辑性，特征注入方法缺乏架构可转移性
AI.method: 1) 前向过程：引入Amortized Fixed-Point Solver，通过强制连续时间步之间的速度一致性隐式拉直前向轨迹，产生高保真反演潜在变量；2) 后向过程：引入Trajectory Interpolation，自适应混合目标编辑和源重建速度；3) Adaptive Masking机制：通过概念引导分割和源-目标速度差异空间约束编辑信号
AI.result: 在FLUX.1-dev和Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium上，SteerFlow持续取得更好的编辑质量，并可自然扩展到复杂的多轮编辑范式而不会累积漂移
AI.conclusion: SteerFlow是一个模型无关的编辑框架，具有强大的源保真度理论保证。该方法通过前向过程隐式拉直轨迹，后向过程自适应混合速度，以及自适应掩码机制保持背景。在FLUX.1-dev和SD3.5 Medium上持续优于现有方法，并可自然扩展到多轮编辑而不会累积漂移。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 2D IMAGE EDITING using flow-based diffusion models (FLUX.1-dev, Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium). The application domain is completely different from 3D Human Motion Generation. While both involve diffusion/flow models, this paper focuses on image manipulation (inversion, editing, fidelity preservation) rather than generating 3D human motion from video. The pain points (domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion, temporal consistency for visual-to-motion translation) are not addressed. This is a case of using similar methods (diffusion/flow) in a completely different application domain.

title: Probabilistic classification from possibilistic data: computing Kullback-Leibler projection with a possibility distribution
summary: We consider learning with possibilistic supervision for multi-class classification. For each training instance, the supervision is a normalized possibility distribution that expresses graded plausibility over the classes. From this possibility distribution, we construct a non-empty closed convex set of admissible probability distributions by combining two requirements: probabilistic compatibility with the possibility and necessity measures induced by the possibility distribution, and linear shape constraints that must be satisfied to preserve the qualitative structure of the possibility distribution. Thus, classes with the same possibility degree receive equal probabilities, and if a class has a strictly larger possibility degree than another class, then it receives a strictly larger probability. Given a strictly positive probability vector output by a model for an instance, we compute its Kullback-Leibler projection onto the admissible set. This projection yields the closest admissible probability distribution in Kullback-Leibler sense. We can then train the model by minimizing the divergence between the prediction and its projection, which quantifies the smallest adjustment needed to satisfy the induced dominance and shape constraints. The projection is computed with Dykstra's algorithm using Bregman projections associated with the negative entropy, and we provide explicit formulas for the projections onto each constraint set. Experiments conducted on synthetic data and on a real-world natural language inference task, based on the ChaosNLI dataset, show that the proposed projection algorithm is efficient enough for practical use, and that the resulting projection-based learning objective can improve predictive performance.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于可能性理论的多分类学习方法，通过构建 admissible probability set 并使用 Dykstra 算法计算 Kullback-Leibler 投影来训练模型，从而保证预测结果满足可能性分布诱导的支配关系和形状约束。
AI.motivation: 现有的可能性监督学习方法通常直接将可能性分布作为软标签，忽略了可能性分布与概率分布之间的语义差异，缺乏对概率预测的显式约束机制，导致模型可能违反可能性分布所表达的定性偏好关系。
AI.method: 1. 从可能性分布构建非空闭凸的 admissible probability set，结合概率兼容性约束和线性形状约束（相同 possibility degree 的类具有相同概率，较大 possibility degree 的类具有较大概率）；2. 对模型输出的正概率向量计算其到 admissible set 的 KL 散度投影；3. 使用 Dykstra 算法和负熵关联的 Bregman 投影计算投影，并给出显式投影公式；4. 最小化预测与投影之间的散度作为训练目标。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实自然语言推理任务（ChaosNLI）上的实验表明，投影算法具有足够的实用效率，且基于投影的学习目标能够提升预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功地将可能性理论中的定性偏好信息嵌入到概率学习框架中，通过 KL 投影机制确保模型输出满足可能性分布的结构化约束，为可能性监督学习提供了一种原则性的训练范式。

relevance_reason: The paper is about possibility theory for multi-class classification in natural language inference (NLP), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain (NLP classification vs. 3D human motion synthesis from video) is entirely different, and the methods (possibility theory, KL projection, Dykstra algorithm vs. VLM, video generation models, motion generation) have no relevance to the research profile's needs.

title: Unifying UAV Cross-View Geo-Localization via 3D Geometric Perception
summary: Cross-view geo-localization for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) operating in GNSS-denied environments remains challenging due to the severe geometric discrepancy between oblique UAV imagery and orthogonal satellite maps. Most existing methods address this problem through a decoupled pipeline of place retrieval and pose estimation, implicitly treating perspective distortion as appearance noise rather than an explicit geometric transformation. In this work, we propose a geometry-aware UAV geo-localization framework that explicitly models the 3D scene geometry to unify coarse place recognition and fine-grained pose estimation within a single inference pipeline. Our approach reconstructs a local 3D scene from multi-view UAV image sequences using a Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT), and renders a virtual Bird's-Eye View (BEV) representation that orthorectifies the UAV perspective to align with satellite imagery. This BEV serves as a geometric intermediary that enables robust cross-view retrieval and provides spatial priors for accurate 3 Degrees of Freedom (3-DoF) pose regression. To efficiently handle multiple location hypotheses, we introduce a Satellite-wise Attention Block that isolates the interaction between each satellite candidate and the reconstructed UAV scene, preventing inter-candidate interference while maintaining linear computational complexity. In addition, we release a recalibrated version of the University-1652 dataset with precise coordinate annotations and spatial overlap analysis, enabling rigorous evaluation of end-to-end localization accuracy. Extensive experiments on the refined University-1652 benchmark and SUES-200 demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving robust meter-level localization accuracy and improved generalization in complex urban environments.

AI.tldr: 提出几何感知的无人机地理定位框架(GA-Geo)，通过VGGT重建3D场景并渲染BEV正射校正视角，结合卫星注意力块实现端到端跨视图检索和3-DoF姿态回归，在University-1652和SUES-200上达到领先性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将视角畸变视为外观噪声，采用解耦的检索+姿态估计流程，未能显式建模3D几何。本文旨在通过显式建模3D场景几何来统一跨视图检索和姿态估计。
AI.method: 1) 使用VGGT从多视角无人机图像序列重建局部3D场景；2) 渲染虚拟鸟瞰视图(BEV)将倾斜无人机视角正射校正以对齐卫星图；3) 设计卫星注意力块(Satellite-wise Attention Block)处理多个位置假设，防止候选间干扰并保持线性计算复杂度；4) 端到端统一粗检索和细姿态估计。
AI.result: 在精调的University-1652和SUES-200数据集上显著优于当前最先进基线方法，实现鲁棒的米级定位精度。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的GA-Geo方法在University-1652和SUES-200数据集上显著优于现有方法，实现了鲁棒的米级定位精度和复杂城市环境的良好泛化能力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about UAV/drone cross-view geo-localization and navigation, not 3D human motion generation. While it mentions "3D geometric perception" and "3-DoF pose estimation", these refer to drone pose and location in physical space, not human body motion. The application domain is completely different - drone navigation vs. visual-to-motion translation for human animation. The methods (VGGT 3D reconstruction, satellite imagery) are specific to aerial navigation and have no relevance to generating human motions from video.

title: Qiana: A First-Order Formalism to Quantify over Contexts and Formulas with Temporality
summary: We introduce Qiana, a logic framework for reasoning on formulas that are true only in specific contexts. In Qiana, it is possible to quantify over both formulas and contexts to express, e.g., that ``everyone knows everything Alice says''. Qiana also permits paraconsistent logics within contexts, so that contexts can contain contradictions. Furthermore, Qiana is based on first-order logic, and is finitely axiomatizable, so that Qiana theories are compatible with pre-existing first-order logic theorem provers. We show how Qiana can be used to represent temporality, event calculus, and modal logic. We also discuss different design alternatives of Qiana.

AI.tldr: Qiana是一个基于一阶逻辑的逻辑框架，用于推理在特定上下文中才为真的公式。它允许对公式和上下文进行量化，支持上下文内的次协调逻辑（允许矛盾存在），并且可 finitely axiomatizable，可与现有的一阶逻辑定理证明器兼容。
AI.motivation: 现有逻辑框架难以表达"仅在特定上下文中为真"这一概念，也无法方便地量化 over formulas和contexts，无法处理上下文中的矛盾情况。
AI.method: 基于一阶逻辑构建Qiana框架，设计了一套有限公理化系统，使其兼容现有的一阶逻辑定理证明器。
AI.result: Qiana可以表示时间性、事件演算和模态逻辑，并提供了多种设计选择。
AI.conclusion: Qiana是一个灵活且实用的逻辑框架，能够处理上下文相关的公式推理，同时保持与一阶逻辑的兼容性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about mathematical logic and first-order formal reasoning frameworks, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D Human Motion Generation. There is no application domain match - it's about logical frameworks for reasoning about contexts and formulas, not about visual-to-motion translation, video generation, or any computer graphics domain. The methods are also entirely different (logical axiom systems vs. diffusion models, VLMs, motion generation models).

title: Ultrasound-CLIP: Semantic-Aware Contrastive Pre-training for Ultrasound Image-Text Understanding
summary: Ultrasound imaging is widely used in clinical diagnostics due to its real-time capability and radiation-free nature. However, existing vision-language pre-training models, such as CLIP, are primarily designed for other modalities, and are difficult to directly apply to ultrasound data, which exhibit heterogeneous anatomical structures and diverse diagnostic attributes. To bridge this gap, we construct US-365K, a large-scale ultrasound image-text dataset containing 365k paired samples across 52 anatomical categories. We establish Ultrasonographic Diagnostic Taxonomy (UDT) containing two hierarchical knowledge frameworks. Ultrasonographic Hierarchical Anatomical Taxonomy standardizes anatomical organization, and Ultrasonographic Diagnostic Attribute Framework formalizes nine diagnostic dimensions, including body system, organ, diagnosis, shape, margins, echogenicity, internal characteristics, posterior acoustic phenomena, and vascularity. Building upon these foundations, we propose Ultrasound-CLIP, a semantic-aware contrastive learning framework that introduces semantic soft labels and semantic loss to refine sample discrimination. Moreover, we construct a heterogeneous graph modality derived from UDAF's textual representations, enabling structured reasoning over lesion-attribute relations. Extensive experiments with patient-level data splitting demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on classification and retrieval benchmarks, while also delivering strong generalization to zero-shot, linear probing, and fine-tuning tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了大规模超声图像-文本数据集 US-365K（365k样本，52个解剖类别），提出超声诊断分类学 UDT，并在此基础上开发了 Ultrasound-CLIP 语义感知对比学习框架，通过语义软标签和异构图模态实现超声图像的精准分类与检索。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言预训练模型（如 CLIP）主要针对其他模态设计，难以直接应用于超声数据。超声图像具有异质性解剖结构和多样化诊断属性的特点，需要专门针对超声领域进行适配。
AI.method: 本文提出 Ultrasound-CLIP 框架，采用语义感知对比学习策略，引入语义软标签和语义损失来提升样本区分能力。同时构建了来自 UDAF 文本表示的异构图模态，实现对病变-属性关系的结构化推理。实验采用患者级别数据划分进行验证。
AI.result: 在分类和检索基准测试中达到最先进性能，同时在零样本、线性探测和微调任务上展现出强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的 Ultrasound-CLIP 在超声图像-文本预训练任务上取得了显著进展，通过构建大规模 US-365K 数据集和诊断分类学框架 UDT，有效解决了现有视觉-语言模型在超声领域的适应性问题。实验表明该方法在分类、检索以及零样本、线性探测和微调任务上都达到了最先进的性能水平，具有较强的泛化能力。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about medical imaging (ultrasound image-text understanding for diagnostic classification/retrieval), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely different - medical diagnostics vs. human motion synthesis from video. Although both use vision-language models (CLIP), the purpose, data, and domain are completely unrelated. The paper does not address any of the specified pain points (2D-to-3D domain gap, temporal consistency, video quality control, visual feature extraction for motion).

title: Abnormal Head Movements in Neurological Conditions: A Knowledge-Based Dataset with Application to Cervical Dystonia
summary: Abnormal head movements (AHMs) manifest across a broad spectrum of neurological disorders; however, the absence of a multi-condition resource integrating kinematic measurements, clinical severity scores, and patient demographics constitutes a persistent barrier to the development of AI-driven diagnostic tools. To address this gap, this study introduces NeuroPose-AHM, a knowledge-based dataset of neurologically induced AHMs constructed through a multi-LLM extraction framework applied to 1,430 peer-reviewed publications. The dataset contains 2,756 patient-group-level records spanning 57 neurological conditions, derived from 846 AHM-relevant papers. Inter-LLM reliability analysis confirms robust extraction performance, with study-level classification achieving strong agreement (kappa = 0.822). To demonstrate the dataset's analytical utility, a four-task framework is applied to cervical dystonia (CD), the condition most directly defined by pathological head movement. First, Task 1 performs multi-label AHM type classification (F1 = 0.856). Task 2 constructs the Head-Neck Severity Index (HNSI), a unified metric that normalizes heterogeneous clinical rating scales. The clinical relevance of this index is then evaluated in Task 3, where HNSI is validated against real-world CD patient data, with aligned severe-band proportions (6.7%) providing a preliminary plausibility indication for index calibration within the high severity range. Finally, Task 4 performs bridge analysis between movement-type probabilities and HNSI scores, producing significant correlations (p less than 0.001). These results demonstrate the analytical utility of NeuroPose-AHM as a structured, knowledge-based resource for neurological AHM research. The NeuroPose-AHM dataset is publicly available on Zenodo (https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19386862).

AI.tldr: NeuroPose-AHM是一个知识型数据集，包含2756条患者组级记录，涵盖57种神经疾病条件，用于促进异常头部运动（AHM）的AI驱动诊断工具开发。
AI.motivation: 异常头部运动（AHM）出现在多种神经疾病中，但缺乏整合运动学测量、临床严重程度评分和患者人口统计的多条件资源，这阻碍了AI驱动诊断工具的发展。
AI.method: 通过多LLM提取框架从1430篇同行评审出版物中构建NeuroPose-AHM数据集，包含2756条患者组级记录，跨越57种神经疾病条件。对四个_task进行了验证：多标签AHM类型分类、头部-颈部严重程度指数（HNSI）构建、真实世界CD患者数据验证以及运动类型概率与HNSI分数之间的桥梁分析。
AI.result: 该数据集包含2756条患者组级记录，跨越57种神经疾病条件，源自846篇AHM相关论文。研究水平分类达到强一致性（kappa=0.822）。Task 1的多标签AHM类型分类F1=0.856。Task 3验证了HNSI与真实世界CD患者数据的对齐，严重波段比例（6.7%）初步表明指数校准的合理性。Task 4显示运动类型概率与HNSI分数之间存在显著相关性（p<0.001）。
AI.conclusion: NeuroPose-AHM作为结构化知识型资源，展示了在神经AHM研究中的分析实用性，为AI驱动诊断工具的开发提供了宝贵的数据支持。

relevance_reason: This paper is about a medical dataset for diagnosing abnormal head movements in neurological conditions (Cervical Dystonia). It is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - 3D Human Motion Generation. The research profile is about generating/synthesizing 3D human motion from video for graphics and animation (like video generation models Wanxiang, Seedance), while this paper is about medical diagnostics - measuring and classifying pathological head movements for clinical diagnosis. Even though both mention "head motion," the application domain, purpose, and methods are entirely different. The paper uses LLMs for extracting medical data from publications, not for visual-to-motion translation or video content generation.

title: Control-DINO: Feature Space Conditioning for Controllable Image-to-Video Diffusion
summary: Video models have recently been applied with success to problems in content generation, novel view synthesis, and, more broadly, world simulation. Many applications in generation and transfer rely on conditioning these models, typically through perceptual, geometric, or simple semantic signals, fundamentally using them as generative renderers. At the same time, high-dimensional features obtained from large-scale self-supervised learning on images or point clouds are increasingly used as a general-purpose interface for vision models. The connection between the two has been explored for subject specific editing, aligning and training video diffusion models, but not in the role of a more general conditioning signal for pretrained video diffusion models. Features obtained through self-supervised learning like DINO, contain a lot of entangled information about style, lighting and semantics of the scene. This makes them great at reconstruction tasks but limits their generative capabilities. In this paper, we show how we can use the features for tasks such as video domain transfer and video-from-3D generation. We introduce a lightweight architecture and training strategy that decouples appearance from other features that we wish to preserve, enabling robust control for appearance changes such as stylization and relighting. Furthermore, we show that low spatial resolution can be compensated by higher feature dimensionality, improving controllability in generative rendering from explicit spatial representations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用自监督学习特征（如DINO）作为预训练视频扩散模型的通用 conditioning 信号，实现视频域转换和3D视频生成。通过引入轻量级架构和解耦策略，解耦外观与场景其他特征，实现robust的外观控制（如风格化和重光照）。
AI.motivation: 当前视频扩散模型的 conditioning 信号主要依赖感知、几何或简单语义信号，而自监督特征（如DINO）虽包含丰富的场景风格、光照和语义信息，但因信息纠缠限制了生成能力。现有研究未探索将其作为通用 conditioning 信号用于预训练视频扩散模型。
AI.method: 引入轻量级架构和训练策略，解耦appearance与其他需要保留的特征，使appearance可独立控制，同时利用高维特征补偿低空间分辨率以提升可控性。
AI.result: 实现视频域转换和从3D生成视频，能够robust控制外观变化（风格化和重光照），在低空间分辨率下仍保持良好的可控性。
AI.conclusion: 自监督特征可作为视频扩散模型的通用conditioning信号，通过解耦策略有效实现appearance控制，为视频生成和编辑提供了新的可控生成框架。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on Image-to-Video diffusion for video generation, not 3D Human Motion Generation. While both use diffusion models, the application domains are completely different: the paper generates video frames from images, whereas the research profile is about generating 3D skeletal motion trajectories from visual inputs. The paper does address feature extraction (DINO features) and quality control, which tangentially relates to some pain points, but it doesn't address the core challenge of 2D video to 3D motion translation or temporal consistency for human motion generation. The methods (video diffusion) are similar but applied to a different output domain.

title: SenseMath: Do LLMs Have Number Sense? Evaluating Shortcut Use, Judgment, and Generation
summary: Large language models often default to step-by-step computation even when efficient numerical shortcuts are available. This raises a basic question: do they exhibit number sense in a human-like behavioral sense, i.e., the ability to recognize numerical structure, apply shortcuts when appropriate, and avoid them when they are not? We introduce SenseMath, a controlled benchmark for evaluating structure-sensitive numerical reasoning in LLMs. SenseMath contains 4,800 items spanning eight shortcut categories and four digit scales, with matched strong-shortcut, weak-shortcut, and control variants. It supports three evaluation settings of increasing cognitive demand: Shortcut Use (whether models can apply shortcuts on shortcut-amenable problems); Applicability Judgment (whether they can recognize when a shortcut is appropriate or misleading); and Problem Generation (whether they can generate new problem items that correctly admit a given type of shortcut). Our evaluation across five LLMs, ranging from GPT-4o-mini to Llama-3.1-8B, shows a consistent pattern: when explicitly prompted, models readily adopt shortcut strategies and achieve substantial accuracy gains on shortcut-amenable items (up to 15%), yet under standard chain-of-thought prompting they spontaneously employ such strategies in fewer than 40% of cases, even when they demonstrably possess the requisite capability. Moreover, this competence is confined to the Use level; models systematically over-generalise shortcuts to problems where they do not apply, and fail to generate valid shortcut-bearing problems from scratch. Together, these results suggest that current LLMs exhibit procedural shortcut fluency without the structural understanding of when and why shortcuts work that underlies human number sense.

AI.tldr: 论文提出SenseMath基准测试评估LLM的数字感能力，发现当前模型缺乏结构性的快捷方式理解能力，仅在明确提示下才能应用快捷方式，且会过度泛化快捷方式到不适用场景。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型即使在存在高效数值快捷方式时也默认使用分步计算，这引发了一个基本问题：它们是否表现出类似人类的数字感，即识别数值结构、在适当时应用快捷方式、在不适用时避免使用的能力？
AI.method: 构建了SenseMath基准测试，包含4800个测试项，涵盖8个快捷方式类别和4个数字规模，支持三种评估设置：快捷方式使用（Shortcut Use）、适用性判断（Applicability Judgment）和问题生成（Problem Generation）。对5个LLM进行评估，从GPT-4o-mini到Llama-3.1-8B。
AI.result: 评估结果显示：1）明确提示下模型容易采用快捷方式策略并获得显著准确率提升；2）标准思维链提示下自发使用快捷方式比例低于40%；3）模型系统性地将快捷方式过度泛化到不适用问题；4）无法从零生成有效的快捷方式问题。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM表现出程序性快捷方式流利性，但缺乏人类数字感所具备的结构性理解能力。具体表现为：1）在明确提示下模型能采用快捷方式策略并在快捷方式适用问题上获得高达15%的准确率提升；2）在标准思维链提示下，自发使用快捷方式的比例低于40%；3）能力仅限于"使用"层面，模型系统性地将快捷方式过度泛化到不适用的问题，且无法从零生成有效的快捷方式问题。

relevance_reason: This paper is completely irrelevant to the research profile. The paper is about evaluating LLMs' mathematical reasoning abilities and number sense (NLP/AI field), while the research profile is in Computer Graphics specifically focused on 3D Human Motion Generation. Although the research profile mentions "Visual Language Models (VLM)" for quality supervision, this paper evaluates regular LLMs for mathematical tasks, not VLMs for computer graphics applications. The application domains are entirely different - one deals with video-to-motion translation, temporal consistency, and 3D motion generation, while the other deals with numerical shortcut understanding in math problems. This is a fundamental field mismatch with no relevance to the stated research area.

title: GenGait: A Transformer-Based Model for Human Gait Anomaly Detection and Normative Twin Generation
comment: 13 pages, 6 figures. Preprint submitted to a journal
summary: Gait analysis provides an objective characterization of locomotor function and is widely used to support diagnosis and rehabilitation monitoring across neurological and orthopedic disorders. Deep learning has been increasingly applied to this domain, yet most approaches rely on supervised classifiers trained on disease-labeled data, limiting generalization to heterogeneous pathological presentations. This work proposes a label-free framework for joint-level anomaly detection and kinematic correction based on a Transformer masked autoencoder trained exclusively on normative gait sequences from 150 adults, acquired with a markerless multi-camera motion-capture system. At inference, a two-pass procedure is applied to potentially pathological input sequences, first it estimates joint inconsistency scores by occluding individual joints and measuring deviations from the learned normative prior. Then, it withholds the flagged joints from the encoder input and reconstructs the full skeleton from the remaining spatiotemporal context, yielding corrected kinematic trajectories at the flagged positions. Validation on 10 held-out normative participants, who mimicked seven simulated gait abnormalities, showed accurate localization of biomechanically inconsistent joints, a significant reduction in angular deviation across all analyzed joints with large effect sizes, and preservation of normative kinematics. The proposed approach enables interpretable, subject-specific localization of gait impairments without requiring disease labels. Video is available at https://youtu.be/Rcm3jqR5pN4.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于Transformer掩码自编码器的无标签步态异常检测和运动学校正框架，仅使用150名成人正常步态数据训练，通过关节遮挡和重建的两步推理程序实现异常定位和校正。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法依赖疾病标记数据训练的监督分类器，对异质性病理表现的泛化能力有限，需要一种无需疾病标签即可通用化应用的步态分析框架。
AI.method: 提出基于Transformer掩码自编码器的无标签框架，使用150名成人正常步态数据训练。两步推理程序：首先通过遮挡单个关节并测量与学习到的正常先验的偏差来估计关节不一致分数；然后将标记的关节从编码器输入中排除，使用剩余的时空上下文重建完整骨骼，生成校正后的运动学轨迹。
AI.result: 在10名模拟七种步态异常的受试者上进行验证，结果显示：能够准确定位生物力学不一致的关节；所有分析关节的角度偏差显著减少且效应量较大；保留了正常运动学特征。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够实现可解释的、针对特定受试者的运动障碍定位，且无需疾病标签即可进行异常检测和运动学校正。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses medical/biomechanical gait analysis (anomaly detection and correction), not Computer Graphics 3D motion generation from video. The research profile focuses on video-to-motion translation, quality control of generated video content, and using VLMs/video generation models. GenGait works with 3D skeletal motion data only (no 2D video input), uses transformer autoencoders (not VLMs or video generation models), and aims to detect/correct abnormal gait patterns for medical purposes. While both deal with human motion, the application domain is fundamentally different - medical motion analysis vs. visual content generation in computer graphics.

title: Hidden Meanings in Plain Sight: RebusBench for Evaluating Cognitive Visual Reasoning
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2026 Workshop: From Human Cognition to AI Reasoning (HCAIR)
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have achieved remarkable proficiency in explicit visual recognition, effectively describing what is directly visible in an image. However, a critical cognitive gap emerges when the visual input serves only as a clue rather than the answer. We identify that current models struggle with the complex, multi-step reasoning required to solve problems where information is not explicitly depicted. Successfully solving a rebus puzzle requires a distinct cognitive workflow: the model must extract visual and textual attributes, retrieve linguistic prior knowledge (such as idioms), and perform abstract mapping to synthesize these elements into a meaning that exists outside the pixel space. To evaluate this neurosymbolic capability, we introduce RebusBench, a benchmark of 1,164 puzzles designed to test this specific integration of perception and knowledge. Our evaluation of state-of-the-art models (including Qwen, InternVL, and LLaVA) shows a severe deficiency: performance saturates below 10% Exact Match and 20% semantic accuracy, with no significant improvement observed from model scaling or In-Context Learning (ICL). These findings suggest that while models possess the necessary visual and linguistic components, they lack the cognitive reasoning glue to connect them. Project page available at https://amirkasaei.com/rebusbench/.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了RebusBench基准测试，评估大型视觉-language模型在解谜(rebus puzzle)方面的多步推理能力。研究发现当前模型在此任务上表现严重不足，精确匹配率低于10%，语义准确率低于20%。
AI.motivation: 当前大型视觉语言模型(LVLMs)在显式视觉识别方面表现优秀，但缺乏一种关键认知能力：当视觉输入仅作为线索而非答案时的复杂多步推理能力。模型难以解决信息未直接显式描绘的问题。
AI.method: 构建了包含1,164个谜题的RebusBench基准测试，评估state-of-the-art模型(Qwen, InternVL, LLaVA)的neurosymbolic能力。测试模型提取视觉和文本属性、检索语言先验知识(如习语)、执行抽象映射的综合能力。
AI.result: 评估结果显示严重不足：精确匹配率低于10%，语义准确率低于20%。模型扩展(scale up)和上下文学习(ICL)均未带来显著改进。
AI.conclusion: 当前LVLMs虽然具备必要的视觉和语言组件，但缺乏连接它们的认知推理"胶水"。需要开发新的方法来解决这种跨模态、多步推理任务。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on evaluating cognitive visual reasoning in Large Vision-Language Models for solving rebus puzzles - an entirely different application domain (AI reasoning/benchmark evaluation). It has NO relevance to 3D Human Motion Generation in Computer Graphics. The paper does not address any of the specified pain points (domain gap, temporal consistency, quality control, feature extraction for motion), nor does it use methods relevant to motion generation. Even though VLMs are mentioned, they are used here for puzzle solving reasoning, not for motion synthesis or video-to-motion translation.

title: DriveDreamer-Policy: A Geometry-Grounded World-Action Model for Unified Generation and Planning
summary: Recently, world-action models (WAM) have emerged to bridge vision-language-action (VLA) models and world models, unifying their reasoning and instruction-following capabilities and spatio-temporal world modeling. However, existing WAM approaches often focus on modeling 2D appearance or latent representations, with limited geometric grounding-an essential element for embodied systems operating in the physical world. We present DriveDreamer-Policy, a unified driving world-action model that integrates depth generation, future video generation, and motion planning within a single modular architecture. The model employs a large language model to process language instructions, multi-view images, and actions, followed by three lightweight generators that produce depth, future video, and actions. By learning a geometry-aware world representation and using it to guide both future prediction and planning within a unified framework, the proposed model produces more coherent imagined futures and more informed driving actions, while maintaining modularity and controllable latency. Experiments on the Navsim v1 and v2 benchmarks demonstrate that DriveDreamer-Policy achieves strong performance on both closed-loop planning and world generation tasks. In particular, our model reaches 89.2 PDMS on Navsim v1 and 88.7 EPDMS on Navsim v2, outperforming existing world-model-based approaches while producing higher-quality future video and depth predictions. Ablation studies further show that explicit depth learning provides complementary benefits to video imagination and improves planning robustness.

AI.tldr: DriveDreamer-Policy是一个统一的驾驶世界-动作模型，整合了深度生成、未来视频生成和运动规划，通过学习几何感知的世界表示来指导未来预测和规划，在Navsim v1和v2基准上分别达到89.2 PDMS和88.7 EPDMS。
AI.motivation: 现有世界动作模型(WAM)方法主要关注2D外观或潜在表示，缺乏几何 grounding，这对于在物理世界中操作的具身系统至关重要。
AI.method: 采用大语言模型处理语言指令、多视角图像和动作，随后通过三个轻量级生成器分别产生深度、未来视频和动作。通过学习几何感知的世界表示来统一指导未来预测和规划。
AI.result: 在Navsim v1上达到89.2 PDMS，Navsim v2上达到88.7 EPDMS，优于现有世界模型方法，并产生更高质量的未来视频和深度预测。消融实验表明显式深度学习为视频想象和规划鲁棒性提供了互补收益。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过整合深度生成、视频生成和运动规划到统一框架中，实现了模块化与可控延迟的平衡，几何感知表示对提升驾驶决策质量具有关键作用。

relevance_reason: This paper is about autonomous driving world-action models (vehicle motion planning), NOT 3D human motion generation. While it uses some similar methods (video generation, depth learning, LLM), the application domain is completely different. The research profile specifically targets Computer Graphics for 3D human motion generation with focus on 2D video to 3D motion translation, whereas this paper focuses on geometry-grounded representations for autonomous vehicle driving and planning. These are fundamentally different application domains despite both dealing with "motion."

title: ProCeedRL: Process Critic with Exploratory Demonstration Reinforcement Learning for LLM Agentic Reasoning
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) significantly enhances the reasoning abilities of large language models (LLMs), yet applying it to multi-turn agentic tasks remains challenging due to the long-horizon nature of interactions and the stochasticity of environmental feedback. We identify a structural failure mode in agentic exploration: suboptimal actions elicit noisy observations into misleading contexts, which further weaken subsequent decision-making, making recovery increasingly difficult. This cumulative feedback loop of errors renders standard exploration strategies ineffective and susceptible to the model's reasoning and the environment's randomness. To mitigate this issue, we propose ProCeedRL: Process Critic with Explorative Demonstration RL, shifting exploration from passive selection to active intervention. ProCeedRL employs a process-level critic to monitor interactions in real time, incorporating reflection-based demonstrations to guide agents in stopping the accumulation of errors. We find that this approach significantly exceeds the model's saturated exploration performance, demonstrating substantial exploratory benefits. By learning from exploratory demonstrations and on-policy samples, ProCeedRL significantly improves exploration efficiency and achieves superior performance on complex deep search and embodied tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProCeedRL方法，通过过程级Critic和探索性演示引导，解决多轮Agent任务中因次优动作导致错误累积的探索难题，在复杂任务上取得显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 将强化学习应用于多轮Agentic任务面临两大挑战：1) 交互的长时序特性；2) 环境反馈的随机性。现有方法难以有效应对。
AI.method: ProCeedRL采用过程级 Critic 实时监控交互过程，结合基于反思的演示来引导智能体主动干预而非被动选择，从而阻止错误累积。具体通过从探索性演示和在线策略样本中学习来实现。
AI.result: 显著超越了模型饱和的探索性能，展现出实质性的探索增益。在复杂深度搜索和具身任务上实现了 superior performance。
AI.conclusion: ProCeedRL通过过程级 Critic 和基于反思的演示，有效解决了多轮Agent任务中的累积错误问题，显著提升了探索效率，在复杂深度搜索和具身任务上取得优异表现。这一工作为强化学习在长时序Agent应用中的探索策略提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: The paper is about reinforcement learning for LLM agentic reasoning (AI/ML), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains are completely different: one deals with multi-turn agent tasks and error accumulation in LLM reasoning, the other deals with generating 3D human motion from 2D video inputs. The methods (RL, Process Critic, LLM agents) have no overlap with the specified methods (VLM, video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance, 3D motion generation models, feature extraction pipelines). This paper does not address any of the pain points (domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion, temporal consistency, quality control, visual guidance feature extraction) mentioned in the research profile.

title: FSKD: Monocular Forest Structure Inference via LiDAR-to-RGBI Knowledge Distillation
summary: Very High Resolution (VHR) forest structure data at individual-tree scale is essential for carbon, biodiversity, and ecosystem monitoring. Still, airborne LiDAR remains costly and infrequent despite being the reference for forest structure metrics like Canopy Height Model (CHM), Plant Area Index (PAI), and Foliage Height Diversity (FHD). We propose FSKD: a LiDAR-to-RGB-Infrared (RGBI) knowledge distillation (KD) framework in which a multi-modal teacher fuses RGBI imagery with LiDAR-derived planar metrics and vertical profiles via cross-attention, and an RGBI-only SegFormer student learns to reproduce these outputs. Trained on 384 $km^2$ of forests in Saxony, Germany (20 cm ground sampling distance (GSD)) and evaluated on eight geographically distinct test tiles, the student achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) zero-shot CHM performance (MedAE 4.17 m, $R^2$=0.51, IoU 0.87), outperforming HRCHM/DAC baselines by 29--46% in MAE (5.81 m vs. 8.14--10.84 m) with stronger correlation coefficients (0.713 vs. 0.166--0.652). Ablations show that multi-modal fusion improves performance by 10--26% over RGBI-only training, and that asymmetric distillation with appropriate model capacity is critical. The method jointly predicts CHM, PAI, and FHD, a multi-metric capability not provided by current monocular CHM estimators, although PAI/FHD transfer remains region-dependent and benefits from local calibration. The framework also remains effective under temporal mismatch (winter LiDAR, summer RGBI), removing strict co-acquisition constraints and enabling scalable 20 cm operational monitoring for workflows such as Digital Twin Germany and national Digital Orthophoto programs.

AI.tldr: 提出FSKD知识蒸馏框架，通过多模态教师（RGBI+LiDAR）训练RGBI-only学生模型，实现零样本预测森林结构指标（CHM/PAI/FHD），在8个不同地理区域测试达到SOTA性能，且支持时间不匹配的跨季节数据融合
AI.motivation: VHR森林结构数据（个体树木尺度）对碳、生物多样性和生态系统监测至关重要，但机载LiDAR成本高且获取频率低，尽管它是森林结构指标（如CHM、PAI、FHD）的参考标准
AI.method: 提出FSKD框架：一个LiDAR到RGB-红外(RGBI)的知识蒸馏框架。多模态教师模型通过交叉注意力融合RGBI图像与LiDAR衍生的平面指标和垂直轮廓；RGBI-only SegFormer学生模型学习复制这些输出。训练数据为德国萨克森384 km²森林（20 cm GSD）
AI.result: 学生在零样本CHM上达到SOTA性能（MedAE=4.17 m, R²=0.51, IoU=0.87），比HRCHM/DAC基线在MAE上提高29-46%（5.81 m vs. 8.14-10.84 m），相关系数更强（0.713 vs. 0.166-0.652）。多模态融合比仅RGBI训练提升10-26%
AI.conclusion: 该方法可联合预测CHM、PAI和FHD，这是当前单目CHM估计器无法提供的多指标能力。框架在时间不匹配（冬季LiDAR，夏季RGBI）下仍有效，消除了严格的共采集约束，支持20 cm运营监测，适用于Digital Twin Germany等/workflows

relevance_reason: This paper is about forest structure inference using LiDAR-to-RGBI knowledge distillation for remote sensing/forestry applications (estimating canopy height, plant area index, etc.). This is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different - forestry monitoring vs human motion generation. There is no connection to video generation, VLMs for quality supervision, or any 3D motion generation methods.

title: ATBench: A Diverse and Realistic Trajectory Benchmark for Long-Horizon Agent Safety
summary: Evaluating the safety of LLM-based agents is increasingly important because risks in realistic deployments often emerge over multi-step interactions rather than isolated prompts or final responses. Existing trajectory-level benchmarks remain limited by insufficient interaction diversity, coarse observability of safety failures, and weak long-horizon realism. We introduce ATBench, a trajectory-level benchmark for structured, diverse, and realistic evaluation of agent safety. ATBench organizes agentic risk along three dimensions: risk source, failure mode, and real-world harm. Based on this taxonomy, we construct trajectories with heterogeneous tool pools and a long-context delayed-trigger protocol that captures realistic risk emergence across multiple stages. The benchmark contains 1,000 trajectories (503 safe and 497 unsafe), averaging 9.01 turns and 3.95k tokens, with 1,954 invoked tools drawn from pools spanning 2,084 available tools. Data quality is supported by rule-based and LLM-based filtering plus full human audit. Experiments on frontier LLMs, open-source models, and specialized guard systems show that ATBench is challenging even for strong evaluators, while enabling taxonomy-stratified analysis, cross-benchmark comparison, and diagnosis of long-horizon failure patterns.

AI.tldr: ATBench是一个用于评估LLM智能体安全的轨迹级基准测试，通过组织智能体风险沿三个维度（风险源、失败模式、现实世界危害）构建多样化和真实的轨迹，包含1000条轨迹，平均9.01轮交互和3.95k tokens，对前沿LLM、开源模型和专业防护系统都具有挑战性。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹级基准测试存在交互多样性不足、安全失败观测粒度粗糙、长期场景现实感弱等问题，而LLM智能体的风险往往在多步交互中显现而非孤立的提示或最终响应，因此需要更完善的安全评估方法。
AI.method: 构建了基于三维度风险组织（风险源、失败模式、现实世界危害）的ATBench基准，使用异构工具池和长上下文延迟触发协议捕捉多阶段风险，包含1000条轨迹（503条安全、497条不安全），使用规则过滤和LLM过滤加人工审计保障数据质量。
AI.result: ATBench对前沿LLM、开源模型和专业防护系统都极具挑战性，支持按风险分类进行分层分析、跨基准比较和长期失败模式诊断。
AI.conclusion: ATBench为LLM智能体安全评估提供了一个结构化、多样化且现实的轨迹级基准，能够有效评估智能体在多步交互中的安全风险，具有重要的应用价值。

relevance_reason: The paper is about LLM agent safety evaluation and trajectory benchmarking for AI safety - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics, 3D Human Motion Generation, video-to-motion translation, or any of the mentioned methods. This is an entirely different application domain (AI safety vs computer graphics).

title: GardenDesigner: Encoding Aesthetic Principles into Jiangnan Garden Construction via a Chain of Agents
summary: Jiangnan gardens, a prominent style of Chinese classical gardens, hold great potential as digital assets for film and game production and digital tourism. However, manual modeling of Jiangnan gardens heavily relies on expert experience for layout design and asset creation, making the process time-consuming. To address this gap, we propose GardenDesigner, a novel framework that encodes aesthetic principles for Jiangnan garden construction and integrates a chain of agents based on procedural modeling. The water-centric terrain and explorative pathway rules are applied by terrain distribution and road generation agents. Selection and spatial layout of garden assets follow the aesthetic and cultural constraints. Consequently, we propose asset selection and layout optimization agents to select and arrange objects for each area in the garden. Additionally, we introduce GardenVerse for Jiangnan garden construction, including expert-annotated garden knowledge to enhance the asset arrangement process. To enable interaction and editing, we develop an interactive interface and tools in Unity, in which non-expert users can construct Jiangnan gardens via text input within one minute. Experiments and human evaluations demonstrate that GardenDesigner can generate diverse and aesthetically pleasing Jiangnan gardens. Project page is available at https://monad-cube.github.io/GardenDesigner.

AI.tldr: GardenDesigner是一个基于程序化建模和多智能体系统的框架,用于自动生成江南古典园林。该框架整合了地形分布、道路生成、资产选择和布局优化等多个智能体,将江南园林的美学原则和文化约束编码到系统中,使用户能够通过文本输入在一分钟内构建园林。引入GardenVerse专家标注知识库增强资产布局,并在Unity中开发交互界面使非专家用户也能创建园林。实验和人类评估表明该框架能够生成多样且美观的江南园林。
AI.motivation: 江南古典园林作为中国古典园林的杰出代表,在影视游戏制作和数字旅游领域具有重要应用价值。然而,传统的人工建模高度依赖专家经验,布局设计和资产创建过程耗时耗力,亟需一种自动化的江南园林生成方法来解决这一瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出一种基于多智能体链的程序化建模框架GardenDesigner,主要包括:(1)地形分布智能体应用以水为中心的地形规则;(2)道路生成智能体应用探索性路径规则;(3)资产选择智能体根据美学和文化约束选择园林资产;(4)布局优化智能体对各区域资产进行空间排列。同时引入包含专家标注知识的GardenVerse知识库增强资产布局过程,并在Unity中开发交互式界面支持文本输入创建园林。
AI.result: GardenDesigner框架能够生成多样且美观的江南园林,非专家用户通过文本输入可在1分钟内完成园林构建。实验和人类评估验证了该方法在园林生成多样性和美学质量方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功将江南园林的美学原则形式化为可计算的设计规则,利用多智能体系统实现程序化园林生成,为数字文旅和影视游戏产业提供了一种高效的园林资产创建方案,降低了江南园林数字化建模的专业门槛。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Jiangnan garden/landscape generation (architectural design) using multi-agent systems, NOT about 3D human motion generation. The application domain is completely different: garden/landscape/architectural scene generation vs character motion/animation. While both involve 3D generation, the target output (static garden scenes vs temporal human motion) and the core research problem (aesthetic layout vs motion synthesis) are entirely different. This falls under computer graphics for architectural visualization, not human motion generation.

title: PTC-Depth: Pose-Refined Monocular Depth Estimation with Temporal Consistency
summary: Monocular depth estimation (MDE) has been widely adopted in the perception systems of autonomous vehicles and mobile robots. However, existing approaches often struggle to maintain temporal consistency in depth estimation across consecutive frames. This inconsistency not only causes jitter but can also lead to estimation failures when the depth range changes abruptly. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a consistency-aware monocular depth estimation framework that leverages wheel odometry from a mobile robot to achieve stable and coherent depth predictions over time. Specifically, we estimate camera pose and sparse depth from triangulation using optical flow between consecutive frames. The sparse depth estimates are used to update a recursive Bayesian estimate of the metric scale, which is then applied to rescale the relative depth predicted by a pre-trained depth estimation foundation model. The proposed method is evaluated on the KITTI, TartanAir, MS2, and our own dataset, demonstrating robust and accurate depth estimation performance.

AI.tldr: 提出一种一致性感知的单目深度估计框架，利用移动机器人轮里程计实现稳定连贯的深度预测，通过光流三角测量和递归贝叶斯尺度估计对预训练深度模型的相对深度进行重新缩量。
AI.motivation: 现有单目深度估计方法难以保持连续帧之间的时间一致性，导致估计抖动和深度范围突变时的估计失败。
AI.method: 利用光流在连续帧之间进行三角测量估计相机位姿和稀疏深度；使用稀疏深度更新递归贝叶斯度量尺度估计；对预训练深度估计基础模型的相对深度进行重新缩量。
AI.result: 在KITTI、TartanAir、MS2和自有数据集上验证了方法的鲁棒性和准确的深度估计性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种利用移动机器人轮里程计的一致性感知单目深度估计框架，通过光流三角测量估计相机位姿和稀疏深度，更新递归贝叶斯度量尺度估计，对预训练深度估计基础模型的相对深度进行重新缩量。在KITTI、TartanAir、MS2和自有数据集上验证了方法的鲁棒性和准确性。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses monocular depth estimation for robotics/mobile agents, not 3D human motion generation. While it deals with temporal consistency, it is in the context of depth estimation for robot navigation, not visual-to-motion translation for human animation. The application domain is completely different - it's computer vision for autonomous systems, not computer graphics for human motion generation.

title: The Latent Space: Foundation, Evolution, Mechanism, Ability, and Outlook
summary: Latent space is rapidly emerging as a native substrate for language-based models. While modern systems are still commonly understood through explicit token-level generation, an increasing body of work shows that many critical internal processes are more naturally carried out in continuous latent space than in human-readable verbal traces. This shift is driven by the structural limitations of explicit-space computation, including linguistic redundancy, discretization bottlenecks, sequential inefficiency, and semantic loss. This survey aims to provide a unified and up-to-date landscape of latent space in language-based models. We organize the survey into five sequential perspectives: Foundation, Evolution, Mechanism, Ability, and Outlook. We begin by delineating the scope of latent space, distinguishing it from explicit or verbal space and from the latent spaces commonly studied in generative visual models. We then trace the field's evolution from early exploratory efforts to the current large-scale expansion. To organize the technical landscape, we examine existing work through the complementary lenses of mechanism and ability. From the perspective of Mechanism, we identify four major lines of development: Architecture, Representation, Computation, and Optimization. From the perspective of Ability, we show how latent space supports a broad capability spectrum spanning Reasoning, Planning, Modeling, Perception, Memory, Collaboration, and Embodiment. Beyond consolidation, we discuss the key open challenges, and outline promising directions for future research. We hope this survey serves not only as a reference for existing work, but also as a foundation for understanding latent space as a general computational and systems paradigm for next-generation intelligence.

AI.tldr: This survey provides a unified landscape of latent space in language-based models, organizing work through five perspectives: Foundation, Evolution, Mechanism, Ability, and Outlook. It distinguishes latent space from explicit/verbal space and visual model latent spaces, tracing the field's development from early explorations to current large-scale applications.
AI.motivation: The shift to latent space is driven by structural limitations of explicit-space computation: linguistic redundancy, discretization bottlenecks, sequential inefficiency, and semantic loss. Latent space emerges as a more native substrate for language-based models where critical internal processes can be carried out more naturally than in human-readable token-level generation.
AI.method: The survey organizes existing work through five sequential perspectives: Foundation (defining scope and distinctions), Evolution (tracing development history), Mechanism (four lines: Architecture, Representation, Computation, Optimization), Ability (capability spectrum: Reasoning, Planning, Modeling, Perception, Memory, Collaboration, Embodiment), and Outlook (open challenges and future directions).
AI.result: The survey identifies four major mechanism lines: Architecture (how latent space is integrated into model design), Representation (how meaning is encoded in continuous space), Computation (how operations occur in latent space), and Optimization (how models are trained). It maps capabilities spanning Reasoning, Planning, Modeling, Perception, Memory, Collaboration, and Embodiment.
AI.conclusion: This survey serves as both a reference for existing work and a foundation for understanding latent space as a general computational and systems paradigm for next-generation intelligence, highlighting key open challenges and promising future research directions.

relevance_reason: This survey paper is about latent spaces in LANGUAGE-BASED models (LLMs), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D Human Motion Generation. The paper explicitly distinguishes its scope from "visual model latent spaces" and focuses on language modeling. There is no discussion of 2D video to 3D motion translation, temporal consistency, video generation models (Wanxiang, Seedance), 3D motion generation, or visual feature extraction pipelines. The application domain is fundamentally different - language processing vs. human motion generation.

title: A deep learning pipeline for PAM50 subtype classification using histopathology images and multi-objective patch selection
summary: Breast cancer is a highly heterogeneous disease with diverse molecular profiles. The PAM50 gene signature is widely recognized as a standard for classifying breast cancer into intrinsic subtypes, enabling more personalized treatment strategies. In this study, we introduce a novel optimization-driven deep learning framework that aims to reduce reliance on costly molecular assays by directly predicting PAM50 subtypes from H&E-stained whole-slide images (WSIs). Our method jointly optimizes patch informativeness, spatial diversity, uncertainty, and patch count by combining the non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm II (NSGA-II) with Monte Carlo dropout-based uncertainty estimation. The proposed method can identify a small but highly informative patch subset for classification. We used a ResNet18 backbone for feature extraction and a custom CNN head for classification. For evaluation, we used the internal TCGA-BRCA dataset as the training cohort and the external CPTAC-BRCA dataset as the test cohort. On the internal dataset, an F1-score of 0.8812 and an AUC of 0.9841 using 627 WSIs from the TCGA-BRCA cohort were achieved. The performance of the proposed approach on the external validation dataset showed an F1-score of 0.7952 and an AUC of 0.9512. These findings indicate that the proposed optimization-guided, uncertainty-aware patch selection can achieve high performance and improve the computational efficiency of histopathology-based PAM50 classification compared to existing methods, suggesting a scalable imaging-based replacement that has the potential to support clinical decision-making.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种优化驱动的深度学习框架，直接从H&E染色病理图像预测乳腺癌PAM50分子亚型，旨在减少对昂贵分子检测的依赖
AI.motivation: 乳腺癌是高度异质性疾病，PAM50基因签名是标准的分子分类方法，但分子检测费用高昂，希望通过组织病理学图像直接预测分子亚型
AI.method: 使用NSGA-II多目标优化算法结合蒙特卡洛dropout不确定性估计，联合优化patch信息性、空间多样性、不确定性和patch数量。使用ResNet18进行特征提取，自定义CNN头进行分类
AI.result: 在内部TCGA-BRCA数据集上达到F1=0.8812、AUC=0.9841（627例）；外部验证集CPTAC-BRCA上达到F1=0.7952、AUC=0.9512
AI.conclusion: 优化引导的不确定性感知patch选择可实现高性能分类，提高计算效率，为临床决策提供可扩展的影像学替代方案

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical image analysis for breast cancer subtype classification from histopathology images - completely unrelated to 3D Human Motion Generation in Computer Graphics. The application domains are entirely different: medical diagnostics vs. computer graphics/motion generation. While both use deep learning, the paper addresses breast cancer classification rather than video-to-motion translation, temporal consistency in motion generation, or any CG-related quality control.

title: AI in Insurance: Adaptive Questionnaires for Improved Risk Profiling
summary:
Insurance application processes often rely on lengthy and standardized questionnaires that struggle to capture individual differences. Moreover, insurers must blindly trust users' responses, increasing the chances of fraud. The ARQuest framework introduces a new approach to underwriting by using Large Language Models (LLMs) and alternative data sources to create personalized and adaptive questionnaires. Techniques such as social media image analysis, geographic data categorization, and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) are used to extract meaningful user insights and guide targeted follow-up questions.
  A life insurance system integrated into an industry partner mobile app was tested in two experiments. While traditional questionnaires yielded slightly higher accuracy in risk assessment, adaptive versions powered by GPT models required fewer questions and were preferred by users for their more fluid and engaging experience.
  ARQuest shows great potential to improve user satisfaction and streamline insurance processes. With further development, this approach may exceed traditional methods regarding risk accuracy and help drive innovation in the insurance industry.

AI.tldr: ARQuest框架利用大型语言模型和替代数据源（社交媒体图像分析、地理数据分类、RAG）创建个性化和自适应的保险问卷，旨在解决传统标准化问卷的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统保险申请流程依赖冗长且标准化的问卷，难以捕捉个体差异；同时保险公司盲目信任用户回复，增加了欺诈风险。
AI.method: 使用大型语言模型（LLM）结合替代数据源，包括社交媒体图像分析、地理数据分类和检索增强生成（RAG）技术，提取用户洞察并引导针对性后续问题。
AI.result: 传统问卷在风险评估准确性方面略高，但GPT驱动的自适应问卷所需问题更少，用户体验更流畅、更具吸引力。
AI.conclusion: ARQuest框架展示了提高用户满意度和简化保险流程的潜力，进一步开发可能在风险准确性方面超越传统方法，推动保险行业创新。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI in the insurance industry (adaptive questionnaires for risk profiling). It has NO relevance to Computer Graphics - 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is completely different - insurance/finance vs. computer graphics/motion generation. The methods (LLM for questionnaire adaptation) are also completely unrelated to VLM, video generation models, or 3D motion generation models needed for the research profile.

title: STRIVE: Structured Spatiotemporal Exploration for Reinforcement Learning in Video Question Answering
summary: We introduce STRIVE (SpatioTemporal Reinforcement with Importance-aware Variant Exploration), a structured reinforcement learning framework for video question answering. While group-based policy optimization methods have shown promise in large multimodal models, they often suffer from low reward variance when responses exhibit similar correctness, leading to weak or unstable advantage estimates. STRIVE addresses this limitation by constructing multiple spatiotemporal variants of each input video and performing joint normalization across both textual generations and visual variants. By expanding group comparisons beyond linguistic diversity to structured visual perturbations, STRIVE enriches reward signals and promotes more stable and informative policy updates. To ensure exploration remains semantically grounded, we introduce an importance-aware sampling mechanism that prioritizes frames most relevant to the input question while preserving temporal coverage. This design encourages robust reasoning across complementary visual perspectives rather than overfitting to a single spatiotemporal configuration. Experiments on six challenging video reasoning benchmarks including VideoMME, TempCompass, VideoMMMU, MMVU, VSI-Bench, and PerceptionTest demonstrate consistent improvements over strong reinforcement learning baselines across multiple large multimodal models. Our results highlight the role of structured spatiotemporal exploration as a principled mechanism for stabilizing multimodal reinforcement learning and improving video reasoning performance.

AI.tldr: STRIVE是一种用于视频问答的结构化强化学习框架,通过构建时空变体和重要性感知采样来增强奖励信号,稳定策略更新,提升视频推理性能。
AI.motivation: 当前基于组的策略优化方法在大型多模态模型中表现出色,但当 responses 表现出相似的正确性时,奖励方差较低,导致弱或不稳定的优势估计。
AI.method: 1. 为每个输入视频构建多个时空变体;2. 在文本生成和视觉变体之间进行联合归一化;3. 引入重要性感知采样机制,优先选择与输入问题最相关的帧,同时保留时间覆盖。
AI.result: 在六个具有挑战性的视频推理基准测试上,包括VideoMME、TempCompass、VideoMMMU、MMVU、VSI-Bench和PerceptionTest,相对于强大的强化学习基线,实现了一致的改进。
AI.conclusion: 结构化时空探索是稳定多模态强化学习和提高视频推理性能的有效机制。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Video Question Answering (VQA) and video reasoning tasks, not 3D Human Motion Generation. While it uses Vision Language Models (VLMs), the application domain is completely different - it focuses on answering questions about video content and improving reasoning performance, not on generating 3D human motion from 2D videos. The pain points (domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion, temporal consistency in visual-to-motion translation, quality control of generated motion) are not addressed. This is a different field entirely within multimodal learning.

title: Diff-KD: Diffusion-based Knowledge Distillation for Collaborative Perception under Corruptions
summary: Multi-agent collaborative perception enables autonomous systems to overcome individual sensing limits through collective intelligence. However, real-world sensor and communication corruptions severely undermine this advantage. Crucially, existing approaches treat corruptions as static perturbations or passively conform to corrupted inputs, failing to actively recover the underlying clean semantics. To address this limitation, we introduce Diff-KD, a framework that integrates diffusion-based generative refinement into teacher-student knowledge distillation for robust collaborative perception. Diff-KD features two core components: (i) Progressive Knowledge Distillation (PKD), which treats local feature restoration as a conditional diffusion process to recover global semantics from corrupted observations; and (ii) Adaptive Gated Fusion (AGF), which dynamically weights neighbors based on ego reliability during fusion. Evaluated on OPV2V and DAIR-V2X under seven corruption types, Diff-KD achieves state-of-the-art performance in both detection accuracy and calibration robustness.

AI.tldr: Diff-KD是一个基于扩散的知识蒸馏框架，用于鲁棒的多智能体协作感知，通过渐进式知识蒸馏从损坏观察中恢复全局语义，并使用自适应门控融合动态加权邻居，在七种损坏类型下达到最先进的检测和校准性能。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中传感器和通信损坏严重削弱了多智能体协作感知的优势。现有的方法将损坏视为静态扰动或被动服从损坏的输入，无法主动恢复底层清洁语义。
