title: Captioning Daily Activity Images in Early Childhood Education: Benchmark and Algorithm
summary:
Image captioning for Early Childhood Education (ECE) is essential for automated activity understanding and educational assessment. However, existing methods face two key challenges. First, the lack of large-scale, domain-specific datasets limits the model's ability to capture fine-grained semantic concepts unique to ECE scenarios, resulting in generic and imprecise descriptions. Second, conventional training paradigms exhibit limitations in enhancing professional object description capability, as supervised learning tends to favor high-frequency expressions, while reinforcement learning may suffer from unstable optimization on difficult samples.
  To address these limitations, we introduce ECAC, a large-scale benchmark for ECE daily activity image captioning, comprising 256,121 real-world images annotated with expert-level captions and fine-grained labels. ECAC is further equipped with a domain-oriented evaluation protocol, the Teaching Toy Recognition Score (TTS), to explicitly measure professional object naming accuracy. Furthermore, we propose RSRS (Reward-Conditional Switch of Reinforcement Learning and Supervised Fine-Tuning), a hybrid training framework that dynamically alternates between RL and supervised optimization. By rerouting hard samples with zero rewards to supervised fine-tuning, RSRS effectively mitigates advantage collapse and enables stable optimization for fine-grained recognition. Leveraging ECAC and RSRS, we develop KinderMM-Cap-3B, a domain-adapted multimodal large language model. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model achieves a TTS of 51.06, substantially outperforming state-of-the-art baselines while maintaining superior caption quality, highlighting its potential for specialized educational applications.

AI.tldr: We introduce ECAC, a large-scale benchmark for ECE daily activity image captioning with 256,121 images and expert-level captions. We propose RSRS, a hybrid training framework that dynamically alternates between reinforcement learning and supervised fine-tuning to mitigate advantage collapse. Our KinderMM-Cap-3B model achieves a TTS of 51.06, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art baselines.
AI.motivation: Image captioning for Early Childhood Education (ECE) is essential for automated activity understanding and educational assessment. However, existing methods face two key challenges: 1) the lack of large-scale, domain-specific datasets limits the model's ability to capture fine-grained semantic concepts unique to ECE scenarios, resulting in generic and imprecise descriptions; 2) conventional training paradigms exhibit limitations in enhancing professional object description capability, as supervised learning tends to favor high-frequency expressions, while reinforcement learning may suffer from unstable optimization on difficult samples.
AI.method: We introduce ECAC, a large-scale benchmark for ECE daily activity image captioning, comprising 256,121 real-world images annotated with expert-level captions and fine-grained labels, equipped with a domain-oriented evaluation protocol called Teaching Toy Recognition Score (TTS). We also propose RSRS (Reward-Conditional Switch of Reinforcement Learning and Supervised Fine-Tuning), a hybrid training framework that dynamically alternates between RL and supervised optimization.
AI.result: KinderMM-Cap-3B achieves a TTS of 51.06, substantially outperforming state-of-the-art baselines while maintaining superior caption quality, highlighting its potential for specialized educational applications.
AI.conclusion: We propose RSRS, a hybrid training framework that dynamically alternates between reinforcement learning and supervised optimization. By rerouting hard samples with zero rewards to supervised fine-tuning, RSRS effectively mitigates advantage collapse and enables stable optimization for fine-grained recognition. Using ECAC and RSRS, we develop KinderMM-Cap-3B, a domain-adapted multimodal large language model that achieves a TTS of 51.06, substantially outperforming state-of-the-art baselines while maintaining superior caption quality.

relevance_reason: This paper is about image captioning for Early Childhood Education using VLMs - completely different application domain from 3D Human Motion Generation in Computer Graphics. It has no relevance to: 3D motion generation, video-to-motion translation, temporal consistency in motion synthesis, or visual guidance features for motion. Even though VLMs are mentioned, they are used for educational image captioning, not for motion generation quality supervision. The paper addresses a computer vision/NLP problem in educational assessment, not computer graphics motion generation.

title: A Self supervised learning framework for imbalanced medical imaging datasets
summary: Two problems often plague medical imaging analysis: 1) Non-availability of large quantities of labeled training data, and 2) Dealing with imbalanced data, i.e., abundant data are available for frequent classes, whereas data are highly limited for the rare class. Self supervised learning (SSL) methods have been proposed to deal with the first problem to a certain extent, but the issue of investigating the robustness of SSL to imbalanced data has rarely been addressed in the domain of medical image classification. In this work, we make the following contributions: 1) The MIMV method proposed by us in an earlier work is extended with a new augmentation strategy to construct asymmetric multi-image, multi-view (AMIMV) pairs to address both data scarcity and dataset imbalance in medical image classification. 2) We carry out a data analysis to evaluate the robustness of AMIMV under varying degrees of class imbalance in medical imaging . 3) We evaluate eight representative SSL methods in 11 medical imaging datasets (MedMNIST) under long-tailed distributions and limited supervision. Our experimental results on the MedMNIST dataset show an improvement of 4.25% on retinaMNIST, 1.88% on tissueMNIST, and 3.1% on DermaMNIST.

AI.tldr: 本文研究自监督学习(SSL)在医学图像分类中对类别不平衡数据的鲁棒性，提出了AMIMV方法（不对称多图像多视图）来处理数据稀缺和类别不平衡问题，并在11个MedMNIST数据集上评估了8种SSL方法。
AI.motivation: 医学影像分析面临两大挑战：1) 缺乏大量带标签的训练数据；2) 数据不平衡，即常见类数据丰富而稀有类数据有限。虽然SSL方法可解决标签数据不足问题，但SSL在不平衡数据下的鲁棒性问题很少被研究。
AI.method: 1) 扩展之前的MIMV方法，提出新的增强策略构建不对称多图像多视图(AMIMV)对；2) 在11个MedMNIST医学影像数据集上评估8种代表性SSL方法在长尾分布和有限监督下的表现；3) 分析AMIMV在不同类别不平衡程度下的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在MedMNIST数据集上的实验结果表明：retinaMNIST提升4.25%，tissueMNIST提升1.88%，DermaMNIST提升3.1%。
AI.conclusion: AMIMV方法能够有效应对医学图像分类中的数据稀缺和类别不平衡问题，SSL方法在长尾分布和有限监督条件下具有一定的鲁棒性。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about medical imaging classification (MedMNIST datasets) using self-supervised learning for handling class-imbalanced data in healthcare. It has no relation to Computer Graphics, 3D Human Motion Generation, video-to-motion translation, or any of the mentioned methods (VLM, Wanxiang, Seedance). Medical imaging is an entirely different field from computer graphics and human motion generation.

title: MAVFusion: Efficient Infrared and Visible Video Fusion via Motion-Aware Sparse Interaction
summary: Infrared and visible video fusion combines the object saliency from infrared images with the texture details from visible images to produce semantically rich fusion results. However, most existing methods are designed for static image fusion and cannot effectively handle frame-to-frame motion in videos. Current video fusion methods improve temporal consistency by introducing interactions across frames, but they often require high computational cost. To mitigate these challenges, we propose MAVFusion, an end-to-end video fusion framework featuring a motion-aware sparse interaction mechanism that enhances efficiency while maintaining superior fusion quality. Specifically, we leverage optical flow to identify dynamic regions in multi-modal sequences, adaptively allocating computationally intensive cross-modal attention to these sparse areas to capture salient transitions and facilitate inter-modal information exchange. For static background regions, a lightweight weak interaction module is employed to maintain structural and appearance integrity. By decoupling the processing of dynamic and static regions, MAVFusion simultaneously preserves temporal consistency and fine-grained details while significantly accelerating inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MAVFusion achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple infrared and visible video benchmarks, achieving a speed of 14.16\,FPS at $640 \times 480$ resolution. The source code will be available at https://github.com/ixilai/MAVFusion.

AI.tldr: MAVFusion是一种端到端的红外与可见光视频融合框架，通过运动感知稀疏交互机制实现高效高质量的视频融合，在保持时间一致性和细粒度细节的同时显著提升推理速度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多为静态图像融合设计，无法有效处理视频中的帧间运动；当前视频融合方法虽能改善时间一致性，但计算成本高。
AI.method: 提出MAVFusion端到端视频融合框架，采用运动感知稀疏交互机制。具体包括：1)利用光流识别多模态序列中的动态区域；2)对动态区域自适应分配计算密集的跨模态注意力以捕捉显著过渡并促进模态间信息交换；3)对静态背景区域采用轻量级弱交互模块维持结构和外观完整性。
AI.result: 在多个红外可见光视频基准数据集上实现最先进的性能，在640×480分辨率下达到14.16 FPS的推理速度。
AI.conclusion: MAVFusion通过将动态区域和静态区域的处理解耦，在保持时间一致性和细粒度细节的同时显著加速推理，在多个红外可见光视频基准数据集上实现了最先进的性能，在640×480分辨率下达到14.16 FPS的推理速度。

relevance_reason: This paper is about infrared and visible video fusion for surveillance applications, which is completely different from 3D human motion generation. While both involve video processing, the application domain is entirely different: the paper addresses video fusion (combining infrared and visible light video streams for surveillance), not extracting or generating 3D human motion from 2D videos. The methods (optical flow, cross-modal attention for video fusion) target a different problem entirely. This paper does not address any of the pain points related to 2D-to-3D motion generation, temporal consistency in visual-to-motion translation, or extracting visual guidance features for human motion generation.

title: Automated Prostate Gland Segmentation in MRI Using nnU-Net
summary: Accurate segmentation of the prostate gland in multiparametric MRI (mpMRI) is a fundamental step for a wide range of clinical and research applications, including image registration, volume estimation, and radiomic analysis. However, manual delineation is time-consuming and subject to inter-observer variability, while general-purpose segmentation tools often fail to provide sufficient accuracy for prostate-specific tasks. In this work, we propose a dedicated deep learning-based approach for automatic prostate gland segmentation using the nnU-Net v2 framework. The model leverages multimodal mpMRI data, including T2-weighted imaging, diffusion-weighted imaging (DWI), and apparent diffusion coefficient (ADC) maps, to exploit complementary tissue information. Training was performed on 981 cases from the PI-CAI dataset using whole-gland annotations, and model performance was assessed through 5-fold cross-validation and external validation on an independent cohort of 54 patients from Hospital La Fe. The proposed model achieved a mean Dice score of 0.96 +/- 0.00 in cross-validation and 0.82 on the external test set, demonstrating strong generalization despite domain shift. In comparison, a general-purpose approach (TotalSegmentator) showed substantially lower performance, with a Dice score of 0.15, primarily due to under-segmentation of the gland. These results highlight the importance of task-specific, multimodal segmentation strategies and demonstrate the potential of the proposed approach for reliable integration into clinical research workflows. To facilitate reproducibility and deployment, the model has been fully containerized and is available as a ready-to-use inference tool.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于nnU-Net v2框架的深度学习方法，用于多参数MRI前列腺腺体自动分割，整合T2加权成像、扩散加权成像和ADC图等多种模态数据。
AI.motivation: 前列腺腺体在多参数MRI中的准确分割是图像配准、体积估算和放射组学分析等临床和研究应用的基础步骤，但手动勾画耗时且存在观察者间差异，通用分割工具对前列腺特定任务往往精度不足。
AI.method: 使用nnU-Net v2框架，基于981例PI-CAI数据集进行训练，采用整腺体标注，结合T2加权成像、扩散加权成像和ADC图三种模态数据，并通过5折交叉验证和外部验证集（54例来自Hospital La Fe患者）评估模型性能。
AI.result: 交叉验证中 Dice 得分达 0.96 ± 0.00，外部测试集 Dice 得分为 0.82；通用工具TotalSegmentator得分仅为0.15，主要原因是分割不足。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明任务特异性的多模态分割策略具有重要价值，所提方法具有强泛化能力，可靠集成到临床研究工作流程中，模型已容器化并作为即用型推理工具发布。

relevance_reason: Completely different field: This is a medical imaging paper about prostate segmentation in MRI, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains have no overlap - medical imaging vs computer graphics/video-to-motion translation.

title: Ego-Grounding for Personalized Question-Answering in Egocentric Videos
summary: We present the first systematic analysis of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in personalized question-answering requiring ego-grounding - the ability to understand the camera-wearer in egocentric videos. To this end, we introduce MyEgo, the first egocentric VideoQA dataset designed to evaluate MLLMs' ability to understand, remember, and reason about the camera wearer. MyEgo comprises 541 long videos and 5K personalized questions asking about "my things", "my activities", and "my past". Benchmarking reveals that competitive MLLMs across variants, including open-source vs. proprietary, thinking vs. non-thinking, small vs. large scales all struggle on MyEgo. Top closed- and open-source models (e.g., GPT-5 and Qwen3-VL) achieve only~46% and 36% accuracy, trailing human performance by near 40% and 50% respectively. Surprisingly, neither explicit reasoning nor model scaling yield consistent improvements. Models improve when relevant evidence is explicitly provided, but gains drop over time, indicating limitations in tracking and remembering "me" and "my past". These findings collectively highlight the crucial role of ego-grounding and long-range memory in enabling personalized QA in egocentric videos. We hope MyEgo and our analyses catalyze further progress in these areas for egocentric personalized assistance. Data and code are available at https://github.com/Ryougetsu3606/MyEgo

AI.tldr: 首次系统分析多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)在需要自我定位的自定义问答任务上的表现。提出MyEgo数据集，包含541个长视频和5K个关于摄像机佩戴者的问题。发现当前最先进的MLLMs(包括GPT-5和Qwen3-VL)在自我理解和长期记忆方面存在显著不足，准确率仅46%和36%，落后人类约40-50%。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对MLLMs在自我定位(ego-grounding)能力上的系统评估。自我定位是指理解摄像机佩戴者的能力，这对实现个性化辅助至关重要。研究者希望填补这一空白，推动 egocentric AI助手的进展。
AI.method: 构建MyEgo基准数据集，包含541个长egocentric视频和5K个个性化问题(分为"我的东西"、"我的活动"、"我的过去"三类)，并对多种MLLMs进行系统测评，包括开源vs闭源、推理vs非推理、小规模vs大规模模型。
AI.result: 顶级闭源模型(GPT-5)和开源模型(Qwen3-VL)仅达到约46%和36%准确率，落后人类表现近40-50%。显式推理和模型Scaling未带来一致提升。当提供明确证据时模型可改善，但增益随时间衰减，表明模型在跟踪和记忆"我"及"我的过去"方面存在根本性局限。
AI.conclusion: ego-grounding和长期记忆是实现个性化egocentric问答的关键能力。当前MLLMs在这些方面存在显著不足，需要重点研究。MyEgo基准和详细分析将推动该领域的进一步发展。

relevance_reason: This paper is about egocentric video understanding and question-answering for personalized AI assistants (MLLMs evaluating "ego-grounding" ability). It is NOT about 3D Human Motion Generation at all. The application domain is completely different - it's computer vision/AI for video understanding, not computer graphics for motion generation. While it mentions "my activities" category, this is about recognizing what the camera wearer did, NOT generating 3D human motion from videos. The methods are also different - this evaluates LLMs on QA tasks, not video-to-motion translation or motion generation models.

title: SDesc3D: Towards Layout-Aware 3D Indoor Scene Generation from Short Descriptions
summary: 3D indoor scene generation conditioned on short textual descriptions provides a promising avenue for interactive 3D environment construction without the need for labor-intensive layout specification. Despite recent progress in text-conditioned 3D scene generation, existing works suffer from poor physical plausibility and insufficient detail richness in such semantic condensation cases, largely due to their reliance on explicit semantic cues about compositional objects and their spatial relationships. This limitation highlights the need for enhanced 3D reasoning capabilities, particularly in terms of prior integration and spatial anchoring.Motivated by this, we propose SDesc3D, a short-text conditioned 3D indoor scene generation framework, that leverages multi-view structural priors and regional functionality implications to enable 3D layout reasoning under sparse textual guidance.Specifically, we introduce a Multi-view scene prior augmentation that enriches underspecified textual inputs with aggregated multi-view structural knowledge, shifting from inaccessible semantic relation cues to multi-view relational prior aggregation. Building on this, we design a Functionality-aware layout grounding, employing regional functionality grounding for implicit spatial anchors and conducting hierarchical layout reasoning to enhance scene organization and semantic plausibility.Furthermore, an Iterative reflection-rectification scheme is employed for progressive structural plausibility refinement via self-rectification.Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms existing approaches on short-text conditioned 3D indoor scene generation.Code will be publicly available.

AI.tldr: SDesc3D是一个基于短文本描述的3D室内场景生成框架，通过多视角结构先验增强、功能感知布局锚定和迭代反思纠正三大技术创新，有效提升了生成场景的物理合理性和细节丰富度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在短文本条件下的3D场景生成中存在物理合理性差和细节不足的问题，主要原因是过度依赖关于组合对象及其空间关系的显式语义线索。这凸显了增强3D推理能力的必要性，特别是在先验整合和空间锚定方面。
AI.method: 提出SDesc3D框架，包含三个核心模块：1）多视角场景先验增强：利用多视角结构知识丰富稀疏的文本输入，替代不可访问的语义关系线索；2）功能感知布局锚定：通过区域功能锚定实现隐式空间锚定，并进行层次化布局推理增强场景组织；3）迭代反思纠正：利用自纠正机制进行渐进式结构合理性优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在短文本条件下的3D室内场景生成任务上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SDesc3D通过多视角结构先验、功能感知布局锚定和迭代反思纠正三个创新模块，有效解决了短文本描述下3D场景生成的物理合理性和细节丰富度问题，在短文本条件下的3D室内场景生成任务上取得了显著的性能提升。

relevance_reason: 完全不同的应用领域。该论文是关于3D室内场景生成（生成房间布局、物体空间摆放），而研究需求是3D人体运动生成（人体动作动画）。尽管都涉及3D生成，但在计算机图形学中这是两个完全不同的方向：场景生成关注环境布局，人体运动生成关注角色动作。论文完全没有涉及人体动作、视频到运动转换、时间一致性等技术内容。

title: NearID: Identity Representation Learning via Near-identity Distractors
summary: When evaluating identity-focused tasks such as personalized generation and image editing, existing vision encoders entangle object identity with background context, leading to unreliable representations and metrics. We introduce the first principled framework to address this vulnerability using Near-identity (NearID) distractors, where semantically similar but distinct instances are placed on the exact same background as a reference image, eliminating contextual shortcuts and isolating identity as the sole discriminative signal. Based on this principle, we present the NearID dataset (19K identities, 316K matched-context distractors) together with a strict margin-based evaluation protocol. Under this setting, pre-trained encoders perform poorly, achieving Sample Success Rates (SSR), a strict margin-based identity discrimination metric, as low as 30.7% and often ranking distractors above true cross-view matches. We address this by learning identity-aware representations on a frozen backbone using a two-tier contrastive objective enforcing the hierarchy: same identity > NearID distractor > random negative. This improves SSR to 99.2%, enhances part-level discrimination by 28.0%, and yields stronger alignment with human judgments on DreamBench++, a human-aligned benchmark for personalization. Project page: https://gorluxor.github.io/NearID/

AI.tldr: 提出首个基于Near-identity (NearID)干扰项的框架，解决视觉编码器在身份识别任务中将物体身份与背景上下文混淆的问题，通过创建包含19K身份和316K匹配上下文干扰项的数据集，以及两级对比学习目标，显著提升身份识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉编码器在身份Focused任务（如个性化生成和图像编辑）中，将物体身份与背景上下文纠缠，导致不可靠的表示和指标，需要消除上下文捷径，让身份成为唯一的判别信号。
AI.method: 提出NearID干扰项框架，在相同背景上放置语义相似但不同的实例；构建NearID数据集（19K身份，316K匹配上下文干扰项）；使用严格边际的评估协议（SSR）；通过两级对比目标学习身份感知表示：相同身份 > NearID干扰项 > 随机负样本。
AI.result: 预训练编码器SSR低至30.7%，常将干扰项排在真正跨视图匹配之上；改进后SSR达99.2%，部分级判别提升28.0%，在DreamBench++上与人类判断更强对齐。
AI.conclusion: 通过NearID框架和身份感知对比学习，可有效隔离身份作为唯一判别信号，显著提升身份识别任务的性能，为个性化生成和图像编辑提供更可靠的编码器。

relevance_reason: This paper is about identity representation learning for image generation/editing tasks (2D images), while the research profile is specifically about 3D Human Motion Generation in Computer Graphics. The application domains are fundamentally different - image identity recognition vs 3D motion generation from visual inputs. Even though both involve visual features, they address completely different output domains (2D images vs 3D motion data). The pain points and methods do not align with the research profile's needs.

title: Interactive Tracking: A Human-in-the-Loop Paradigm with Memory-Augmented Adaptation
summary: Existing visual trackers mainly operate in a non-interactive, fire-and-forget manner, making them impractical for real-world scenarios that require human-in-the-loop adaptation. To overcome this limitation, we introduce Interactive Tracking, a new paradigm that allows users to guide the tracker at any time using natural language commands. To support research in this direction, we make three main contributions. First, we present InteractTrack, the first large-scale benchmark for interactive tracking, containing 150 videos with dense bounding box annotations and timestamped language instructions. Second, we propose a comprehensive evaluation protocol and evaluate 25 representative trackers, showing that state-of-the-art methods fail in interactive scenarios; strong performance on conventional benchmarks does not transfer. Third, we introduce Interactive Memory-Augmented Tracking (IMAT), a new baseline that employs a dynamic memory mechanism to learn from user feedback and update tracking behavior accordingly. Our benchmark, protocol, and baseline establish a foundation for developing more intelligent, adaptive, and collaborative tracking systems, bridging the gap between automated perception and human guidance. The full benchmark, tracking results, and analysis are available at https://github.com/NorahGreen/InteractTrack.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了交互式跟踪（Interactive Tracking）新范式，允许用户通过自然语言命令指导视觉跟踪器。构建了首个大规模交互式跟踪基准数据集InteractTrack，包含150个视频及对应标注，并提出了集成动态记忆机制的IMAT基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉跟踪器采用非交互式运作方式，无法满足需要人机协作的真实场景需求。用户无法在跟踪过程中干预或指导跟踪器，导致在复杂环境下跟踪失败后难以恢复。
AI.method: 1. 构建InteractTrack数据集：150个视频，包含密集边界框注释和时间戳语言指令；2. 设计综合评估协议评估25个代表性跟踪器；3. 提出IMAT方法：采用动态记忆机制从用户反馈中学习并更新跟踪行为。
AI.result: 1. InteractTrack数据集揭示了现有SOTA跟踪器在交互场景中表现不佳；2. 传统基准测试的强性能无法转移到交互场景；3. IMAT能够利用用户反馈动态调整跟踪策略。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为交互式跟踪领域奠定了基础，证明了人机协作指导的有效性。未来可在此基准上开发更智能、自适应的跟踪系统，弥合自动感知与人类指导之间的差距。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 2D visual object tracking with human-in-the-loop interaction, not about 3D human motion generation. The application domain is completely different: Computer Vision (object tracking) vs Computer Graphics (3D human motion generation). While both involve video, the goals are fundamentally different - this paper aims to track objects in 2D video with user feedback, whereas the research profile needs methods to extract and generate 3D human motion from video. The methods (interactive tracking, memory-augmented models) are also unrelated to the required methods (VLMs for supervision, video generation models, 3D motion generation models).

title: Curia-2: Scaling Self-Supervised Learning for Radiology Foundation Models
summary: The rapid growth of medical imaging has fueled the development of Foundation Models (FMs) to reduce the growing, unsustainable workload on radiologists. While recent FMs have shown the power of large-scale pre-training to CT and MRI analysis, there remains significant room to optimize how these models learn from complex radiological volumes. Building upon the Curia framework, this work introduces Curia-2, which significantly improves the original pre-training strategy and representation quality to better capture the specificities of radiological data. The proposed methodology enables scaling the architecture up to billion-parameter Vision Transformers, marking a first for multi-modal CT and MRI FMs. Furthermore, we formalize the evaluation of these models by extending and restructuring CuriaBench into two distinct tracks: a 2D track tailored for slice-based vision models and a 3D track for volumetric benchmarking. Our results demonstrate that Curia-2 outperforms all FMs on vision-focused tasks and fairs competitively to vision-language models on clinically complex tasks such as finding detection. Weights will be made publicly available to foster further research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Curia-2框架，在CT和MRI医学影像上扩展到十亿参数级别的Vision Transformer基础模型，并改进预训练策略以更好地学习医学影像特征。提出2D和3D双轨评估基准CuriaBench，在视觉任务上优于所有基础模型，在临床复杂任务上与视觉语言模型竞争力相当。
AI.motivation: 医学影像快速增长导致放射科医生工作量不可持续地增加，需要开发基础模型(FMs)来减轻负担。现有FMs在从复杂医学影像数据中学习方面仍有优化空间。
AI.method: 基于Curia框架，提出Curia-2改进预训练策略和表示质量；将架构扩展到十亿参数级别的Vision Transformer（首次用于多模态CT和MRI FMs）；将CuriaBench扩展为2D（基于切片）和3D（体积分割）两个评估track。
AI.result: Curia-2在视觉任务上优于所有FMs，在临床复杂任务（如病灶检测）上与视觉语言模型具有竞争力的表现。
AI.conclusion: 模型权重将公开以促进后续研究。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper is about medical imaging (radiology CT/MRI) analysis, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - 3D Human Motion Generation. These are in entirely different fields - medical image analysis vs human motion generation from video. The pain points and goals are completely unrelated (radiology diagnosis vs visual-to-motion translation).

title: Attention at Rest Stays at Rest: Breaking Visual Inertia for Cognitive Hallucination Mitigation
summary: Like a body at rest that stays at rest, we find that visual attention in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) exhibits pronounced inertia, remaining largely static once settled during early decoding steps and failing to support the compositional understanding required for cognitive inference. While existing hallucination mitigation methods mainly target perceptual hallucinations concerning object existence or attributes, they remain inadequate for such cognitive hallucinations that require inter-object relational deduction. Through token-wise attention analysis, we identify this visual inertia as a key factor: attention to semantically critical regions remains persistently focused and fails to dynamically support relational inference. We thereby propose a training-free Inertia-aware Visual Excitation (IVE) method that breaks this inertial pattern by modeling cognitive inference as the dynamic responsiveness of visual attention. Specifically, IVE selects visual tokens that are dynamically emerging relative to historical attention trends while distinguishing tokens exhibiting inertial behavior. To further facilitate compositional inference, IVE introduces an inertia-aware penalty that discourages over-concentration and limits the persistence of attention within localized regions. Extensive experiments show that IVE is effective across various base MLLMs and multiple hallucination benchmarks, particularly for cognitive hallucinations.

AI.tldr: 本文发现多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)存在视觉惯性现象——注意力在早期解码步骤后保持静态，无法支持认知推理。提出IVE方法通过选择动态出现的视觉token并引入惯性感知惩罚来打破这种惯性模式，有效缓解认知幻觉。
AI.motivation: 现有幻觉缓解方法主要针对感知幻觉（对象存在性或属性），无法解决需要对象间关系推理的认知幻觉问题。通过token-wise注意力分析发现视觉惯性是关键因素：语义关键区域的注意力持续集中，无法动态支持关系推理。
AI.method: 提出训练无关的Inertia-aware Visual Exception(IVE)方法：1)通过token-wise注意力分析识别视觉惯性；2)选择相对于历史注意力趋势动态出现的视觉token，区分惯性行为token；3)引入惯性感知惩罚机制，抑制注意力过度集中并限制局部区域注意力的持续性。
AI.result: 在多种基础MLLMs和多个幻觉基准测试上均有效，特别针对认知幻觉表现出显著改进。
AI.conclusion: IVE方法通过打破视觉惯性模式，有效解决了MLLMs中的认知幻觉问题，特别是在需要对象间关系推理的任务中表现优异。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses hallucination mitigation in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) - a fundamentally different application domain from 3D Human Motion Generation. While the research profile focuses on visual-to-motion translation (converting 2D videos to 3D human motion), this paper focuses on improving reasoning capabilities in vision-language models for general AI tasks. The methods, pain points, and application domain have no overlap with the Computer Graphics - 3D Human Motion Generation field.

title: Resonance4D: Frequency-Domain Motion Supervision for Preset-Free Physical Parameter Learning in 4D Dynamic Physical Scene Simulation
summary: Physics-driven 4D dynamic simulation from static 3D scenes remains constrained by an overlooked contradiction: reliable motion supervision often relies on online video diffusion or optical-flow pipelines whose computational cost exceeds that of the simulator itself. Existing methods further simplify inverse physical modeling by optimizing only partial material parameters, limiting realism in scenes with complex materials and dynamics. We present Resonance4D, a physics-driven 4D dynamic simulation framework that couples 3D Gaussian Splatting with the Material Point Method through lightweight yet physically expressive supervision. Our key insight is that dynamic consistency can be enforced without dense temporal generation by jointly constraining motion in complementary domains. To this end, we introduce Dual-domain Motion Supervision (DMS), which combines spatial structural consistency for local deformation with frequency-domain spectral consistency for oscillatory and global dynamic patterns, substantially reducing training cost and memory overhead while preserving physically meaningful motion cues. To enable stable full-parameter physical recovery, we further combine zero-shot text-prompted segmentation with simulation-guided initialization to automatically decompose Gaussians into object-part-level regions and support joint optimization of full material parameters. Experiments on both synthetic and real scenes show that Resonance4D achieves strong physical fidelity and motion consistency while reducing peak GPU memory from over 35\,GB to around 20\,GB, enabling high-fidelity physics-driven 4D simulation on a single consumer-grade GPU.

AI.tldr: Resonance4D是一个物理驱动的4D动态模拟框架，它将3D Gaussian Splatting与Material Point Method结合，通过双域运动监督（DMS）实现轻量级但物理上具有表现力的监督。该方法能够在单张消费级GPU上实现高保真物理模拟，同时将GPU内存从35GB以上降低到约20GB。
AI.motivation: 现有4D动态模拟方法存在一个被忽视的矛盾：可靠的运动监督通常依赖于计算成本高于模拟器本身的在线视频扩散或光流管道。此外，现有方法通过仅优化部分材料参数来简化逆物理建模，限制了复杂材料和 dynamics 场景的真实感。
AI.method: 提出双域运动监督（DMS），结合空间结构一致性（用于局部变形）与频域频谱一致性（用于振荡和全局动态模式），显著降低训练成本和内存开销。同时结合零样本文本提示分割与模拟引导初始化，自动将高斯分解为对象部件级区域，支持完整材料参数的联合优化。
AI.result: 在合成和真实场景上的实验表明，Resonance4D实现了强大的物理保真度和运动一致性，同时将峰值GPU内存从超过35GB降低到约20GB。
AI.conclusion: Resonance4D能够在单张消费级GPU上实现高保真物理驱动的4D模拟，通过DMS和完整材料参数优化解决了现有方法的计算成本和真实感问题。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 4D dynamic physical scene simulation using 3D Gaussian Splatting and Material Point Method for physics-based simulation, NOT 3D Human Motion Generation. While it addresses "motion supervision," the application domain is physical simulation of objects and materials (cloth, fluids, etc.), not human motion generation from video. The methods (Gaussian splatting, MPM, physics simulation) are completely different from the research profile's focus on visual-to-motion translation, VLM-based quality supervision, and video generation models for human motion. This is a physics simulation paper that happens to use motion-related techniques, but not for human motion generation.

title: ProDiG: Progressive Diffusion-Guided Gaussian Splatting for Aerial to Ground Reconstruction
summary: Generating ground-level views and coherent 3D site models from aerial-only imagery is challenging due to extreme viewpoint changes, missing intermediate observations, and large scale variations. Existing methods either refine renderings post-hoc, often producing geometrically inconsistent results, or rely on multi-altitude ground-truth, which is rarely available. Gaussian Splatting and diffusion-based refinements improve fidelity under small variations but fail under wide aerial-to-ground gaps. To address these limitations, we introduce ProDiG (Progressive Altitude Gaussian Splatting), a diffusion-guided framework that progressively transforms aerial 3D representations toward ground-level fidelity. ProDiG synthesizes intermediate-altitude views and refines the Gaussian representation at each stage using a geometry-aware causal attention module that injects epipolar structure into reference-view diffusion. A distance-adaptive Gaussian module dynamically adjusts Gaussian scale and opacity based on camera distance, ensuring stable reconstruction across large viewpoint gaps. Together, these components enable progressive, geometrically grounded refinement without requiring additional ground-truth viewpoints. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that ProDiG produces visually realistic ground-level renderings and coherent 3D geometry, significantly outperforming existing approaches in terms of visual quality, geometric consistency, and robustness to extreme viewpoint changes.

AI.tldr: ProDiG通过渐进式高度高斯 splatting 和扩散引导方法，从单一 aerial 图像生成地面级视图和连贯的 3D 站点模型，无需额外的地面真实视角。
AI.motivation: 从 aerial-only 图像生成地面级视图面临极端视角变化、中间观察缺失和大规模变化的挑战。现有方法要么后处理渲染几何不一致，要么依赖多高度地面真实数据，而扩散方法在宽视角差距下失败。
AI.method: 提出 ProDiG 框架，包含两个核心模块：1) 几何感知因果注意力模块，在参考视图扩散中注入极线结构，渐进式合成中间高度视图并细化高斯表示；2) 距离自适应高斯模块，根据相机距离动态调整高斯尺度和透明度，确保跨大视角差距的稳定重建。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上进行了广泛实验，ProDiG 产生视觉逼真的地面级渲染和连贯的 3D 几何，在视觉质量、几何一致性和极端视角变化鲁棒性方面显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ProDiG 是一个无需额外地面真实视角的渐进式几何扎根细化框架，成功弥合了 aerial-to-ground 的视角差距，为单一大规模 aerial 图像的地面级视图合成提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D scene reconstruction from aerial images (aerial-to-ground view synthesis), not 3D Human Motion Generation. While both use diffusion models and deal with 3D representations, the application domains are completely different: ProDiG focuses on reconstructing ground-level views from aerial imagery for 3D site modeling, whereas the research profile specifically targets generating human motion from 2D videos. The pain points (domain gap between 2D video and 3D MOTION, temporal consistency in MOTION translation) are entirely different from this paper's focus on geometric reconstruction across viewpoints.

title: Decouple and Rectify: Semantics-Preserving Structural Enhancement for Open-Vocabulary Remote Sensing Segmentation
summary: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation in the remote sensing (RS) field requires both language-aligned recognition and fine-grained spatial delineation. Although CLIP offers robust semantic generalization, its global-aligned visual representations inherently struggle to capture structural details. Recent methods attempt to compensate for this by introducing RS-pretrained DINO features. However, these methods treat CLIP representations as a monolithic semantic space and cannot localize where structural enhancement is required, failing to effectively delineate boundaries while risking the disruption of CLIP's semantic integrity. To address this limitation, we propose DR-Seg, a novel decouple-and-rectify framework in this paper. Our method is motivated by the key observation that CLIP feature channels exhibit distinct functional heterogeneity rather than forming a uniform semantic space. Building on this insight, DR-Seg decouples CLIP features into semantics-dominated and structure-dominated subspaces, enabling targeted structural enhancement by DINO without distorting language-aligned semantics. Subsequently, a prior-driven graph rectification module injects high-fidelity structural priors under DINO guidance to form a refined branch, while an uncertainty-guided adaptive fusion module dynamically integrates this refined branch with the original CLIP branch for final prediction. Comprehensive experiments across eight benchmarks demonstrate that DR-Seg establishes a new state-of-the-art.

AI.tldr: DR-Seg是一种用于遥感开放词汇语义分割的解耦纠正框架，通过将CLIP特征解耦为语义主导和结构主导的子空间，针对性增强结构信息同时保留语言对齐的语义完整性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将CLIP表征视为统一的语义空间，无法定位结构增强的位置，导致边界描绘不准确且可能破坏CLIP的语义完整性。
AI.method: 1.将CLIP特征解耦为语义主导和结构主导两个子空间；2.使用先验驱动图纠正模块在DINO指导下注入高保真结构先验；3.采用不确定性引导自适应融合模块动态整合优化分支与原始CLIP分支进行最终预测。
AI.result: 在八个基准数据集上实现了新的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: DR-Seg通过解耦表示学习有效增强了结构细节，同时保留了CLIP的语义完整性，为遥感开放词汇语义分割提供了有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about remote sensing semantic segmentation - completely unrelated to 3D Human Motion Generation. While it uses similar methods (CLIP, DINO, feature extraction), the application domain is entirely different - it's about satellite imagery segmentation, not video-to-motion translation or 3D motion generation. This is a different field entirely with no overlap in application domain.

title: Are VLMs Lost Between Sky and Space? LinkS$^2$Bench for UAV-Satellite Dynamic Cross-View Spatial Intelligence
summary: Synergistic spatial intelligence between UAVs and satellites is indispensable for emergency response and security operations, as it uniquely integrates macro-scale global coverage with dynamic, real-time local perception. However, the capacity of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to master this complex interplay remains largely unexplored. This gap persists primarily because existing benchmarks are confined to isolated Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) videos or static satellite imagery, failing to evaluate the dynamic local-to-global spatial mapping essential for comprehensive cross-view reasoning. To bridge this gap, we introduce LinkS$^2$Bench, the first comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate VLMs' wide-area, dynamic cross-view spatial intelligence. LinkS$^2$Bench links 1,022 minutes of dynamic UAV footage with high-resolution satellite imagery covering over 200 km$^2$. Through an LMM-assisted pipeline and rigorous human annotation, we constructed 17.9k high-quality question-answer pairs comprising 12 fine-grained tasks across four dimensions: perception, localization, relation, and reasoning. Evaluations of 18 representative VLMs reveal a substantial gap compared to human baselines, identifying accurate cross-view dynamic alignment as the critical bottleneck. To alleviate this, we design a Cross-View Alignment Adapter, demonstrating that explicit alignment significantly improves model performance. Furthermore, fine-tuning experiments underscore the potential of LinkS$^2$Bench in advancing VLM adaptation for complex spatial reasoning.

AI.tldr: LinkS$^2$Bench是首个评估视觉语言模型(VLM)在无人机与卫星跨视图空间智能的基准测试，解决了现有基准无法评估动态局部-全局空间映射的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基准仅局限于孤立的无人机视频或静态卫星图像，无法评估跨视图动态空间映射推理能力，而无人机与卫星的协同空间智能在应急响应和安全运营中至关重要。
AI.method: 通过LMM辅助管道和严格人工标注，构建了17.9k高质量问答对，包含12个细粒度任务，涵盖感知、定位、关系和推理四个维度，链接了1022分钟动态无人机 footage与超过200平方公里高分辨率卫星影像。
AI.result: 对18个代表性VLM的评估显示与人类基准存在显著差距，准确跨视图动态对齐被认为是关键瓶颈。设计的跨视图对齐适配器证明了显式对齐可显著提升模型性能。
AI.conclusion: LinkS$^2$Bench benchmark和跨视图对齐适配器为VLM在复杂空间推理任务中的适应提供了有效方法，填补了VLM跨视图空间智能评估的空白。

relevance_reason: COMPLETELY DIFFERENT APPLICATION DOMAIN. This paper is about UAV (drone) and satellite cross-view spatial intelligence - evaluating VLMs on aerial imagery alignment tasks. The research profile is about Computer Graphics - 3D Human Motion Generation from 2D videos. While both mention "VLM", this is a different method application: the paper uses VLMs for spatial reasoning between drone and satellite imagery, not for quality supervision in video-to-motion translation. The paper has nothing to do with 3D human motion generation, temporal consistency in visual-to-motion translation, or domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion representations. The pain points are completely unrelated.

title: Rare-Aware Autoencoding: Reconstructing Spatially Imbalanced Data
summary: Autoencoders can be challenged by spatially non-uniform sampling of image content. This is common in medical imaging, biology, and physics, where informative patterns occur rarely at specific image coordinates, as background dominates these locations in most samples, biasing reconstructions toward the majority appearance. In practice, autoencoders are biased toward dominant patterns resulting in the loss of fine-grained detail and causing blurred reconstructions for rare spatial inputs especially under spatial data imbalance. We address spatial imbalance by two complementary components: (i) self-entropy-based loss that upweights statistically uncommon spatial locations and (ii) Sample Propagation, a replay mechanism that selectively re-exposes the model to hard to reconstruct samples across batches during training. We benchmark existing data balancing strategies, originally developed for supervised classification, in the unsupervised reconstruction setting. Drawing on the limitations of these approaches, our method specifically targets spatial imbalance by encouraging models to focus on statistically rare locations, improving reconstruction consistency compared to existing baselines. We validate in a simulated dataset with controlled spatial imbalance conditions, and in three, uncontrolled, diverse real-world datasets spanning physical, biological, and astronomical domains. Our approach outperforms baselines on various reconstruction metrics, particularly under spatial imbalance distributions. These results highlight the importance of data representation in a batch and emphasize rare samples in unsupervised image reconstruction. We will make all code and related data available.

AI.tldr: 针对自编码器在空间数据不平衡下重建质量下降的问题，提出自熵损失和样本传播机制两个组件，通过上采样罕见空间位置和选择性重放难样本来改善重建效果，在模拟和真实数据集上验证有效。
AI.motivation: 在医学成像、生物学和物理学中，图像内容存在空间非均匀采样问题，信息丰富的模式在特定坐标处稀疏出现，而背景占据大部分位置，导致自编码器偏向主导模式，造成细粒度细节丢失和模糊重建。
AI.method: 提出两种互补方法：(1)自熵损失函数，对统计上不常见的空间位置进行加权上采样；(2)样本传播机制，在训练过程中选择性重放难重建样本。同时基准测试了原本用于监督分类的数据平衡策略在无监督重建任务中的表现。
AI.result: 在模拟数据集和三个真实世界数据集（物理、生物、天文）上验证，自编码器在各种重建指标上优于基线方法，特别是在空间不平衡分布条件下提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自熵损失和样本传播机制有效解决了空间数据不平衡问题，在模拟和真实数据集上均优于基线方法，特别是在空间不平衡分布下效果显著。代码和数据将公开可用。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses spatial data imbalance in autoencoders for medical imaging, biology, and physics applications - completely unrelated to the research profile of 3D Human Motion Generation in Computer Graphics. The application domain is entirely different (medical/biological imaging vs human motion generation), the methods are different (autoencoders vs Video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance and VLM-based supervision), and the pain points are unrelated (spatial sampling imbalance vs video-to-motion translation and temporal consistency). No relevance to computer graphics or motion generation tasks.

title: IndoorCrowd: A Multi-Scene Dataset for Human Detection, Segmentation, and Tracking with an Automated Annotation Pipeline
comment: Accepted at Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshops 2026
summary: Understanding human behaviour in crowded indoor environments is central to surveillance, smart buildings, and human-robot interaction, yet existing datasets rarely capture real-world indoor complexity at scale. We introduce IndoorCrowd, a multi-scene dataset for indoor human detection, instance segmentation, and multi-object tracking, collected across four campus locations (ACS-EC, ACS-EG, IE-Central, R-Central). It comprises $31$ videos ($9{,}913$ frames at $5$fps) with human-verified, per-instance segmentation masks. A $620$-frame control subset benchmarks three foundation-model auto-annotators: SAM3, GroundingSAM, and EfficientGroundingSAM, against human labels using Cohen's $κ$, AP, precision, recall, and mask IoU. A further $2{,}552$-frame subset supports multi-object tracking with continuous identity tracks in MOTChallenge format. We establish detection, segmentation, and tracking baselines using YOLOv8n, YOLOv26n, and RT-DETR-L paired with ByteTrack, BoT-SORT, and OC-SORT. Per-scene analysis reveals substantial difficulty variation driven by crowd density, scale, and occlusion: ACS-EC, with $79.3\%$ dense frames and a mean instance scale of $60.8$px, is the most challenging scene. The project page is available at https://sheepseb.github.io/IndoorCrowd/.

AI.tldr: IndoorCrowd是一个用于室内人群检测、实例分割和多目标跟踪的多场景数据集，包含31个视频（9,913帧，5fps），涵盖4个校园场景，并附有人工验证的实例分割掩码。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集很少在规模上捕捉真实世界的室内复杂性，而理解拥挤室内环境中的人类行为对于监控、智能建筑和人机交互至关重要。
AI.method: 该数据集包含620帧控制子集用于基准测试三种基础模型自动标注器（SAM3、GroundingSAM、EfficientGroundingSAM），以及2,552帧子集支持多目标跟踪。使用YOLOv8n、YOLOv26n、RT-DETR-L与ByteTrack、BoT-SORT、OC-SORT建立检测、分割和跟踪基线。
AI.result: ACS-EC场景最具挑战性（79.3%密集帧，平均实例尺度60.8px），各场景间存在由人群密度、尺度和遮挡驱动的显著难度差异。
AI.conclusion: IndoorCrowd数据集为室内人群分析提供了全面的基准，可用于推动检测、分割和跟踪领域的研究。

relevance_reason: The paper is about indoor crowd detection, segmentation, and tracking in computer vision - completely different from 3D Human Motion Generation in computer graphics. While it deals with human detection in videos, it does NOT address any of the pain points: no domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion, no temporal consistency for visual-to-motion translation, no quality control for generated content, and no visual guidance feature extraction for motion generation. Methods are also completely different (YOLO, SAM, tracking algorithms vs VLM, video generation models, 3D motion generation models). This paper analyzes existing video content rather than generating 3D human motion.

title: Efficient Reasoning via Thought Compression for Language Segmentation
summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning has significantly improved the performance of large multimodal models in language-guided segmentation, yet its prohibitive computational cost, stemming from generating verbose rationales, limits real-world applicability. We introduce WISE (Wisdom from Internal Self-Exploration), a novel paradigm for efficient reasoning guided by the principle of \textit{thinking twice -- once for learning, once for speed}. WISE trains a model to generate a structured sequence: a concise rationale, the final answer, and then a detailed explanation. By placing the concise rationale first, our method leverages autoregressive conditioning to enforce that the concise rationale acts as a sufficient summary for generating the detailed explanation. This structure is reinforced by a self-distillation objective that jointly rewards semantic fidelity and conciseness, compelling the model to internalize its detailed reasoning into a compact form. At inference, the detailed explanation is omitted. To address the resulting conditional distribution shift, our inference strategy, WISE-S, employs a simple prompting technique that injects a brevity-focused instruction into the user's query. This final adjustment facilitates the robust activation of the learned concise policy, unlocking the full benefits of our framework. Extensive experiments show that WISE-S achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot performance on the ReasonSeg benchmark with 58.3 cIoU, while reducing the average reasoning length by nearly \textbf{5$\times$} -- from 112 to just 23 tokens. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/mrazhou/WISE}{WISE}.

AI.tldr: WISE是一种高效的多模态推理范式，通过自蒸馏训练将冗长的推理过程压缩为紧凑形式，在推理时丢弃详细解释，实现5倍推理长度缩减的同时保持先进性能。
AI.motivation: 链式推理(CoT)虽能提升大型多模态模型的分割性能，但其生成的冗长推理文本带来极高的计算成本，限制了实际应用场景的部署。
AI.method: 提出"先学习后提速"的双阶段思考框架：1)训练阶段让模型生成"简洁理由→最终答案→详细解释"的结构化序列，通过自蒸馏目标同时奖励语义保真度和简洁性；2)推理阶段采用WISE-S策略，在查询中注入简洁导向指令，激活学习到的简洁策略。
AI.result: 在ReasonSeg基准上实现58.3 cIoU的零样本最新性能，推理长度从112个token缩减至23个，实现近5倍压缩。
AI.conclusion: WISE通过自蒸馏和推理时提示调整的组合，成功实现了推理效率与性能的平衡，为多模态模型的高效推理提供了新范式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about language segmentation and multi-modal reasoning compression - completely unrelated to 3D Human Motion Generation in Computer Graphics. The application domain is entirely different: the paper focuses on semantic segmentation tasks and compressing reasoning tokens for visual language models, while the research profile is about generating 3D human motion from video. There is no match in application domain, methods (beyond VLMs loosely), or research area.

title: Jagle: Building a Large-Scale Japanese Multimodal Post-Training Dataset for Vision-Language Models
summary: Developing vision-language models (VLMs) that generalize across diverse tasks requires large-scale training datasets with diverse content. In English, such datasets are typically constructed by aggregating and curating numerous existing visual question answering (VQA) resources. However, this strategy does not readily extend to other languages, where VQA datasets remain limited in both scale and domain coverage, posing a major obstacle to building high-quality multilingual and non-English VLMs. In this work, we introduce Jagle, the largest Japanese multimodal post-training dataset to date, comprising approximately 9.2 million instances across diverse tasks. Rather than relying on existing VQA datasets, we collect heterogeneous source data, including images, image-text pairs, and PDF documents, and generate VQA pairs through multiple strategies such as VLM-based QA generation, translation, and text rendering. Experiments demonstrate that a 2.2B model trained with Jagle achieves strong performance on Japanese tasks, surpassing InternVL3.5-2B in average score across ten Japanese evaluation tasks and approaching within five points of Qwen3-VL-2B-Instruct. Furthermore, combining Jagle with FineVision does not degrade English performance; instead, it improves English performance compared to training with FineVision alone. To facilitate reproducibility and future research, we release the dataset, trained models, and code.

AI.tldr: Jagle是迄今为止最大的日语多模态后训练数据集，包含约920万实例，通过异构源数据利用VLM问答生成、翻译和文本渲染等策略构建。基于该数据集训练的2.2B模型在日语任务上表现优异且保持甚至提升英语性能。
AI.motivation: 当前英语可通过聚合现有VQA资源构建大规模训练数据，但其他语言特别是日语的VQA数据集规模有限且领域覆盖不足，严重阻碍了高质量多语言和非英语VLM的开发。
AI.method: 通过VLM问答生成、翻译和文本渲染等多种策略，从异构源数据（图像、图像-文本对、PDF文档）收集并生成VQA数据对，构建了约920万实例的日语多模态后训练数据集Jagle。
AI.result: 基于Jagle训练的2.2B模型在10项日语评估任务上平均分数超越InternVL3.5-2B，与Qwen3-VL-2B-Instruct差距缩小至5分以内；结合FineVision使用时，不仅未损害英语性能，反而提升了英语表现。
AI.conclusion: Jagle数据集的发布为日语多模态模型训练提供了重要资源，实验表明基于Jagle训练的2.2B模型在日语任务上表现优异，且不影响英语性能，反而有提升作用。数据集、模型和代码均已开源发布。

relevance_reason: This paper is about building a Japanese multimodal dataset for Vision-Language Model training (NLP/VLM domain), while the research profile is about 3D Human Motion Generation from 2D videos (Computer Graphics domain). Although both mention "VLM", they serve completely different purposes: the paper uses VLM to generate VQA data for Japanese language tasks, not for quality supervision in motion generation. The application domains are entirely different - this is about Japanese VLM development, not about video-to-motion translation, temporal consistency, or 3D motion synthesis. The paper is irrelevant to the research profile.

title: True to Tone? Quantifying Skin Tone Fidelity and Bias in Photographic-to-Virtual Human Pipelines
summary: Accurate reproduction of facial skin tone is essential for realism, identity preservation, and fairness in Virtual Human (VH) rendering. However, most accessible avatar creation pipelines rely on photographic inputs that lack colorimetric calibration, which can introduce inconsistencies and bias. We propose a fully automatic and scalable methodology to systematically evaluate skin tone fidelity across the VH generation pipeline. Our approach defines a full workflow that integrates skin color and illumination extraction, texture recolorization, real-time rendering, and quantitative color analysis. Using facial images from the Chicago Face Database (CFD), we compare skin tone extraction strategies based on cheek-region sampling, following the literature, and multidimensional masking derived from full-face analysis. Additionally, we test both strategies with lighting isolation, using the pre-trained TRUST framework, employed without any training or optimization within our pipeline. Extracted skin tones are applied to MetaHuman textures and rendered under multiple lighting configurations. Skin tone consistency is evaluated objectively in the CIELAB color space using the $ΔE$ metric and the Individual Typology Angle (ITA). The proposed methodology operates without manual intervention and, with the exception of pre-trained illumination compensation modules, the pipeline does not include learning or training stages, enabling low computational cost and large-scale evaluation. Using this framework, we generate and analyze approximately 19,848 rendered instances. Our results show phenotype-dependent behavior of extraction strategies and consistently higher colorimetric errors for darker skin tones.

AI.tldr: 研究提出了一种全自动、可扩展的方法来评估虚拟人渲染中的皮肤色调保真度，通过整合皮肤颜色提取、纹理重着色和定量颜色分析，使用CIELAB色彩空间的ΔE和ITA指标进行客观评估，揭示了深肤色人群更高的色度误差问题。
AI.motivation: 虚拟人（VH）渲染中面部皮肤色调的准确再现对真实感、身份保真度和公平性至关重要。然而，大多数可访问的虚拟人创建流程依赖于缺乏色度校准的摄影输入，这可能引入不一致性和偏见，特别是对深肤色人群。
AI.method: 提出了一种全自动且可扩展的方法来系统评估VH生成管道中的皮肤色调保真度。整合了皮肤颜色和光照提取、纹理重着色、实时渲染和定量颜色分析。使用芝加哥面部数据库（CFD）的面部图像，比较了基于脸颊区域采样的策略和基于全脸分析的多维掩码策略。使用预训练的TRUST框架进行光照隔离测试。提取的皮肤色调应用于MetaHuman纹理并在多种光照配置下渲染。在CIELAB色彩空间中使用ΔE指标和个体类型学角度（ITA）进行皮肤色调一致性评估。
AI.result: 生成了约19,848个渲染实例进行分析。结果显示提取策略表现出表型依赖性行为，深肤色人群的色度误差始终更高。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法无需人工干预，除预训练的光照补偿模块外，管道不包含学习或训练阶段，实现了低计算成本和大规模评估。该工作为虚拟人皮肤色调保真度的客观评估提供了标准化框架。

relevance_reason: This paper is about virtual human rendering and skin tone fidelity in graphical pipelines (MetaHuman, texture rendering, color analysis), NOT about 3D human motion generation. The application domain is completely different - it deals with visual appearance/rendering quality of virtual humans rather than generating human motion from videos. The pain points in the research profile (domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion, temporal consistency, visual-to-motion translation) are not addressed at all. This is a rendering/graphics paper focused on color accuracy, not a motion generation paper.

title: Omni123: Exploring 3D Native Foundation Models with Limited 3D Data by Unifying Text to 2D and 3D Generation
summary: Recent multimodal large language models have achieved strong performance in unified text and image understanding and generation, yet extending such native capability to 3D remains challenging due to limited data. Compared to abundant 2D imagery, high-quality 3D assets are scarce, making 3D synthesis under-constrained. Existing methods often rely on indirect pipelines that edit in 2D and lift results into 3D via optimization, sacrificing geometric consistency. We present Omni123, a 3D-native foundation model that unifies text-to-2D and text-to-3D generation within a single autoregressive framework. Our key insight is that cross-modal consistency between images and 3D can serve as an implicit structural constraint. By representing text, images, and 3D as discrete tokens in a shared sequence space, the model leverages abundant 2D data as a geometric prior to improve 3D representations. We introduce an interleaved X-to-X training paradigm that coordinates diverse cross-modal tasks over heterogeneous paired datasets without requiring fully aligned text-image-3D triplets. By traversing semantic-visual-geometric cycles (e.g., text to image to 3D to image) within autoregressive sequences, the model jointly enforces semantic alignment, appearance fidelity, and multi-view geometric consistency. Experiments show that Omni123 significantly improves text-guided 3D generation and editing, demonstrating a scalable path toward multimodal 3D world models.

AI.tldr: Omni123是一个统一的3D原生基础模型，通过将文本、图像和3D表示为共享序列空间中的离散标记，在单一自回归框架中实现文本到2D和文本到3D的生成。
AI.motivation: 现有的3D合成方法受限于高质量3D资产稀缺的问题，通常依赖间接管道（2D编辑后提升到3D），牺牲了几何一致性。需要一个能够统一文本到2D和文本到3D生成的原生3D模型。
AI.method: 提出跨模态一致性作为隐式结构约束，将文本、图像和3D表示为共享序列空间中的离散标记；引入交错X-to-X训练范式，协调异构配对数据集上的跨模态任务，无需完全对齐的文本-图像-3D三元组；通过遍历语义-视觉-几何循环（如文本→图像→3D→图像）来联合强制语义对齐、 appearance保真度和多视图几何一致性。
AI.result: Omni123显著提升了文本引导的3D生成和编辑性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为实现多模态3D世界模型提供了一条可扩展的路径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D asset/object generation from text (creating 3D meshes/geometry), not 3D human motion generation. While both involve "3D", the application domains are completely different: the research profile needs human motion animation (temporal sequence of skeletal movement), while Omni123 focuses on static 3D geometry synthesis. The pain points, methods, and target output are fundamentally mismatched - this paper addresses text-to-3D-asset creation, not video-to-motion translation or human animation.

title: VOID: Video Object and Interaction Deletion
summary: Existing video object removal methods excel at inpainting content "behind" the object and correcting appearance-level artifacts such as shadows and reflections. However, when the removed object has more significant interactions, such as collisions with other objects, current models fail to correct them and produce implausible results. We present VOID, a video object removal framework designed to perform physically-plausible inpainting in these complex scenarios. To train the model, we generate a new paired dataset of counterfactual object removals using Kubric and HUMOTO, where removing an object requires altering downstream physical interactions. During inference, a vision-language model identifies regions of the scene affected by the removed object. These regions are then used to guide a video diffusion model that generates physically consistent counterfactual outcomes. Experiments on both synthetic and real data show that our approach better preserves consistent scene dynamics after object removal compared to prior video object removal methods. We hope this framework sheds light on how to make video editing models better simulators of the world through high-level causal reasoning.

AI.tldr: VOID是一个视频目标移除框架，通过生成反事实配对数据集、视觉语言模型引导和视频扩散模型，实现物理上合理的目标移除，特别擅长处理物体间的碰撞等复杂物理交互场景。
AI.motivation: 现有视频目标移除方法擅长处理"后方"内容和外观层面的伪影（如阴影、反射），但当被移除物体与其他物体有更重要的物理交互（如碰撞）时，当前模型无法产生物理上合理的结果。
AI.method: 1) 使用Kubric和HUMOTO生成反事实目标移除的配对数据集；2) 使用视觉语言模型在推理时识别受移除物体影响的区域；3) 使用视频扩散模型生成物理一致的反事实结果。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据上的实验表明，与之前的视频目标移除方法相比，该方法能更好地保持移除物体后场景动态的一致性。
AI.conclusion: 提出VOID框架，通过高级因果推理使视频编辑模型成为更好的世界模拟器，为视频编辑模型的物理一致性研究开辟新方向。

relevance_reason: Despite some method overlap (VLM guidance, video diffusion, physical consistency), this paper addresses VIDEO OBJECT REMOVAL - a video editing task, NOT 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is fundamentally different: the paper removes unwanted objects from existing videos, whereas the research profile needs to GENERATE 3D motion from 2D video inputs. While both involve video diffusion and VLMs, the end goal differs significantly - video editing vs. motion generation. The mentioned HUMOTO dataset usage is for object interaction data, not motion generation.

title: CompassAD: Intent-Driven 3D Affordance Grounding in Functionally Competing Objects
summary: When told to "cut the apple," a robot must choose the knife over nearby scissors, despite both objects affording the same cutting function. In real-world scenes, multiple objects may share identical affordances, yet only one is appropriate under the given task context. We call such cases confusing pairs. However, existing 3D affordance methods largely sidestep this challenge by evaluating isolated single objects, often with explicit category names provided in the query. We formalize Multi-Object Affordance Grounding under Intent-Driven Instructions, a new 3D affordance setting that requires predicting a per-point affordance mask on the correct object within a cluttered multi-object point cloud, conditioned on implicit natural language intent. To study this problem, we construct CompassAD, the first benchmark centered on implicit intent in confusable multi-object scenes. It comprises 30 confusing object pairs spanning 16 affordance types, 6,422 scenes, and 88K+ query-answer pairs. Furthermore, we propose CompassNet, a framework that incorporates two dedicated modules tailored to this task. Instance-bounded Cross Injection (ICI) constrains language-geometry alignment within object boundaries to prevent cross-object semantic leakage. Bi-level Contrastive Refinement (BCR) enforces discrimination at both geometric-group and point levels, sharpening distinctions between target and confusable surfaces. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art results on both seen and unseen queries, and deployment on a robotic manipulator confirms effective transfer to real-world grasping in confusing multi-object scenes.

AI.tldr: 提出多对象Affordance接地新任务，要求在混乱的多对象点云中根据隐式自然语言意图预测正确对象的每点affordance掩码。构建了包含30对混淆对象、16种affordance类型、6,422个场景和88K+查询答案对的CompassAD基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有3D affordance方法主要评估孤立单对象，通常提供明确类别名称，忽略了真实场景中多个对象可能具有相同affordance但只有其中一个适合当前任务上下文的问题。作者称之为"混淆对"(confusing pairs)，这是现有方法未能有效解决的核心挑战。
AI.method: 提出CompassNet框架，包含两个专用模块：1) 实例边界交叉注入(ICI)模块，将语言-几何对齐约束在对象边界内，防止跨对象语义泄漏；2) 双层对比细化(BCR)模块，在几何组和点级别进行判别，增强目标和混淆表面之间的区分度。
AI.result: 在CompassAD基准上实现最先进性能，在可见和不可见查询上均表现出色；并在真实机器人manipulator上部署验证了其在混淆多对象场景中抓取的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了Multi-Object Affordance Grounding新任务，构建了首个专注于隐式意图的混淆多对象场景基准数据集CompassAD，并设计了CompassNet框架。实验表明该方法在可见和不可见查询上均达到最先进水平，并在真实机器人 manipulator 上成功部署验证了其在混淆多对象场景中抓取的有效性转移。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D affordance grounding for ROBOTICS manipulation (grasping), NOT 3D human motion generation. The application domain is completely different - it's about point cloud understanding for robot grippers to understand what objects can do, not about generating human motion sequences. There is no video-to-motion translation, temporal consistency in motion, or human motion generation involved. This is a robotics/CV paper dealing with multi-object scene understanding for manipulation tasks, which has zero relevance to the research profile focused on 3D human motion generation from video.

title: Steerable Visual Representations
summary: Pretrained Vision Transformers (ViTs) such as DINOv2 and MAE provide generic image features that can be applied to a variety of downstream tasks such as retrieval, classification, and segmentation. However, such representations tend to focus on the most salient visual cues in the image, with no way to direct them toward less prominent concepts of interest. In contrast, Multimodal LLMs can be guided with textual prompts, but the resulting representations tend to be language-centric and lose their effectiveness for generic visual tasks. To address this, we introduce Steerable Visual Representations, a new class of visual representations, whose global and local features can be steered with natural language. While most vision-language models (e.g., CLIP) fuse text with visual features after encoding (late fusion), we inject text directly into the layers of the visual encoder (early fusion) via lightweight cross-attention. We introduce benchmarks for measuring representational steerability, and demonstrate that our steerable visual features can focus on any desired objects in an image while preserving the underlying representation quality. Our method also matches or outperforms dedicated approaches on anomaly detection and personalized object discrimination, exhibiting zero-shot generalization to out-of-distribution tasks.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种名为"可转向视觉表示"的新方法，通过在视觉编码器层中注入文本信息（早期融合）来实现用自然语言引导全局和局部视觉特征，解决了预训练ViTs关注显著视觉线索而忽略次要概念以及多模态LLMs语言中心化的问题。该方法在异常检测和个性化对象识别任务上表现优异，并具有零样本泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉模型存在两个局限性：1) 预训练ViTs（如DINOv2、MAE）虽能提供通用图像特征，但聚焦于最显著的视觉线索，无法引导至次要概念；2) 多模态LLMs虽可通过文本提示引导，但倾向于语言中心化，失去通用视觉任务的有效性。
AI.method: 提出可转向视觉表示，通过轻量级交叉注意力将文本直接注入视觉编码器层（早期融合），而非CLIP等模型的晚期融合方式，使全局和局部特征均可通过自然语言进行转向控制。
AI.result: 可转向视觉特征能聚焦于图像中任意期望目标，同时保持底层表示质量。在异常检测和个性化对象区分任务上达到或超越专用方法，并展现零样本泛化到分布外任务的能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功融合了预训练ViTs的通用视觉能力和自然语言引导的灵活性，为视觉表示学习提供新范式，具有广泛的应用前景。

relevance_reason: This paper is about "Steerable Visual Representations" for anomaly detection and personalized object recognition tasks in computer vision. While it uses Visual Language Models, this is a completely different application domain from 3D Human Motion Generation in Computer Graphics. The paper focuses on text-guided visual feature steering for image understanding tasks, not video-to-motion translation, 3D motion generation, or quality control for generated video content. It does not address any of the stated pain points (domain gap, temporal consistency, quality control, visual guidance extraction for motion generation).

title: ActionParty: Multi-Subject Action Binding in Generative Video Games
summary: Recent advances in video diffusion have enabled the development of "world models" capable of simulating interactive environments. However, these models are largely restricted to single-agent settings, failing to control multiple agents simultaneously in a scene. In this work, we tackle a fundamental issue of action binding in existing video diffusion models, which struggle to associate specific actions with their corresponding subjects. For this purpose, we propose ActionParty, an action controllable multi-subject world model for generative video games. It introduces subject state tokens, i.e. latent variables that persistently capture the state of each subject in the scene. By jointly modeling state tokens and video latents with a spatial biasing mechanism, we disentangle global video frame rendering from individual action-controlled subject updates. We evaluate ActionParty on the Melting Pot benchmark, demonstrating the first video world model capable of controlling up to seven players simultaneously across 46 diverse environments. Our results show significant improvements in action-following accuracy and identity consistency, while enabling robust autoregressive tracking of subjects through complex interactions.

AI.tldr: ActionParty是一个动作可控的多主体世界模型，用于生成式视频游戏，能够同时控制多个智能体。该工作解决了现有视频扩散模型中动作绑定的问题，即难以将特定动作与对应主体关联起来。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型大多局限于单主体设置，无法同时控制场景中的多个智能体。这一动作绑定问题是构建交互式多主体世界模型的主要障碍。
AI.method: 提出主体状态标记（subject state tokens），即能够持续捕获场景中每个主体状态的潜在变量。通过空间偏置机制将状态标记与视频潜在变量联合建模，将全局视频帧渲染与个体动作控制的主体更新解耦。
AI.result: 在Melting Pot基准上进行了评估，实现了首个可同时控制多达7名玩家、跨越46种不同环境的视频世界模型。在动作跟随准确性和身份一致性方面取得了显著提升，并能够通过复杂交互实现主体的稳健自回归追踪。
AI.conclusion: ActionParty成功解决了视频世界模型中的多主体控制问题，为生成式视频游戏中的交互式多智能体模拟开辟了新途径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about generative video games and multi-subject video generation, NOT about 3D human motion generation in computer graphics. While both use diffusion models, the application domain is completely different: the paper focuses on controlling multiple agents in video game scenarios for video generation, whereas the research profile is about generating 3D human motion for graphics/character animation. The pain points, methods (video diffusion for games vs 3D motion generation), and end goals are entirely distinct. This is a case of similar methods (diffusion) but wrong application domain.

title: PLUME: Latent Reasoning Based Universal Multimodal Embedding
summary: Universal multimodal embedding (UME) maps heterogeneous inputs into a shared retrieval space with a single model. Recent approaches improve UME by generating explicit chain-of-thought (CoT) rationales before extracting embeddings, enabling multimodal large language models to better infer complex query intent. However, explicit CoT incurs substantial inference overhead and can compress rich multimodal evidence into a narrow textual bottleneck. We propose PLUME, a latent reasoning framework that advances UME by replacing verbalized CoT with a short autoregressive rollout of continuous latent states. To support diverse multimodal queries, PLUME further introduces a semantic-anchor-guided transition adapter that steers latent rollout along different reasoning trajectories under the same fixed computation budget. To stabilize training, PLUME adopts a progressive explicit-to-latent curriculum that uses verbalized reasoning only as a temporary training scaffold and gradually transfers this behavior into hidden-state computation, eliminating explicit CoT at inference. On the 78-task MMEB-v2 benchmark, PLUME outperforms strong explicit-CoT UME baselines while reducing reasoning from hundreds of generated tokens to fewer than 10 latent steps, delivering over 30x faster inference. PLUME is especially well suited to retrieval settings where relevant evidence is dense, structurally complex, and difficult to organize through verbalized intermediate rationales, such as video and visual document retrieval. These results show that structured latent computation can preserve the benefits of intermediate reasoning without the overhead of explicit rationale generation, providing a stronger and more efficient paradigm for practical retrieval systems.

AI.tldr: PLUME是一种通用多模态嵌入框架，通过将显式思维链替换为短序列连续潜在状态的自回归 rollout 来实现潜在推理，并引入语义锚引导的转换适配器和渐进式显式到潜课程训练，在78任务MMEB-v2基准上超越显式CoT基线，推理速度提升30倍以上。
AI.motivation: 当前显式思维链(CoT)方法存在两个关键问题：1)推理产生大量token导致推理开销大；2)将丰富的多模态证据压缩成狭窄的文本瓶颈，限制了多模态信息的完整表达。
AI.method: 1.用连续潜在状态的自回归rollout替代显式CoT；2.引入语义锚引导的转换适配器，引导潜在rollout沿不同推理轨迹；3.采用渐进式显式到潜课程训练，用 verbalized reasoning 作为临时训练脚手架，逐步将行为转移到隐藏状态计算。
AI.result: 在78任务MMEB-v2基准上超越强显式CoT基线；推理从数百个token减少到少于10个潜在步骤；推理速度提升超过30倍；在视频和视觉文档检索等证据密集、 结构复杂的场景表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 结构化潜在计算可以在不产生显式理由生成开销的情况下保留中间推理的好处，为实际检索系统提供了更强、更高效的范式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multimodal embedding with latent reasoning for general vision-language tasks (retrieval, classification), not about 3D human motion generation or video-to-motion translation. The application domain is completely different - it addresses general multimodal understanding problems, not the specific challenges of generating 3D human motion from 2D videos. The pain points mentioned (domain gap, temporal consistency in motion, quality control of motion) are not addressed at all.

title: GroundVTS: Visual Token Sampling in Multimodal Large Language Models for Video Temporal Grounding
comment: Published as a conference paper at CVPR 2026
summary: Video temporal grounding (VTG) is a critical task in video understanding and a key capability for extending video large language models (Vid-LLMs) to broader applications. However, existing Vid-LLMs rely on uniform frame sampling to extract video information, resulting in a sparse distribution of key frames and the loss of crucial temporal cues. To address this limitation, we propose Grounded Visual Token Sampling (GroundVTS), a Vid-LLM architecture that focuses on the most informative temporal segments. GroundVTS employs a fine-grained, query-guided mechanism to filter visual tokens before feeding them into the LLM, thereby preserving essential spatio-temporal information and maintaining temporal coherence. Futhermore, we introduce a progressive optimization strategy that enables the LLM to effectively adapt to the non-uniform distribution of visual features, enhancing its ability to model temporal dependencies and achieve precise video localization. We comprehensively evaluate GroundVTS on three standard VTG benchmarks, where it outperforms existing methods, achieving a 7.7-point improvement in mIoU for moment retrieval and 12.0-point improvement in mAP for highlight detection. Code is available at https://github.com/Florence365/GroundVTS.

AI.tldr: GroundVTS是一种针对视频时序定位（VTG）任务的新型视频大语言模型架构，通过查询引导的细粒度视觉token采样机制选择最具信息量的时序片段，并采用渐进式优化策略帮助LLM适应视觉特征的非均匀分布，从而更好地建模时序依赖并实现精准的视频定位。
AI.motivation: 现有Vid-LLM依赖均匀帧采样来提取视频信息，导致关键帧分布稀疏，时序线索丢失，限制了视频时序定位任务的性能。
AI.method: 1) 采用细粒度、查询引导的机制在视觉token输入LLM前进行过滤，保留关键的空间时序信息并保持时序一致性；2) 引入渐进式优化策略，使LLM能够有效适应视觉特征的非均匀分布，增强时序依赖建模能力。
AI.result: 在三个标准VTG基准测试上超越现有方法，moment retrieval任务mIoU提升7.7点，highlight detection任务mAP提升12.0点。
AI.conclusion: GroundVTS通过关注最具信息量的时序片段并保留关键时空信息，有效解决了均匀采样导致的关键帧稀疏和时序线索丢失问题，显著提升了视频时序定位性能。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses Video Temporal Grounding (VTG) - a computer vision task for localizing temporal segments in videos. This is completely different from the research profile's focus on 3D Human Motion Generation. Although both involve video analysis, VTG is about understanding and localizing moments in video, not generating 3D human motion. The paper doesn't address any of the stated pain points: domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion, temporal consistency in visual-to-motion translation, quality control of generated video content, or extracting visual guidance features for 3D motion generation.

title: LatentUM: Unleashing the Potential of Interleaved Cross-Modal Reasoning via a Latent-Space Unified Model
summary: Unified models (UMs) hold promise for their ability to understand and generate content across heterogeneous modalities. Compared to merely generating visual content, the use of UMs for interleaved cross-modal reasoning is more promising and valuable, e.g., for solving understanding problems that require dense visual thinking, improving visual generation through self-reflection, or modeling visual dynamics of the physical world guided by stepwise action interventions. However, existing UMs necessitate pixel decoding as a bridge due to their disjoint visual representations for understanding and generation, which is both ineffective and inefficient. In this paper, we introduce LatentUM, a novel unified model that represents all modalities within a shared semantic latent space, eliminating the need for pixel-space mediation between visual understanding and generation. This design naturally enables flexible interleaved cross-modal reasoning and generation. Beyond improved computational efficiency, the shared representation substantially alleviates codec bias and strengthens cross-modal alignment, allowing LatentUM to achieve state-of-the-art performance on the Visual Spatial Planning benchmark, push the limits of visual generation through self-reflection, and support world modeling by predicting future visual states within the shared semantic latent space.

AI.tldr: LatentUM是一种新型统一模型，将所有模态表示在共享语义latent空间中，消除了传统方法中视觉理解与生成之间的像素级中介，实现了高效的跨模态推理和生成，并在视觉空间规划等任务上取得领先性能。
AI.motivation: 现有统一模型(UM)因理解和生成的视觉表示分离，需要像素解码作为桥接，既低效又无效。跨模态推理（如密集视觉思维、自反思式视觉生成、物理世界建模）需要更紧密的模态融合。
AI.method: LatentUM将所有模态表示在共享的语义latent空间中，消除了视觉理解和生成之间的像素空间桥接，实现了灵活的跨模态推理和生成。
AI.result: 在Visual Spatial Planning基准上达到SOTA；通过自反思提升视觉生成质量；在共享语义latent空间内支持世界建模，预测未来视觉状态。
AI.conclusion: LatentUM通过共享语义 latent space消除了像素级解码的局限性，在视觉空间规划任务上达到最先进水平，支持自反射式视觉生成和世界建模等应用，代表了统一模型的重要进步。

relevance_reason: This paper is about general cross-modal reasoning and unified visual models (LatentUM), not specifically about 3D human motion generation. While it addresses cross-modal reasoning in latent space and visual generation quality, it does not target the specific pain points of the research profile: domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion representations, temporal consistency in visual-to-motion translation, or extracting visual guidance features for 3D motion generation. The methods (latent-space unified models) are different from the specified methods (VLM for quality supervision, video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance, 3D motion generation models). This is a general computer vision/AI paper with a different application domain entirely.

title: CoRegOVCD: Consistency-Regularized Open-Vocabulary Change Detection
summary: Remote sensing change detection (CD) aims to identify where land-cover semantics change across time, but most existing methods still assume a fixed label space and therefore cannot answer arbitrary user-defined queries. Open-vocabulary change detection (OVCD) instead asks for the change mask of a queried concept. In the fully training-free setting, however, dense concept responses are difficult to compare directly across dates: appearance variation, weak cross-concept competition, and the spatial continuity of many land-cover categories often produce noisy, fragmented, and semantically unreliable change evidence. We propose Consistency-Regularized Open-Vocabulary Change Detection (CoRegOVCD), a training-free dense inference framework that reformulates concept-specific change as calibrated posterior discrepancy. Competitive Posterior Calibration (CPC) and the Semantic Posterior Delta (SPD) convert raw concept responses into competition-aware queried-concept posteriors and quantify their cross-temporal discrepancy, making semantic change evidence more comparable without explicit instance matching. Geometry-Token Consistency Gate (GeoGate) and Regional Consensus Discrepancy (RCD) further suppress unsupported responses and improve spatial coherence through geometry-aware structural verification and regional consensus. Across four benchmarks spanning building-oriented and multi-class settings, CoRegOVCD consistently improves over the strongest previous training-free baseline by 2.24 to 4.98 F1$_C$ points and reaches a six-class average of 47.50% F1$_C$ on SECOND.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoRegOVCD，一种无需训练的开放词汇变化检测框架，通过竞争性后验校准和语义后验Delta将原始概念响应转换为竞争感知的查询概念后验，并利用几何令牌一致性门和区域共识差异增强空间一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感变化检测方法假设固定标签空间，无法回答用户定义的任意查询。在完全无训练设置中，密集概念响应因外观变化、跨概念竞争弱和土地利用类别的空间连续性而产生噪声、碎片化和语义不可靠的变化证据。
AI.method: 提出一致性正则化开放词汇变化检测(CoRegOVCD)框架，将概念特定变化重新表述为校准的后验差异。具体包括：(1)竞争性后验校准(CPC)和语义后验Delta(SPD)将原始概念响应转换为竞争感知的查询概念后验并量化跨时间差异；(2)几何令牌一致性门(GeoGate)和区域共识差异(RCD)通过几何感知结构验证和区域共识抑制不支持的响应并改善空间一致性。
AI.result: 在四个涵盖建筑导向和多类设置的基准测试中，CoRegOVCD始终比最强的先前无训练基线提高2.24至4.98个F1_C点，在SECOND上达到六类平均47.50% F1_C。
AI.conclusion: CoRegOVCD在无需训练的情况下实现了开放词汇变化检测的显著改进，通过后验校准和几何一致性机制有效解决了密集概念响应跨时间比较困难的挑战。

relevance_reason: The paper is about remote sensing change detection (satellite imagery analysis for building/land use changes), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different: this paper deals with analyzing aerial images to detect changes in buildings and land, not generating human motion from video. The methods (posterior calibration, geometric consistency gates) have no connection to the research profile's methods (VLM, video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance, 3D motion generation). This paper does not address any of the stated pain points about 2D-to-3D motion domain gap, temporal consistency, or visual guidance extraction for motion generation.

title: Beyond the Fold: Quantifying Split-Level Noise and the Case for Leave-One-Dataset-Out AU Evaluation
summary:
Subject-exclusive cross-validation is the standard evaluation protocol for facial Action Unit (AU) detection, yet reported improvements are often small. We show that cross-validation itself introduces measurable stochastic variance. On BP4D+, repeated 3-fold subject-exclusive splits produce an empirical noise floor of $\pm 0.065$ in average F1, with substantially larger variation for low-prevalence AUs. Operating-point metrics such as F1 fluctuate more than threshold-independent measures such as AUC, and model ranking can change under different fold assignments.
  We further evaluate cross-dataset robustness using a Leave-One-Dataset-Out (LODO) protocol across five AU datasets. LODO removes partition randomness and exposes domain-level instability that is not visible under single-dataset cross-validation. Together, these results suggest that gains often reported in cross-fold validation may fall within protocol variance. Leave-one-dataset-out cross-validation yields more stable and interpretable findings

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了面部动作单元检测评估中的协议方差问题：在BP4D+数据集上，重复3折主体排除交叉验证产生约±0.065的平均F1噪声 floor，且模型排名会随折叠分配变化；留一数据集-out(LODO)跨数据集评估能揭示单数据集验证中不可见的领域级不稳定性，表明论文报告的性能提升可能落在协议方差范围内。
AI.motivation: 主题排他交叉验证是面部动作单元(AU)检测的标准评估协议，但报告的改进通常很小。本文旨在研究交叉验证本身是否引入随机方差，以及现有评估协议是否足够可靠。
AI.method: 1)在BP4D+数据集上重复进行3折主体排除划分的交叉验证；2)使用留一数据集-out(LODO)协议在五个AU数据集上进行跨数据集鲁棒性评估。
AI.result: 1)BP4D+上重复3折主体排除划分产生平均F1的±0.065的经验噪声 floor，低患病率AU的变异更大；2)F1等操作点指标比AUC等阈值独立指标波动更大；3)模型排名在不同折叠分配下可能改变；4)LODO协议揭示了单数据集交叉验证中不可见的领域级不稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，通常在交叉验证中报告的性能提升可能落在协议方差范围内。此外，留一数据集-out交叉验证能产生更稳定且可解释的结果，建议未来研究采用此方法进行更可靠的模型评估。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Facial Action Unit (AU) detection - recognizing facial muscle movements from 2D images for emotion recognition. This is a completely different application domain from 3D Human Motion Generation, which involves generating 3D skeletal body motion sequences from video inputs. While both involve computer vision, AU detection is about classifying facial expressions, NOT generating human motion. The methods and goals are entirely different - this paper addresses evaluation protocol variance for expression detection, not motion generation from video.

title: Reflection Generation for Composite Image Using Diffusion Model
summary: Image composition involves inserting a foreground object into the background while synthesizing environment-consistent effects such as shadows and reflections. Although shadow generation has been extensively studied, reflection generation remains largely underexplored. In this work, we focus on reflection generation.
